tEn: Step 3.5 Flash: Open Frontier-Level Intelligence with 11B Active Parameters
tZh: Step 3.5 Flash：以110亿活跃参数实现前沿级智能
sEn: Step 3.5 Flash achieves frontier-level agentic intelligence with only 11B active parameters through a sparse MoE architecture and scalable RL training.
sZh: Step 3.5 Flash通过稀疏MoE架构和可扩展强化学习训练，仅用110亿活跃参数就实现了前沿级智能体智能。
absEn: We introduce Step 3.5 Flash, a sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model that bridges frontier-level agentic intelligence and computational efficiency. We focus on what matters most when building agents: sharp reasoning and fast, reliable execution. Step 3.5 Flash pairs a 196B-parameter foundation with 11B active parameters for efficient inference. It is optimized with interleaved 3:1 sliding-window/full attention and Multi-Token Prediction (MTP-3) to reduce the latency and cost of multi-round agentic interactions. To reach frontier-level intelligence, we design a scalable reinforcement learning framework that combines verifiable signals with preference feedback, while remaining stable under large-scale off-policy training, enabling consistent self-improvement across mathematics, code, and tool use. Step 3.5 Flash demonstrates strong performance across agent, coding, and math tasks, achieving 85.4% on IMO-AnswerBench, 86.4% on LiveCodeBench-v6 (2024.08-2025.05), 88.2% on tau2-Bench, 69.0% on BrowseComp (with context management), and 51.0% on Terminal-Bench 2.0, comparable to frontier models such as GPT-5.2 xHigh and Gemini 3.0 Pro. By redefining the efficiency frontier, Step 3.5 Flash provides a high-density foundation for deploying sophisticated agents in real-world industrial environments.
absZh: 我们推出了Step 3.5 Flash，一种稀疏混合专家（MoE）模型，它弥合了前沿级智能体智能与计算效率之间的差距。我们专注于构建智能体时最重要的方面：敏锐的推理和快速可靠的执行。Step 3.5 Flash将1960亿参数的基座与110亿活跃参数配对，实现高效推理。它通过交错3:1滑动窗口/全注意力机制和多令牌预测（MTP-3）进行优化，以降低多轮智能体交互的延迟和成本。为了达到前沿级智能，我们设计了一个可扩展的强化学习框架，该框架将可验证信号与偏好反馈相结合，同时在大规模离策略训练下保持稳定，从而在数学、代码和工具使用方面实现一致的自我改进。Step 3.5 Flash在智能体、编码和数学任务上表现出色，在IMO-AnswerBench上达到85.4%，在LiveCodeBench-v6（2024.08-2025.05）上达到86.4%，在tau2-Bench上达到88.2%，在BrowseComp（带上下文管理）上达到69.0%，在Terminal-Bench 2.0上达到51.0%，与GPT-5.2 xHigh和Gemini 3.0 Pro等前沿模型相当。通过重新定义效率前沿，Step 3.5 Flash为在真实工业环境中部署复杂智能体提供了高密度基础。

contrib.en: Introduces Step 3.5 Flash, a sparse MoE model with 196B total and 11B active parameters for efficient frontier-level agentic intelligence.
contrib.zh: 提出 Step 3.5 Flash，一种稀疏 MoE 模型，总参数量 196B，激活参数量 11B，实现高效的前沿级智能体智能。

contrib.en: Proposes MIS-PO (Metropolis Independence Sampling-Filtered Policy Optimization) for stable large-scale off-policy RL in MoE models.
contrib.zh: 提出 MIS-PO（Metropolis 独立采样过滤策略优化），用于 MoE 模型稳定的大规模离策略强化学习。

contrib.en: Designs a hybrid attention mechanism with 3:1 sliding-window/full attention and increased SWA query heads for efficient long-context inference.
contrib.zh: 设计混合注意力机制，采用 3:1 滑动窗口/全局注意力比例并增加 SWA 查询头数，实现高效长上下文推理。

contrib.en: Develops a unified post-training recipe alternating domain-specific specialization and global synthesis via self-distillation and scalable RL.
contrib.zh: 开发统一的后训练方案，通过自蒸馏和可扩展强化学习交替进行领域特化与全局综合。

contrib.en: Achieves competitive performance on agent, coding, and math benchmarks with only 11B active parameters, comparable to frontier models like GPT-5.2 xHigh.
contrib.zh: 仅用 11B 激活参数，在智能体、编程和数学基准上取得与 GPT-5.2 xHigh 等前沿模型相当的性能。

contrib.en: Implements EP-Group Balanced MoE Routing and lightweight MTP heads to reduce latency and cost in multi-round agentic interactions.
contrib.zh: 实现 EP 组平衡 MoE 路由和轻量级 MTP 头，降低多轮智能体交互的延迟和成本。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to benchmarks; real-world agentic deployment may reveal additional failure modes not captured.
limits.zh: 评估限于基准测试；实际智能体部署可能暴露未捕获的额外失效模式。

limits.en: MIS-PO's binary masking may discard informative off-policy samples, potentially limiting exploration.
limits.zh: MIS-PO 的二元掩码可能丢弃有信息的离策略样本，可能限制探索。

limits.en: Hybrid attention with SWA may still underperform dense attention on tasks requiring very long-range dependencies.
limits.zh: 混合注意力（含 SWA）在需要极长距离依赖的任务上可能仍不如密集注意力。

limits.en: Training stability relies on extensive diagnostics and mitigations; transferability to other architectures or scales is not guaranteed.
limits.zh: 训练稳定性依赖大量诊断和缓解措施；无法保证迁移到其他架构或规模。

limits.en: The model's performance on non-English or low-resource languages is not thoroughly evaluated.
limits.zh: 模型在非英语或低资源语言上的性能未得到充分评估。

items.en: We introduce Step 3.5 Flash, a sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model that bridges the gap between frontier-level agentic intelligence and computational efficiency. We focus on what matters most when building agents: reasoning that’s sharp, and execution that’s fast and reliable. Reflecting these priorities, Step 3.5 Flash pairs a 196B-parameter foundation for high-fidelity modeling with 11B active parameters for efficient inference, optimized by interleaved 3:1 Sliding Window/Full Attention and Multi-Token Prediction (MTP-3) to minimize the latency and cost of multi-round agentic interactions. Toward frontier-level intelligence, we design a scalable RL framework that integrates verifiable signals and preference feedback while maintaining stability during large-scale off-policy training to drive consistent self-improvement across mathematics, code, and tool use. Step 3.5 Flash demonstrates strong intelligence across agent, coding, and math tasks, achieving 85.4% on IMO-AnswerBench and 86.4% on LiveCodeBench-v6 (2024.08–2025.05), 88.2% on τ2\tau^{2}-Bench, 69.0% on BrowseComp (w. Context Manage), and 51.0% on Terminal-Bench 2.0 —performance on par with frontier models such as GPT-5.2 xHigh and Gemini 3.0 Pro. By redefining the efficiency frontier, Step 3.5 Flash provides a high-density foundation for deploying sophisticated agents in real-world industrial environments.
items.zh: 我们推出了 Step 3.5 Flash，这是一种稀疏混合专家（MoE）模型，弥合了前沿级智能体智能与计算效率之间的差距。我们专注于构建智能体时最重要的方面：精准的推理以及快速可靠的执行。反映这些优先事项，Step 3.5 Flash 将 196B 参数的高保真建模基础与 11B 活跃参数的高效推理相结合，通过交错的 3:1 滑动窗口/全注意力机制和多词元预测（MTP-3）进行优化，以最小化多轮智能体交互的延迟和成本。为了达到前沿级智能，我们设计了一个可扩展的强化学习框架，该框架整合了可验证信号和偏好反馈，同时在大规模离策略训练期间保持稳定性，从而推动数学、代码和工具使用方面的持续自我改进。Step 3.5 Flash 在智能体、编码和数学任务中展现出强大的智能，在 IMO-AnswerBench 上达到 85.4%，在 LiveCodeBench-v6（2024.08–2025.05）上达到 86.4%，在 τ²-Bench 上达到 88.2%，在 BrowseComp（带上下文管理）上达到 69.0%，在 Terminal-Bench 2.0 上达到 51.0%——性能与 GPT-5.2 xHigh 和 Gemini 3.0 Pro 等前沿模型相当。通过重新定义效率边界，Step 3.5 Flash 为在真实工业环境中部署复杂智能体提供了高密度基础。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Step 3.5 Flash achieves frontier-level intelligence with only 11B active parameters (196B MoE), comparable to leading closed and open-source models.
items.capZh: 图 1：Step 3.5 Flash 仅用 11B 活跃参数（196B MoE）就达到了前沿级智能，与领先的闭源和开源模型相当。

items.en: While open-source large language models (LLMs) [deepseekai2024deepseekv32, zeng2025glm, xiao2026mimov2flashtechnicalreport, team2025longcat, kimi_k2, minimax_m2p1] have rapidly narrowed the performance gap with closed-source frontier systems [gpt_5p2, gemini_3, opus] across verifiable tasks [10.5555/3524938.3525416, hmmt25, jain2024livecodebench], new challenges emerge as agentic systems gain prominence. In particular, open-source models still trail closed-source frontiers in complex reasoning. Furthermore, critical efficiency bottlenecks hinder their application in long-context agentic tasks [swe_verified, yang2025swesmith, tau2bench2025, terminalbench2025, wei2025browsecomp, zhou2025browsecompzhbenchmarkingwebbrowsing, mialon2023gaiabenchmarkgeneralai, chen2025xbench, sharma2025researchrubrics], let alone deployment in edge or resource-constrained settings.
items.zh: 尽管开源大语言模型（LLM）在可验证任务上迅速缩小了与闭源前沿系统的性能差距，但随着智能体系统日益突出，新的挑战也随之出现。特别是，开源模型在复杂推理方面仍落后于闭源前沿模型。此外，关键效率瓶颈阻碍了它们在长上下文智能体任务中的应用，更不用说在边缘或资源受限环境中的部署了。

items.en: In designing the architecture of Step 3.5 Flash, we focus on two core aspects: efficiency and capacity. We adopt a sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) [fedus2021switchtransformers, zoph2022stmoedesigningstabletransferable, pmlr-v162-du22c, lepikhin2020gshardscalinggiantmodels, dai2024deepseekmoeultimateexpertspecialization] architecture with 196B total parameters and only 11B activated per token, together with a 3:1 ratio of sliding-window attention (SWA) [DBLP:journals/corr/abs-1904-10509] to full attention and multi-token prediction (MTP-3) [gloeckle2024better, deepseek2024deepseekv3, xiaomi2025mimo, xiao2026mimov2flashtechnicalreport] to reduce long-context latency. To improve capacity under hybrid attention with minimal overhead, we increase the number of query heads in sliding-window attention (SWA) layers from 64 to 96 and use head-wise gated attention [qiu2025gatedattentionlargelanguage]. This design enables large-scale online deployment, sustaining ∼\sim170 tokens/s on Hopper GPUs during the first week on OpenRouter 111https://openrouter.ai.
items.zh: 在设计 Step 3.5 Flash 的架构时，我们关注两个核心方面：效率和容量。我们采用稀疏混合专家（MoE）架构，总参数为 196B，每个词元仅激活 11B，并结合 3:1 比例的滑动窗口注意力（SWA）与全注意力以及多词元预测（MTP-3），以减少长上下文延迟。为了在混合注意力下以最小开销提高容量，我们将滑动窗口注意力（SWA）层中的查询头数量从 64 增加到 96，并采用逐头门控注意力。这种设计支持大规模在线部署，在 OpenRouter 上的 Hopper GPU 上第一周内持续达到约 170 词元/秒。

items.en: On the pretraining side, we treat stability as a first-class requirement and build a comprehensive observability and diagnostic stack via a lightweight asynchronous metrics server with micro-batch-level continuous logging. This infrastructure enables systematic identification and mitigation of large-scale MoE failure modes (e.g., Muon-related precision sensitivity, expert collapse [step3blog], and activation blow-ups [kimi_k2, openai2025gptoss120bgptoss20bmodel]). Combined with an improved Muon optimizer [jordan2024muon] that offers more accurate and stable updates, we achieve stable training over 17.2T high-quality and diverse tokens with only a single transient loss spike. With this stable training regime, Step 3.5 Flash Base achieves competitive performance against larger counterparts, such as DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp Base [deepseekai2024deepseekv32] and Kimi-K2-Base [kimi_k2], on math, coding and knowledge benchmarks. Notably, on SimpleQA [wei2024measuring], it scores 31.6%, surpassing DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp Base despite using only one-third of the parameters.
items.zh: 在预训练方面，我们将稳定性作为首要要求，并通过轻量级异步指标服务器和微批次级连续日志记录构建了全面的可观测性和诊断栈。该基础设施能够系统地识别和缓解大规模 MoE 的故障模式。结合改进的 Muon 优化器，我们实现了在 17.2T 高质量多样化词元上的稳定训练，仅出现一次瞬态损失尖峰。凭借这种稳定的训练机制，Step 3.5 Flash Base 在数学、编码和知识基准测试中取得了与更大模型（如 DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp Base 和 Kimi-K2-Base）相竞争的性能。值得注意的是，在 SimpleQA 上，它得分 31.6%，超越了 DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp Base，尽管参数仅为后者的三分之一。

items.en: Toward frontier-level intelligence, current post-training systems face two tightly coupled challenges: inefficient iteration of domain-specific experts for self-distillation [deepseekai2024deepseekv32, zeng2025glm, xiao2026mimov2flashtechnicalreport, team2025longcat] and limited scalability of Reinforcement Learning (RL) to long-horizon reasoning for MoE models. Training a single generalist to directly cover diverse domains often sacrifices domain-specific expertise, whereas maintaining separate expert models leads to fragmentation and an unsustainable cost of continual multi-model iteration. At the same time, as models are extended to deeper reasoning trajectories, even small token-level discrepancies in off-policy rollouts can accumulate into high-variance gradients. This effect is particularly severe in MoE models, where expert-level routing induces larger distributional shifts and destabilizes optimization in the frontier performance regime [zheng2025group, yao2025offpolicy, ma2025stabilizing, deepseekai2024deepseekv32].
items.zh: 为了达到前沿级智能，当前的后训练系统面临两个紧密耦合的挑战：用于自蒸馏的领域专家迭代效率低下，以及强化学习（RL）对 MoE 模型的长程推理可扩展性有限。训练一个单一的通用模型直接覆盖多个领域通常会牺牲领域专业知识，而维护单独的专家模型则会导致碎片化和持续多模型迭代的不可持续成本。同时，随着模型扩展到更深的推理轨迹，离策略 rollout 中即使是微小的词元级差异也可能累积成高方差梯度。这种效应在 MoE 模型中尤为严重，因为专家级路由会导致更大的分布偏移，并在前沿性能区域破坏优化稳定性。

items.en: To address these challenges, we propose a unified post-training recipe for large-scale RL built on a shared SFT foundation. The framework alternates between domain-specific specialization and global synthesis, enabling efficient expert iteration while maintaining a single, high-performing generalist. A dedicated mid-training phase scales the context window to 128k and strengthens core agentic and reasoning capabilities via synthetic data, providing a strong initialization for downstream post-training. To support stable and scalable RL within this unified framework, we introduce Metropolis Independence Sampling-Filtered Policy Optimization (MIS-PO) [metropolis1953equation, hastings1970monte], replacing continuous importance weighting with discrete, distributional filtering at both token and trajectory levels. By restricting optimization to samples within a stable trust region, MIS-PO substantially reduces gradient variance while preserving effective learning signals, enabling RL to scale reliably to long-horizon reasoning and agentic behaviors.
items.zh: 为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种基于共享 SFT 基础的大规模 RL 统一后训练方案。该框架在领域专用化和全局综合之间交替进行，实现了高效的专家迭代，同时维护了一个单一的高性能通用模型。一个专门的中间训练阶段将上下文窗口扩展到 128k，并通过合成数据增强核心智能体和推理能力，为后续后训练提供了强大的初始化。为了在该统一框架内支持稳定且可扩展的 RL，我们引入了 Metropolis 独立采样过滤策略优化（MIS-PO），用离散的分布过滤替代连续的权重重要性，在词元和轨迹级别进行过滤。通过将优化限制在稳定信任区域内的样本，MIS-PO 大幅降低了梯度方差，同时保留了有效的学习信号，使 RL 能够可靠地扩展到长程推理和智能体行为。

items.en: Step 3.5 Flash achieves competitive performance with leading frontier models and systems across a broad range of reasoning and agentic benchmarks, despite 11B active parameters. It delivers strong results under standard inference on reasoning tasks, including 85.4% on IMO-AnswerBench [luong2025robustmathematicalreasoning] and 86.4% on LiveCodeBench-v6 (2024.08–2025.05) [jain2024livecodebench], while also demonstrating robust long-horizon, tool-augmented capabilities with 88.2% on τ2\tau^{2}-Bench [tau2bench2025], 69.0% on BrowseComp (with context management) [wei2025browsecomp], and 51.0% on Terminal-Bench 2.0 [terminalbench2025]. With PaCoRe [hu2026pacorelearningscaletesttime] deep think inference, Step 3.5 Flash further improves performance on reasoning-intensive benchmarks requiring extended deliberation and multi-round synthesis. Taken together, these results indicate that Step 3.5 Flash substantially narrows the gap between advanced open models and frontier proprietary systems in both reasoning and agentic settings.
items.zh: Step 3.5 Flash 在广泛的推理和智能体基准测试中取得了与领先前沿模型和系统相竞争的性能，尽管只有 11B 活跃参数。它在推理任务的标准推理下取得了强劲结果，包括 IMO-AnswerBench 上的 85.4% 和 LiveCodeBench-v6（2024.08–2025.05）上的 86.4%，同时在长程、工具增强能力方面也表现出色，在 τ²-Bench 上达到 88.2%，在 BrowseComp（带上下文管理）上达到 69.0%，在 Terminal-Bench 2.0 上达到 51.0%。通过 PaCoRe 深度思考推理，Step 3.5 Flash 在需要扩展推理和多轮综合的推理密集型基准测试上进一步提升了性能。综合来看，这些结果表明 Step 3.5 Flash 在推理和智能体设置中显著缩小了先进开放模型与前沿专有系统之间的差距。

items.en: The architecture of Step 3.5 Flash reflects a paradigm shift in model–system co-design. Beyond the traditional objectives of intelligence and cost, the era of autonomous agents elevates a third critical constraint: inference latency. In interactive agentic workflows [anthropic_agent_workflow, codex_agent_workflow], minimized latency translates directly to reduced wall-clock time for task completion, or conversely, allows for increased intelligence within a fixed time budget via test-time scaling [snell2025scaling, muennighoff2025s1, yang2025multiverse, hu2026pacorelearningscaletesttime].
items.zh: Step 3.5 Flash 的架构反映了模型-系统协同设计的范式转变。除了传统的智能和成本目标外，自主智能体时代还提升了第三个关键约束：推理延迟。在交互式智能体工作流中，最小化延迟直接转化为任务完成时间的减少，或者相反，允许在固定时间预算内通过测试时缩放增加智能。

items.en: Agentic workloads typically exhibit a distinct profile: extensive context prefilling followed by prolonged, multi-turn interactive decoding. Accordingly, we co-design Step 3.5 Flash for low wall-clock latency along three coupled axes: attention (to accelerate long-context processing and have good affinity with MTP), sparse MoE (to prevent stragglers in distributed deployments that reduce throughput), and multi-token prediction (MTP; to facilitate fast generation through speculative decoding).
items.zh: 智能体工作负载通常表现出独特的特征：广泛的上下文预填充，随后是长时间的多轮交互式解码。因此，我们沿着三个耦合轴协同设计 Step 3.5 Flash 以实现低墙钟延迟：注意力（加速长上下文处理并与 MTP 良好兼容）、稀疏 MoE（防止分布式部署中的掉队者降低吞吐量）以及多词元预测（MTP；通过推测解码促进快速生成）。

items.en: To accelerate prefilling, we employ a hybrid attention mechanism [Beltagy2020Longformer, gemmateam2025gemma3technicalreport, openai2025gptoss120bgptoss20bmodel] to mitigate the quadratic complexity of long-context processing. For decoding, we prioritize architectural compatibility with speculative decoding [10.5555/3618408.3619203], since verification efficiency is the dominant lever on bandwidth-bound hardware. These considerations motivate two attention design decisions:
items.zh: 为了加速预填充，我们采用混合注意力机制来缓解长上下文处理的二次复杂度。对于解码，我们优先考虑与推测解码的架构兼容性，因为在带宽受限的硬件上，验证效率是主要杠杆。这些考虑促使我们做出两个注意力设计决策：

items.en: Sliding-Window Attention (SWA). We select SWA [DBLP:journals/corr/abs-1904-10509] over linear attention [10.5555/3524938.3525416, schlag2021linear] to maximize decoding efficiency. Although both have linear complexity, the state-update mechanism of linear attention complicates efficient draft tree generation and parallel tree verification needed for speculative decoding [wang2025opt, xiong2025dyspec, 10.5555/3692070.3694435]. In contrast, SWA preserves standard attention semantics and remains inherently amenable to parallel verification via K​VKV masking. Moreover, in the absence of robust empirical evidence that linear attention yields superior long-context modeling for agentic tasks, we find that SWA with window size W=512W{=}512 strikes a favorable balance between kernel efficiency and capturing local dependencies.
items.zh: 滑动窗口注意力（SWA）。我们选择 SWA 而非线性注意力，以最大化解码效率。尽管两者都具有线性复杂度，但线性注意力的状态更新机制使高效草稿树生成和并行树验证变得复杂，而这正是推测解码所需的。相比之下，SWA 保留了标准注意力语义，并且通过 KV 掩码天然适用于并行验证。此外，在缺乏有力经验证据表明线性注意力在智能体任务中具有更优长上下文建模的情况下，我们发现窗口大小 W=512 的 SWA 在内核效率和捕获局部依赖之间取得了良好的平衡。

items.en: Hardware-Aligned Grouped-Query Attention (GQA-8). Targeting deployment on standard 8-GPU server nodes, we configure the model with eight K​VKV heads (GQA-8) [ainslie-etal-2023-gqa]. This aligns K​VKV-cache sharding with 8-way tensor parallelism and improves memory access patterns. Crucially, while GQA-8 makes attention more memory-bandwidth bound, it also creates computational slack that can absorb speculative drafting and verification overhead, enabling aggressive multi-token speculation without a proportional latency penalty.
items.zh: 硬件对齐的分组查询注意力（GQA-8）。针对标准 8-GPU 服务器节点的部署，我们将模型配置为八个 KV 头（GQA-8）。这使得 KV 缓存分片与 8 路张量并行对齐，并改善了内存访问模式。关键的是，虽然 GQA-8 使注意力更加受内存带宽限制，但它也创造了计算空闲，可以吸收推测性草稿和验证开销，从而实现激进的多词元推测而无需成比例的延迟惩罚。

items.en: On the feed-forward side, we employ fine-grained MoE [fedus2021switchtransformers, zoph2022stmoedesigningstabletransferable, pmlr-v162-du22c, lepikhin2020gshardscalinggiantmodels, dai2024deepseekmoeultimateexpertspecialization] to reduce the average FFN compute while maintaining capacity. Expert parallelism (EP) [lepikhin2020gshardscalinggiantmodels] is utilized to enable scalable deployment. However, under EP, end-to-end latency can be dominated by stragglers induced by routing imbalance: token assignment skew concentrates workload on a small subset of experts and their hosting GPUs, throttling throughput at synchronization points. We therefore introduce an EP-Group Balanced MoE Routing strategy.
items.zh: 在前馈方面，我们采用细粒度 MoE 来减少平均 FFN 计算量，同时保持容量。利用专家并行（EP）实现可扩展部署。然而，在 EP 下，端到端延迟可能由路由不平衡引起的掉队者主导：词元分配偏斜将工作负载集中到一小部分专家及其托管 GPU 上，在同步点限制吞吐量。因此，我们引入了 EP-Group Balanced MoE 路由策略。

items.en: To further reduce autoregressive latency, we incorporate Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) [li2024eagle, deepseek2024deepseekv3] as a complementary lever to speculative decoding [10.5555/3618408.3619203]. To keep speculation lightweight, we streamline the MTP heads by leveraging SWA and dense FFNs [xiao2026mimov2flashtechnicalreport].
items.zh: 为了进一步减少自回归延迟，我们将多词元预测（MTP）作为推测解码的补充杠杆。为了保持推测的轻量级，我们通过利用 SWA 和密集 FFN 来简化 MTP 头。

items.en: We further constrain the model size to under 200B parameters, enabling high-performance inference within the 128GB memory budget of high-end workstations.
items.zh: 我们进一步将模型大小限制在 200B 参数以下，从而在高端工作站的 128GB 内存预算内实现高性能推理。

full.sec: 2.2 Sparse MoE Backbone with Hybrid Attention
full.secZh: 2.2 混合注意力的稀疏MoE主干

items.capEn: Figure 2: Illustration of Step 3.5 Flash. The model uses head-wise gated attention [qiu2025gatedattentionlargelanguage] with a leading Full Attention layer followed by L=11L=11 Hybrid Blocks, each interleaving 3 Sliding Window Attention (SWA) layers with one Full Attention layer (for visual clarity, the first layer is omitted in the figure). We apply zero-centered RMSNorm [gemmateam2024gemmaopenmodelsbased] throughout. The first three blocks use dense FFNs; later blocks employ sparse MoE FFNs. MTP modules use SWA and dense FFNs. To limit overhead, only MTP module 1 is trained during main training; MTP modules 2–3 are cloned from it and jointly fine-tuned in a lightweight final phase.
items.capZh: 图 2：Step 3.5 Flash 示意图。该模型使用逐头门控注意力，以一个全注意力层开头，随后是 L=11 个混合块，每个块交错排列 3 个滑动窗口注意力（SWA）层和 1 个全注意力层（为清晰起见，图中省略了第一层）。我们全程应用零中心 RMSNorm。前三个块使用密集 FFN；后续块使用稀疏 MoE FFN。MTP 模块使用 SWA 和密集 FFN。为限制开销，主训练期间仅训练 MTP 模块 1；MTP 模块 2-3 从中克隆，并在轻量级最终阶段联合微调。

items.en: As illustrated in Figure 2, Step 3.5 Flash adopts a 45-layer sparse-MoE Transformer backbone (3 dense layers and 42 MoE layers) paired with a specialized hybrid attention layer layout. Each MoE layer contains 288 routed experts plus one shared expert, with a top-kk router activating k=8k{=}8 experts per token. This configuration maintains an extensive knowledge capacity (196B total parameters) while restricting per-token activation to just 11B, ensuring inference latency remains low enough for highly responsive agent interaction. Table 6 summarizes key architecture hyperparameters of Step 3.5 Flash.
items.zh: 如图 2 所示，Step 3.5 Flash 采用 45 层稀疏 MoE Transformer 骨干（3 个密集层和 42 个 MoE 层），并配以专门的混合注意力层布局。每个 MoE 层包含 288 个路由专家加一个共享专家，top-k 路由器每个词元激活 k=8 个专家。这种配置保持了广泛的知识容量（196B 总参数），同时将每个词元的激活限制在仅 11B，确保推理延迟足够低，以实现高度响应的智能体交互。表 6 总结了 Step 3.5 Flash 的关键架构超参数。

items.en: To balance long-context efficiency with robust long-range connectivity, Step 3.5 Flash leverages an interleaved attention layout at a 3:13:1 ratio (SWA : Full) inspired by [openai2025gptoss120bgptoss20bmodel, gemmateam2025gemma3technicalreport, cohere2025commandaenterprisereadylarge], denoted as S​3​F​1S3F1. This configuration repeats a four-layer motif consisting of three SWA layers (W=512W{=}512) followed by a single full GQA-8 layer. However, in our initial experiments, a naive interleaving strategy consistently underperforms a dense attention baseline across various benchmarks (Table 10). To bridge this performance gap without adding practical overheads, we leverage two complementary enhancements: (i) an increased SWA query-head count, and (ii) adopting head-wise gated attention [qiu2025gatedattentionlargelanguage].
items.zh: 为了平衡长上下文效率与稳健的长程连接，Step 3.5 Flash 采用 3:1 比例的交错注意力布局（SWA : 全注意力），受启发于 [openai2025gptoss120bgptoss20bmodel, gemmateam2025gemma3technicalreport, cohere2025commandaenterprisereadylarge]，记为 S3F1。该配置重复一个四层模式，包括三个 SWA 层（W=512）后跟一个全 GQA-8 层。然而，在我们的初始实验中，简单的交错策略在各种基准测试中始终不如密集注意力基线（表 10）。为了在不增加实际开销的情况下弥补这一性能差距，我们利用了两个互补的增强： (i) 增加 SWA 查询头数量，以及 (ii) 采用逐头门控注意力。

items.en: Using a higher query-head number (from 6464 to 9696) effectively mitigates performance drop typically observed when transitioning from a uniform full-attention architecture to the S​3​F​1S3F1 layout (Table 10). We consider this to be nearly a “free lunch”. Because in long-text scenarios, the overhead of naive SWA is very small, even though our solution scales up significantly.
items.zh: 使用更高的查询头数量（从 64 到 96）有效缓解了从均匀全注意力架构过渡到 S3F1 布局时通常出现的性能下降（表 10）。我们认为这几乎是“免费的午餐”。因为在长文本场景中，朴素 SWA 的开销非常小，尽管我们的解决方案显著扩展了规模。

items.en: A limitation of naive SWA is its inability to effectively absorb unused attention weights when there is no useful information in the input window [xiao2024efficient, sun2024massive, gu2025when, qiu2025gatedattentionlargelanguage]. Previous work [openai2025gptoss120bgptoss20bmodel, xiao2026mimov2flashtechnicalreport] introduce learnable, data-independent sink tokens into the window to address this issue. Instead, we opt for a different approach by integrating a parameter-efficient head-wise gating mechanism [jumper_highly_2021, qiu2025gatedattentionlargelanguage, lin2025forgetting], which can be viewed as integrating data-dependent sink tokens. Please refer to Appendix A.1 for implementation details and further discussion. Head-wise gating is also negligible to both theoretical FLOPs and practical latency. We report more performance analysis and benchmarks for gating and augmenting the number of SWA heads in Appendix A.2.
items.zh: 朴素滑动窗口注意力（SWA）的一个局限性是，当输入窗口中没有有用信息时，它无法有效吸收未使用的注意力权重 [xiao2024efficient, sun2024massive, gu2025when, qiu2025gatedattentionlargelanguage]。先前的工作 [openai2025gptoss120bgptoss20bmodel, xiao2026mimov2flashtechnicalreport] 引入了可学习的、与数据无关的汇合令牌到窗口中以解决此问题。相反，我们选择了一种不同的方法，即集成一个参数高效的头级门控机制 [jumper_highly_2021, qiu2025gatedattentionlargelanguage, lin2025forgetting]，这可以视为集成与数据相关的汇合令牌。实现细节和进一步讨论请参见附录 A.1。头级门控对理论 FLOPs 和实际延迟的影响也可忽略不计。我们在附录 A.2 中报告了关于门控和增加 SWA 头数量的更多性能分析和基准测试。

items.en: We use loss-free load-balancing [deepseek2024deepseekv3, wang2024lossfreebalancing] to encourage global token balance across experts. However, this approach does not guarantee balanced loads across EP ranks at the micro-batch level, potentially leading to stragglers and reduced throughput. We therefore introduce an EP-level balancing loss that explicitly promotes uniform rank-level utilization [dai2024deepseekmoeultimateexpertspecialization].
items.zh: 我们使用无损失负载均衡 [deepseek2024deepseekv3, wang2024lossfreebalancing] 来鼓励专家间的全局令牌平衡。然而，这种方法不能保证微批次级别上跨 EP 等级的负载平衡，可能导致掉队者并降低吞吐量。因此，我们引入了一个 EP 级平衡损失，明确促进均匀的等级级利用率 [dai2024deepseekmoeultimateexpertspecialization]。

items.en: EP partitions experts ℰ\mathcal{E} into GG disjoint groups {ℰg}g=1G\{\mathcal{E}_{g}\}_{g=1}^{G} across ranks. For token tt, let StS_{t} denote the top-KK experts (mask st,e=𝟏​[e∈St]s_{t,e}=\mathbf{1}[e\in S_{t}]) and pt,⋅p_{t,\cdot} the routing probabilities. Then, the EP load balancing loss ℒE​P\mathcal{L}_{EP} is:
items.zh: EP 将专家 ℰ\mathcal{E} 划分为跨等级的 GG 个不相交组 {ℰg}g=1G\{\mathcal{E}_{g}\}_{g=1}^{G}。对于令牌 tt，令 StS_t 表示 top-KK 专家（掩码 st,e=𝟏​[e∈St]s_{t,e}=\mathbf{1}[e\in S_t]），pt,⋅p_{t,\cdot} 表示路由概率。那么，EP 负载均衡损失 ℒE​P\mathcal{L}_{EP} 为：

items.en: To speedup speculative decoding on long-context agentic workloads, we attach three lightweight multi-token prediction (MTP) heads. Each MTP head consists of a SWA and a dense FFN, adding only 0.81B parameters (∼\sim0.41%). We index these heads by their additional prediction offset beyond the standard LM head: for h∈{1,2,3}h\in\{1,2,3\}, MTP-hh predicts the token xt+1+hx_{t+1+h} conditioned on the backbone hidden states at position tt. To control training overhead, we activate and optimize only MTP-11 in most training stages. Once the backbone is well-trained, we initialize MTP-22 and MTP-33 from MTP-11 and jointly train all MTP heads in a lightweight post-training phase. Inspired by Fast-MTP [cai2025fastmtpacceleratingllminference], we adopt position-dependent loss reweighting across prediction offsets in MTP heads to prevent over-optimizing for distant-token predictions.
items.zh: 为了加速长上下文智能体式工作负载上的推测解码，我们附加了三个轻量级多令牌预测（MTP）头。每个 MTP 头由一个 SWA 和一个密集 FFN 组成，仅增加 0.81B 参数（约 0.41%）。我们通过它们相对于标准 LM 头的额外预测偏移来索引这些头：对于 h∈{1,2,3}h\in\{1,2,3\}，MTP-hh 基于位置 tt 处的骨干隐藏状态预测令牌 xt+1+hx_{t+1+h}。为了控制训练开销，我们在大多数训练阶段仅激活和优化 MTP-11。一旦骨干网络训练良好，我们从 MTP-11 初始化 MTP-22 和 MTP-33，并在轻量级后训练阶段联合训练所有 MTP 头。受 Fast-MTP [cai2025fastmtpacceleratingllminference] 启发，我们在 MTP 头中采用跨预测偏移的位置相关损失重加权，以防止过度优化远距离令牌预测。

items.en: We conduct extensive experiments to validate key design choices in Step 3.5 Flash, focusing on (i) attention layouts, including SWA and head scaling, and (ii) head-wise gated attention versus sink tokens. To ensure our efficiency optimizations do not degrade model performance, we adopt two complementary ablation protocols: one evaluates full end-to-end pipelines covering pre-training, 32k long-context extension, and 64k context-length supervised fine-tuning (SFT), and the other scales the analysis up to 100B parameters to study how these design choices behave with scale. Detailed architecture and evaluation setups for all tables are provided in Appendix A.4. Key findings from these large-scale experiments are summarized below.
items.zh: 我们进行了大量实验来验证 Step 3.5 Flash 中的关键设计选择，重点关注 (i) 注意力布局，包括 SWA 和头缩放，以及 (ii) 头级门控注意力与汇合令牌。为了确保我们的效率优化不会降低模型性能，我们采用了两种互补的消融协议：一种评估涵盖预训练、32k 长上下文扩展和 64k 上下文长度监督微调（SFT）的完整端到端流水线，另一种将分析扩展到 100B 参数规模，以研究这些设计选择在规模下的行为。所有表格的详细架构和评估设置见附录 A.4。这些大规模实验的关键发现总结如下。

items.en: We train a 30B-A3B model through the full pipeline (1.4T-token pretraining followed by SFT) to evaluate the end-to-end impact of hybrid attention on reasoning and long-context performance. We ablate four attention layouts: all-full attention (F​F​F​FFFFF), alternating SWA/full (S​1​F​1S1F1), a 3:1 SWA-to-full layout (S​3​F​1S3F1), and an S​3​F​1S3F1 variant with increased SWA query heads (S​3​F​1S3F1+Head). To isolate attention-structure effects, we fix the SWA window size to W=512W{=}512 and disable MTP (see Appendix, Table 9 and Table 10).
items.zh: 我们训练了一个 30B-A3B 模型，通过完整流水线（1.4T 令牌预训练后接 SFT）来评估混合注意力对推理和长上下文性能的端到端影响。我们消融了四种注意力布局：全注意力（F​F​F​FFFFF）、交替 SWA/全注意力（S​1​F​1S1F1）、3:1 SWA 与全注意力比例（S​3​F​1S3F1），以及具有增加 SWA 查询头的 S​3​F​1S3F1 变体（S​3​F​1S3F1+Head）。为了隔离注意力结构的影响，我们将 SWA 窗口大小固定为 W=512W{=}512 并禁用 MTP（参见附录表 9 和表 10）。

items.en: Increasing the number of SWA query heads largely compensates for this loss. Notably, S​3​F​1S3F1+Head already surpasses F​F​F​FFFFF during pretraining (55.7 vs. 54.1), and remains competitive after post-training: LongCtx improves from 27.5 to 28.2 and Sci from 42.4 to 44.0, closing most of the gap to the F​F​F​FFFFF baseline with negligible additional attention cost. The remaining downside is limited and localized (e.g., a modest drop on Code to 18.3), while overall quality trends favor S​3​F​1S3F1+Head.
items.zh: 增加 SWA 查询头的数量在很大程度上弥补了这一损失。值得注意的是，S​3​F​1S3F1+Head 在预训练期间已经超越了 F​F​F​FFFFF（55.7 对 54.1），并且在后训练后仍保持竞争力：LongCtx 从 27.5 提高到 28.2，Sci 从 42.4 提高到 44.0，以可忽略的额外注意力成本缩小了与 F​F​F​FFFFF 基线的大部分差距。剩余的缺点有限且局部化（例如，Code 上略有下降至 18.3），而整体质量趋势有利于 S​3​F​1S3F1+Head。

items.en: Interestingly, the alternating S​1​F​1S1F1 layout delivers the best overall SFT quality and the strongest LongCtx score (29.6), but requires substantially higher attention-side prefill/decode FLOPs (∼\sim1.58/1.65), about a 60% cost increase relative to S​3​F​1S3F1+Head. We therefore adopt S​3​F​1S3F1+Head as the default configuration for long-context agentic workloads, prioritizing its much lower prefill/decode cost with strong and stable long-context performance.
items.zh: 有趣的是，交替的 S​1​F​1S1F1 布局提供了最佳的总体 SFT 质量和最强的 LongCtx 分数（29.6），但需要显著更高的注意力侧预填充/解码 FLOPs（约 1.58/1.65），相对于 S​3​F​1S3F1+Head 增加了约 60% 的成本。因此，我们采用 S​3​F​1S3F1+Head 作为长上下文智能体式工作负载的默认配置，优先考虑其更低的预填充/解码成本以及强大且稳定的长上下文性能。

items.en: We conduct scaled, controlled pretraining experiments on a 100B-A10B MoE to study attention-side mechanisms under realistic scaling conditions. Specifically, we compare sink tokens and head-wise gated attention while holding the attention layout fixed to the same S​3​F​1S3F1 configuration with window size W=512W{=}512. As shown in Table 2, head-wise gating consistently improves quality, raising the average performance from 62.46 to 64.43 (+1.97). We therefore adopt head-wise gated attention as the default mechanism in subsequent studies.
items.zh: 我们在 100B-A10B MoE 上进行了大规模、受控的预训练实验，以研究实际缩放条件下的注意力侧机制。具体来说，我们在保持注意力布局固定为相同的 S​3​F​1S3F1 配置且窗口大小 W=512W{=}512 的情况下，比较了汇合令牌和头级门控注意力。如表 2 所示，头级门控一致地提高了质量，将平均性能从 62.46 提高到 64.43（+1.97）。因此，我们在后续研究中采用头级门控注意力作为默认机制。

items.en: Step 3.5 Flash is trained on a large-scale cluster with 4,096 NVIDIA H800 GPUs. Each node contains 8 GPUs interconnected through NVLink and NVSwitch for high-bandwidth intra-node communication. For inter-node connectivity, the cluster relies on 8×200 Gbps RoCE links to maintain efficient synchronization and data exchange at scale.
items.zh: Step 3.5 Flash 在一个拥有 4,096 个 NVIDIA H800 GPU 的大规模集群上训练。每个节点包含 8 个 GPU，通过 NVLink 和 NVSwitch 互连以实现高带宽节点内通信。对于节点间连接，集群依赖 8×200 Gbps RoCE 链路来维持大规模的高效同步和数据交换。

items.en: The training of Step 3.5 Flash is powered by our internal Steptron framework, a lightweight high-performance system built on top of PyTorch [Ansel_PyTorch_2_Faster_2024] and Megatron-LM [megatron-lm]. Steptron unifies the full model development pipeline, supporting large-scale pre-training, post-training, and reinforcement learning (RL) workloads under a single engineering stack.
items.zh: Step 3.5 Flash 的训练由我们内部的 Steptron 框架驱动，这是一个基于 PyTorch [Ansel_PyTorch_2_Faster_2024] 和 Megatron-LM [megatron-lm] 构建的轻量级高性能系统。Steptron 统一了完整的模型开发流水线，在单一工程栈下支持大规模预训练、后训练和强化学习（RL）工作负载。

items.en: Step 3.5 Flash employs a hybrid parallelization strategy, including 8-way pipeline parallelism (PP) [narayanan2021efficientlargescalelanguagemodel] with virtual pipeline stages (VPP), and 8-way expert parallelism (EP) [lepikhin2020gshardscalinggiantmodels], and ZeRO-1 Data Parallelism (DP) [rajbhandari2020zero]. In order to facilitate efficient training of Step 3.5 Flash, we employ the following engineering techniques.
items.zh: Step 3.5 Flash 采用混合并行化策略，包括 8 路流水线并行（PP）[narayanan2021efficientlargescalelanguagemodel] 及虚拟流水线阶段（VPP）、8 路专家并行（EP）[lepikhin2020gshardscalinggiantmodels] 和 ZeRO-1 数据并行（DP）[rajbhandari2020zero]。为了促进 Step 3.5 Flash 的高效训练，我们采用了以下工程技术。

items.en: Following Megatron-Core [liu2025moeparallelfoldingheterogeneous], we implement a decoupled parallelization scheme that allows the attention and MoE modules to use different parallelization strategies. We assign them independent parallel groups and perform gradient reduction and scaling within each module’s corresponding data-parallel group.
items.zh: 遵循 Megatron-Core [liu2025moeparallelfoldingheterogeneous]，我们实现了一种解耦的并行化方案，允许注意力和 MoE 模块使用不同的并行化策略。我们为它们分配独立的并行组，并在每个模块对应的数据并行组内执行梯度归约和缩放。

items.en: Concurrent DP communication streams for decoupled attention and MoE can saturate RoCE links, incurring considerable increases in DP overheads due to congestion. To address this, we propose two complementary communication optimizations that jointly reduce iteration time by up to 5%. First, fabric-aware communication scheduling partitions DP traffic into intra-node NVLink and inter-node RoCE phases, and pipelines them to fully utilize both fabrics. Second, communication-aware rank placement uses job-level communication profiles to place ranks across switches, reducing hop counts and steering heavy traffic away from inter-switch hotspots.
items.zh: 解耦注意力和 MoE 的并发 DP 通信流可能使 RoCE 链路饱和，由于拥塞而导致 DP 开销显著增加。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了两种互补的通信优化，共同将迭代时间减少高达 5%。首先，结构感知通信调度将 DP 流量划分为节点内 NVLink 和节点间 RoCE 阶段，并对其进行流水线处理以充分利用两种结构。其次，通信感知等级放置使用作业级通信配置文件将等级放置在交换机之间，减少跳数并将重流量引导远离交换机间热点。

items.en: Muon [jordan2024muon] requires full (unsharded) per-parameter gradients for Newton–Schulz orthogonalization, which conflicts with ZeRO-1 [rajbhandari2020zero] reduce-scatter that shards a parameter’s gradient across DP ranks. The current implementation in Megatron-LM resolves this mismatch by naively all-reducing FP32 gradients to reconstruct full gradients prior to the Muon update but nearly doubles communication. We instead assign whole parameters to DP ranks and repack the gradients buffer into a rank-major buffer so a single reduce-scatter delivers each parameter’s complete gradient to its owner. Since padding to the fattest rank incurs overhead that grows with the data-parallel size, we apply this only to expert parameters and use DP all-reduce for non-expert parameters. This hybrid strategy reduces end-to-end iteration time by approximately 5% with less than 4 GB additional memory compared to the naive all-reduce baseline.
items.zh: Muon [jordan2024muon] 需要完整的（非分片）每参数梯度用于 Newton–Schulz 正交化，这与 ZeRO-1 [rajbhandari2020zero] 的 reduce-scatter（将参数的梯度分片到 DP 等级）冲突。Megatron-LM 中的当前实现通过天真地对 FP32 梯度进行 all-reduce 以在 Muon 更新前重建完整梯度来解决此不匹配，但几乎使通信量翻倍。我们改为将完整参数分配给 DP 等级，并将梯度缓冲区重新打包为等级主缓冲区，以便单个 reduce-scatter 将每个参数的完整梯度传递给其所有者。由于填充到最胖等级的开销随数据并行大小增长，我们仅对专家参数应用此方法，并对非专家参数使用 DP all-reduce。这种混合策略将端到端迭代时间减少了约 5%，与天真 all-reduce 基线相比，额外内存少于 4 GB。

items.en: We also apply kernel-level optimizations to improve training efficiency. In attention, we fuse QK normalization with RoPE. In MoE, we fuse multiple small operators to reduce kernel-launch overhead and memory traffic, and implement a fused MoE gather/scatter with grouped GEMM, similar to SonicMoE [guo2025sonicmoeacceleratingmoeio].
items.zh: 我们还应用内核级优化以提高训练效率。在注意力中，我们将 QK 归一化与 RoPE 融合。在 MoE 中，我们融合多个小算子以减少内核启动开销和内存流量，并实现融合的 MoE gather/scatter 与分组 GEMM，类似于 SonicMoE [guo2025sonicmoeacceleratingmoeio]。

items.en: Our training framework supports fine-grained activation recomputation with per-layer, submodule-level toggles (e.g., attention, FFN, normalization, SiLU, and MoE permutation), enabling selective recomputation of only the most memory-intensive components to reduce peak memory with minimal overhead.
items.zh: 我们的训练框架支持细粒度激活重计算，具有每层、子模块级开关（例如，注意力、FFN、归一化、SiLU 和 MoE 排列），从而能够选择性地仅重计算最内存密集的组件，以最小开销减少峰值内存。

items.en: We collect a comprehensive suite of metrics (e.g., expert distribution within each micro-batch and gradient norms) for fine-grained monitoring of the training. However, the telemetry scale is immense: a 4,096-GPU workload generates nearly 6 million messages per iteration. Conducting a synchronous global reduction within the main loop would introduce a significant overhead of several seconds, effectively doubling the iteration time, which is clearly intolerable for high-performance training. To mitigate this, we develop a Lightweight Metrics Server to decouple telemetry processing from the training path. Each rank utilizes StepRPC, an in-house asynchronous communication framework, to asynchronously offload local metrics to the remote server. This approach reduces telemetry overhead to approximately 100 ms per iteration.
items.zh: 我们收集了一套全面的指标（例如，每个微批次内的专家分布和梯度范数）用于细粒度监控训练。然而，遥测规模巨大：4,096 GPU 工作负载每次迭代生成近 600 万条消息。在主循环内进行同步全局归约将引入数秒的显著开销，实际上使迭代时间加倍，这对于高性能训练显然是不可容忍的。为了缓解这一问题，我们开发了一个轻量级指标服务器，将遥测处理与训练路径解耦。每个等级利用 StepRPC（一个内部异步通信框架）异步地将本地指标卸载到远程服务器。这种方法将遥测开销减少到每次迭代约 100 毫秒。

items.en: The Metrics Server buffers incoming metrics and triggers reduction and database persistence only after receiving end-of-iteration signals from all participating ranks, eliminating synchronization in the main loop. To ingest and process millions of messages with low latency, the server is implemented as a high-concurrency multi-process system with two decoupled modules: (i) a Message Receiver optimized for high-throughput ingestion, and (ii) a Reduction Processor responsible for aggregation and persistence. By exploiting multi-core parallelism within and across these modules, the server keeps pace with the telemetry stream and ensures that metrics management never lags behind training.
items.zh: 指标服务器缓冲传入指标，并仅在收到所有参与等级的迭代结束信号后触发归约和数据库持久化，从而消除了主循环中的同步。为了以低延迟摄取和处理数百万条消息，该服务器实现为一个高并发多进程系统，具有两个解耦模块：(i) 针对高吞吐量摄取优化的消息接收器，以及 (ii) 负责聚合和持久化的归约处理器。通过在这些模块内部和之间利用多核并行性，服务器跟上遥测流的步伐，确保指标管理永远不会落后于训练。

items.en: This section summarizes our pre-training and mid-training process, with an emphasis on the practical stability constraints of large-scale sparse MoE training. We first describe training stability diagnostics and mitigations (Section 4.1), then detail the curriculum used for pre-training and mid-training, including the data mixture, schedule, and key hyper-parameters (Section 4.2).
items.zh: 本节总结了我们的预训练和中期训练过程，重点是大规模稀疏 MoE 训练的实际稳定性约束。我们首先描述训练稳定性诊断和缓解措施（第 4.1 节），然后详细说明用于预训练和中期训练的课程，包括数据混合、调度和关键超参数（第 4.2 节）。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Per-step training loss of Step 3.5 Flash, plotted without smoothing or sub-sampling. We observe merely one isolated loss spike across the full training duration. The initial training steps are omitted for clarity. Markers ①–③ indicate batch size increases to 8,192, 12,288, and 16,384, respectively. Marker ④ denotes the activation of the loss mask on meta tokens (see Appendix A.3 for details).
items.capZh: 图 3：Step 3.5 Flash 的每步训练损失，未进行平滑或子采样。我们观察到在整个训练过程中仅出现一个孤立的损失尖峰。为清晰起见，省略了初始训练步骤。标记 ①–③ 分别表示批量大小增加到 8,192、12,288 和 16,384。标记 ④ 表示对元标记激活损失掩码（详见附录 A.3）。

items.en: Training stability is a first-class requirement for large-scale sparse MoE pre-training. To make stability actionable, we build a comprehensive observability and diagnostic stack based on a lightweight asynchronous metrics server with micro-batch-level continuous logging (described in Section 3.3). This infrastructure provides fine-grained visibility into both optimizer-level and expert-level signals, enabling systematic mitigation of recurring failure modes in large-scale MoE training.
items.zh: 训练稳定性是大规模稀疏 MoE 预训练的首要要求。为使稳定性可操作，我们基于轻量级异步指标服务器和微批量级连续日志记录（详见第 3.3 节）构建了全面的可观测性和诊断栈。该基础设施提供了对优化器级和专家级信号的细粒度可见性，从而能够系统性地缓解大规模 MoE 训练中反复出现的故障模式。

items.en: In practice, we find three dominant instabilities that the metrics stack helps surface early and localize precisely: (i) transient loss spikes and occasional stochastic numerical blow-ups caused by Muon’s [jordan2024muon] numerically sensitive polar-factor iteration under reduced precision, (ii) expert-side collapse ("dead experts") that can occur even when router dispatch statistics remain apparently healthy, and (iii) localized activation blow-ups confined to a small subset of experts.
items.zh: 在实践中，我们发现指标栈有助于早期发现并精确定位三种主要的稳定性问题：(i) 由 Muon [jordan2024muon] 在低精度下数值敏感的极因子迭代引起的瞬态损失尖峰和偶发的随机数值爆炸；(ii) 专家侧崩溃（“死专家”），即使路由器调度统计量看似正常也可能发生；(iii) 局限于少数专家的局部激活爆炸。

items.en: With the mitigations guided by these diagnostics, the pre-training loss remains smooth throughout the run, exhibiting only a single loss spike. Figure 3 shows the full curve prior to learning-rate cooldown.
items.zh: 在这些诊断指导下的缓解措施下，预训练损失在整个运行过程中保持平滑，仅出现一个损失尖峰。图 3 显示了学习率冷却前的完整曲线。

items.en: Muon approximates a semi-orthogonal update direction via a Newton–Schulz (NS) iteration [bernstein2024oldoptimizernewnorm]. In early experiments, we find modest, consistent loss reduction when using a faster-converging orthogonalization approximation. We therefore adopt the Polar Express [amsel2025polarexpress] iteration and run a fixed T=6T{=}6 steps to balance optimization quality and throughput.
items.zh: Muon 通过 Newton–Schulz (NS) 迭代 [bernstein2024oldoptimizernewnorm] 近似半正交更新方向。在早期实验中，我们发现使用收敛更快的正交化近似时，损失会适度且一致地降低。因此，我们采用 Polar Express [amsel2025polarexpress] 迭代，并运行固定的 T=6 步以平衡优化质量和吞吐量。

items.en: However, we occasionally observe sharp, unrecoverable loss spikes despite using the recommended safety scaling [amsel2025polarexpress]. The spikes are non-deterministic (often avoided by resuming from a nearby checkpoint), suggesting a numerical pathology. Simulations indicate that bfloat16 Polar Express can rarely yield extreme intermediate outliers under certain update statistics due to cumulative error in addition. We therefore cast only the Polar Express iteration (state and intermediates) to float16 while keeping the rest of the training mixed-precision. After this change, the spikes do not recur.
items.zh: 然而，尽管使用了推荐的安全缩放 [amsel2025polarexpress]，我们偶尔仍会观察到尖锐且不可恢复的损失尖峰。这些尖峰是非确定性的（通常通过从附近检查点恢复来避免），表明存在数值病理。模拟表明，bfloat16 的 Polar Express 在某些更新统计下，由于加法中的累积误差，极少产生极端的中间离群值。因此，我们仅将 Polar Express 迭代（状态和中间结果）转换为 float16，同时保持其余训练为混合精度。此更改后，尖峰不再出现。

items.en: Step-3 [step3blog], our prior work, reports that MoE training may exhibit "dead experts", often described as experts receiving negligible token dispatch for extended periods and therefore obtaining little effective gradient signal. In our prior investigation, we find that expert collapse can also manifest as an expert-side pathology even when router dispatch remains stable, i.e., vanishing expert activations and stagnant or decaying expert parameter norms.
items.zh: Step-3 [step3blog] 是我们之前的工作，报告了 MoE 训练可能出现“死专家”，通常描述为专家长时间接收不到令牌调度，因此获得的有效梯度信号极少。在我们之前的调查中，我们发现即使路由器调度保持稳定，专家崩溃也可能表现为专家侧病理，即专家激活消失以及专家参数范数停滞或衰减。

items.en: We observe that two factors are particularly influential: (i) Routed-expert aggregation requires explicit scaling. When incorporating a shared expert, it is important to introduce an explicit scaling factor to calibrate the relative contribution of the shared expert and the routed experts. While smaller models may implicitly learn such a balance, larger models are less reliable at self-calibration. A mismatch can suppress the effective contribution of routed experts even if routing frequencies appear healthy. (ii) Micro-batch balancing can be overly restrictive under fine-grained sparsity. For sparse, fine-grained MoE designs, micro-batch-level load-balancing constraints (as commonly implemented in Switch-style routing [fedus2021switchtransformers]) can become overly stringent. As analyzed in [qiu2025demonsdetail], micro-batch LBL may induce excessive cross-expert competition and hinder effective specialization.
items.zh: 我们观察到两个特别有影响力的因素：(i) 路由专家聚合需要显式缩放。当引入共享专家时，引入显式缩放因子以校准共享专家和路由专家的相对贡献非常重要。虽然较小的模型可能隐式学习这种平衡，但较大的模型在自校准方面不太可靠。即使路由频率看似正常，不匹配也可能抑制路由专家的有效贡献。(ii) 在细粒度稀疏下，微批量平衡可能过于严格。对于稀疏、细粒度的 MoE 设计，微批量级负载平衡约束（如 Switch 风格路由 [fedus2021switchtransformers] 中常见）可能变得过于严格。如 [qiu2025demonsdetail] 所分析，微批量 LBL 可能引发过度的跨专家竞争并阻碍有效的专业化。

items.en: We therefore prefer broader-scope balancing (e.g., global-batch statistics) [qiu2025demonsdetail, yang2025qwen3] or loss-free bias adjustment based on observed load [wang2024lossfreebalancing, deepseek2024deepseekv3]. In practice, router dispatch statistics are typically stable and are not sensitive indicators of expert collapse. We recommend monitoring expert-side signals, including per-expert activation norms (e.g., RMS/mean norm at the MoE FFN intermediate) and parameter norms (e.g., Frobenius norms of expert projection matrices). When a subset of experts drifts toward near-zero activations/updates while the median remains stable (e.g., decreasing min-to-median ratios), it provides an early warning of expert “death”.
items.zh: 因此，我们倾向于更广范围的平衡（例如，全局批量统计）[qiu2025demonsdetail, yang2025qwen3] 或基于观察负载的无损偏置调整 [wang2024lossfreebalancing, deepseek2024deepseekv3]。在实践中，路由器调度统计量通常稳定，并非专家崩溃的敏感指标。我们建议监控专家侧信号，包括每个专家的激活范数（例如，MoE FFN 中间层的 RMS/均值范数）和参数范数（例如，专家投影矩阵的 Frobenius 范数）。当一部分专家向接近零的激活/更新漂移，而中位数保持稳定时（例如，最小与中位数之比下降），这提供了专家“死亡”的早期预警。

items.en: As expert specialization matures during the main training phase, we observe a localized stability pathology in the deeper MoE layers. Specifically, the activation norm of a small subset of experts (often just one or two per layer) grows rapidly, while the majority of experts in the same layer remain well-behaved. This disparity results in a heavy-tailed activation distribution: the median expert activation norm remain stable, but the maximum activation norm explodes, significantly increasing the risk of numerical overflow and downstream instability.
items.zh: 随着专家专业化在主训练阶段成熟，我们在较深的 MoE 层中观察到局部稳定性病理。具体来说，少数专家（通常每层仅一两个）的激活范数快速增长，而同一层中的大多数专家表现良好。这种差异导致激活分布呈重尾：中位数专家激活范数保持稳定，但最大激活范数爆炸，显著增加了数值溢出和下游不稳定的风险。

items.en: Weight clipping on expert projections: We constrain the norm of the MoE FFN expert projection matrices. For each expert projection matrix WW, if its maximum activation norm maxx⁡∥W​x∥\max_{x}\lVert Wx\rVert exceeds a threshold τ\tau, we rescale it via W←W⋅τmaxx⁡∥W​x∥W\leftarrow W\cdot\frac{\tau}{\max_{x}\lVert Wx\rVert}. This is similar to MuonClip in attention [kimi_k2], but we perform clipping offline on the checkpoint rather than on-the-fly.
items.zh: 专家投影的权重裁剪：我们约束 MoE FFN 专家投影矩阵的范数。对于每个专家投影矩阵 W，如果其最大激活范数 max_x ||Wx|| 超过阈值 τ，则通过 W ← W · τ / max_x ||Wx|| 重新缩放。这类似于注意力中的 MuonClip [kimi_k2]，但我们在检查点上离线执行裁剪，而非即时执行。

items.en: Activation clipping inside experts: We apply element-wise clipping directly to the MoE FFN intermediate activations prior to the output projection, as in [openai2025gptoss120bgptoss20bmodel].
items.zh: 专家内部的激活裁剪：我们在输出投影之前直接对 MoE FFN 中间激活应用逐元素裁剪，如 [openai2025gptoss120bgptoss20bmodel] 所述。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Analysis of expert activation stability and mitigation strategies. In Panels (b)–(c), solid lines represent the maximum expert output norm, while dashed lines represent the median. (1) Depth-Dependent Instability: While training loss appears identical across methods (Panel a) and middle layers remain stable (e.g., Layer 38 in Panel b), the final layers (i.e., Layer 45 in Panel c) suffer from catastrophic norm explosion in the No clipping baseline. (2) Mitigation: Weight clipping merely delays this explosion. In contrast, Activation clipping effectively bounds maximum norms, ensuring stability across all layers.
items.capZh: 图 4：专家激活稳定性分析与缓解策略。在面板 (b)–(c) 中，实线表示最大专家输出范数，虚线表示中位数。(1) 深度相关的不稳定性：虽然训练损失在不同方法间看似相同（面板 a），且中间层保持稳定（例如，面板 b 中的第 38 层），但最后几层（即面板 c 中的第 45 层）在无裁剪基线中遭受灾难性的范数爆炸。(2) 缓解：权重裁剪仅延迟了这种爆炸。相比之下，激活裁剪有效限制了最大范数，确保了所有层的稳定性。

items.en: Although the training loss appears indistinguishable across different mitigation strategies in Figure 4 (a), the max-to-median ratio reliably unmasks underlying instability. As evidenced in Panels (b) and (c), activation clipping ensures a stable trajectory for internal norms, whereas weight clipping alone fails to prevent the recurrence of outlier experts. Consequently, we establish the max-to-median ratio of per-expert activation norms as a robust and necessary metric for monitoring training stability.
items.zh: 尽管在图 4 (a) 中，不同缓解策略下的训练损失看似无法区分，但最大与中位数之比可靠地揭示了潜在的不稳定性。如面板 (b) 和 (c) 所示，激活裁剪确保了内部范数的稳定轨迹，而仅权重裁剪无法防止离群专家的再次出现。因此，我们将每个专家激活范数的最大与中位数之比确立为监控训练稳定性的稳健且必要的指标。

items.en: The activation blow-up is driven by several factors. We observe that high-frequency bi-grams can trigger expert specialization. When using pre-norm [radford2019language, xiong2020layer], a single expert can amplify its output boundlessly and dominate the final output norm, leading to near-deterministic prediction behavior. This risk is exacerbated by SwiGLU [shazeer2020gluvariantsimprovetransformer], where strong alignment between the gate and up-projection branches produces sparse activations with extreme magnitudes. Muon further accelerates this collapse by amplifying persistent low-rank updates. A detailed analysis is provided in Appendix B.
items.zh: 激活爆炸由多个因素驱动。我们观察到高频二元组可能触发专家专业化。当使用预层归一化 [radford2019language, xiong2020layer] 时，单个专家可以无限制地放大其输出并主导最终输出范数，导致近乎确定性的预测行为。SwiGLU [shazeer2020gluvariantsimprovetransformer] 加剧了这种风险，其中门控和上投影分支之间的强对齐产生了具有极端幅度的稀疏激活。Muon 通过放大持续的低秩更新进一步加速了这种崩溃。详细分析见附录 B。

items.en: The training proceeds from broad open-domain coverage to increasingly agentic and long-context specialization. We first pre-train at 4k context on a broad open-domain mixture to establish general-purpose capabilities, then anneal the mixture toward higher-quality knowledge and more software-development data (code, PRs, issues, and commits) while extending the context window to 32k . Next, a dedicated mid-training stage expands the context window from 32k to 128k to strengthen long-horizon reasoning and improve initialization for downstream post-training and agentic workloads. Overall, we train on approximately 17.6T tokens for pre-training and 750B tokens for mid-training.
items.zh: 训练从广泛的开放域覆盖逐步转向日益智能体式和长上下文的专业化。我们首先在 4k 上下文的广泛开放域混合数据上进行预训练，以建立通用能力，然后退火混合数据，转向更高质量的知识和更多软件开发数据（代码、PR、问题和提交），同时将上下文窗口扩展到 32k。接下来，一个专门的中期训练阶段将上下文窗口从 32k 扩展到 128k，以增强长程推理能力，并为下游后训练和智能体式工作负载改进初始化。总体而言，我们在预训练中训练了约 17.6T 个令牌，在中期训练中训练了 750B 个令牌。

items.en: Our corpus combines general open-domain data with agentic-oriented data. We summarize the key sources below, more details can be refered in Appendix C.
items.zh: 我们的语料库结合了通用开放域数据和面向智能体的数据。我们在下面总结关键来源，更多细节请参考附录 C。

items.en: To support broad world knowledge, we build StepCrawl (Appendix C.1.1), an in-house crawling and curation infrastructure beyond standard Common Crawl [commoncrawl], to harvest trillions of high-quality tokens at scale from web pages (HTML) and book-/document-like sources (ePub/PDF). All content is processed with multi-stage quality filtering, site/category tagging, deduplication, and sanitization.
items.zh: 为了支持广泛的世界知识，我们构建了 StepCrawl（附录 C.1.1），这是一个超越标准 Common Crawl [commoncrawl] 的内部爬取和整理基础设施，用于从网页（HTML）和书籍/文档类来源（ePub/PDF）大规模获取数万亿高质量令牌。所有内容都经过多阶段质量过滤、站点/类别标记、去重和清理。

items.en: Strong code capacity is foundational for agentic models. Our code corpus is curated and refined using a modified OpenCoder [huang2025opencoderopencookbooktoptier] pipeline. We relax filtering from a zero-tolerance policy to allowing 0–6 heuristic violations (Appendix C.2.1) per document, balancing quality and diversity, and upsample code-centric data during annealing and mid-training to strengthen agent-related programming.
items.zh: 强大的代码能力是智能体模型的基础。我们的代码语料库使用修改后的 OpenCoder [huang2025opencoderopencookbooktoptier] 流程进行整理和优化。我们将过滤从零容忍策略放宽到每个文档允许 0–6 次启发式违规（附录 C.2.1），以平衡质量和多样性，并在退火和中期训练期间对代码中心数据进行上采样，以增强与智能体相关的编程能力。

items.en: To better match real software-engineering workflows, we curate a comprehensive PR/Issue/Commit dataset(Appendix C.2.2) from GitHub repositories with 10+ stars. This includes (1) Base Data validated against git diff (deduplicated against benchmarks [jimenez2024swebench, yang2025swesmith]); (2) PR-Dialogue Data derived from PR threads and commits using Agentless-style templates [xia2024agentless] for file localization and code repair; and (3) derivative software-engineering corpora used in mid-training and post-training.
items.zh: 为了更好地匹配真实软件工程工作流程，我们从拥有 10 星以上的 GitHub 仓库中整理了一个全面的 PR/Issue/Commit 数据集（附录 C.2.2）。这包括：(1) 基础数据，通过 git diff 验证（针对基准 [jimenez2024swebench, yang2025swesmith] 去重）；(2) PR 对话数据，源自 PR 线程和提交，使用 Agentless 风格模板 [xia2024agentless] 进行文件定位和代码修复；(3) 衍生软件工程语料库，用于中期训练和后训练。

items.en: To improve tool-use robustness and multi-step reasoning, we add synthetic and semi-synthetic data spanning math/code/science/general knowledge, and domain-specific samples targeting search agent, SWE agent, and tool execution. During mid-training, we further introduce long-context samples (natural long documents and long-form synthetic tasks) to reinforce planning and reasoning over extended contexts.
items.zh: 为了提升工具使用的鲁棒性和多步推理能力，我们添加了涵盖数学/代码/科学/通用知识的合成和半合成数据，以及针对搜索智能体、SWE智能体和工具执行的领域特定样本。在中期训练期间，我们进一步引入长上下文样本（自然长文档和长格式合成任务），以强化对扩展上下文的规划和推理能力。

items.en: Pre-training Stage 1: Open-domain pre-training (14.6T tokens, 4k context). Broad open-domain training to maximize coverage and foundational capability.
items.zh: 预训练阶段1：开放域预训练（14.6T tokens，4k上下文）。广泛的开放域训练以最大化覆盖范围和基础能力。

items.en: Pre-training Stage 2: Annealing + long-context initialization (3T tokens, 4k to 32k context). We anneal the data mixture toward code and PR/Issue/Commit-centric sources, while increasing the share of higher-quality knowledge and reasoning-dense samples. This stage starts with 2T tokens at 4k context, then transitions to 1T tokens at 32k context under the same annealed mixture to initialize long-context training.
items.zh: 预训练阶段2：退火+长上下文初始化（3T tokens，4k到32k上下文）。我们将数据混合退火到以代码和PR/Issue/Commit为中心的来源，同时增加更高质量知识和推理密集型样本的比例。此阶段从4k上下文下的2T tokens开始，然后在相同的退火混合下过渡到32k上下文下的1T tokens，以初始化长上下文训练。

items.en: Mid-training also consists of two stages:
items.zh: 中期训练也包含两个阶段：

items.en: Mid-training Stage 1: Specialization at 32k (386B tokens, 32k context). We replay 81B tokens (21%) from pre-training to mitigate distribution shift and stabilize specialization, while emphasizing software-engineer and tool-use-centric mixtures.
items.zh: 中期训练阶段1：32k下的专业化（386B tokens，32k上下文）。我们重放预训练中的81B tokens（21%）以减轻分布偏移并稳定专业化，同时强调以软件工程师和工具使用为中心的混合。

items.en: Mid-training Stage 2: Long-context specialization (364B tokens, 128k context). We retain 10.5B replay tokens, and further specialize long-context capability with a mixture of synthetic long-horizon reasoning and natural long documents (selected from pre-training data with length >32>32k), plus domain-specific data for code agent, search agent, and tool-use.
items.zh: 中期训练阶段2：长上下文专业化（364B tokens，128k上下文）。我们保留10.5B重放tokens，并通过合成长程推理和自然长文档（从预训练数据中选择长度>32k的样本）的混合，以及针对代码智能体、搜索智能体和工具使用的领域特定数据，进一步专业化长上下文能力。

items.en: We use the Muon optimizer [jordan2024muon] throughout pre-training, set weight decay to 0.1 and gradeint clip to 1.0. The learning rate is linearly warmed up from 0 to 2.5×10−42.5\times 10^{-4} over the first 2,000 steps and then cosine-decayed to 5×10−55\times 10^{-5} over Pre-training Stage 1. In Pre-training Stage 2, we apply a secondary cosine decay from 5×10−55\times 10^{-5} to 2×10−52\times 10^{-5} over the 4k portion (2T tokens) and keep the learning rate fixed at 2×10−52\times 10^{-5} for the 32k portion (1T tokens). The global batch size gradually increases from 4096 to 16384 over the first 400B tokens, and keeps 16384 in the remaining training, and is set to 2k for the 32k portion of annealing. The MTP loss weight is set to 0.3 in Pre-training Stage 1 and 0.1 in Pre-training Stage 2, following [deepseek2024deepseekv3]. For loss-free load balancing, the bias update rate is 0.001 for the first 14.6T tokens and decays to 0.0 during annealing, and an EP-group balance loss with coefficient 0.001 is applied throughout pre-training. For RoPE [su2024roformer], we use θ=10,000\theta=10{,}000 for both full attention and sliding window attention (SWA) during 4k training, and set θFull=1,000,000\theta_{\mathrm{Full}}=1{,}000{,}000 only for full attention and maintain θSWA=10,000\theta_{\mathrm{SWA}}=10{,}000 for the 32k portion of annealing.
items.zh: 我们在整个预训练中使用Muon优化器[jordan2024muon]，设置权重衰减为0.1，梯度裁剪为1.0。学习率在前2000步从0线性预热到2.5×10⁻⁴，然后在预训练阶段1中余弦衰减到5×10⁻⁵。在预训练阶段2中，我们在4k部分（2T tokens）应用从5×10⁻⁵到2×10⁻⁵的二次余弦衰减，并在32k部分（1T tokens）保持学习率固定为2×10⁻⁵。全局批量大小在前400B tokens中从4096逐渐增加到16384，并在剩余训练中保持16384，在退火的32k部分设置为2k。MTP损失权重在预训练阶段1设置为0.3，在预训练阶段2设置为0.1，遵循[deepseek2024deepseekv3]。对于无损失负载均衡，偏置更新率在前14.6T tokens中为0.001，在退火期间衰减到0.0，并在整个预训练中应用系数为0.001的EP组平衡损失。对于RoPE[su2024roformer]，我们在4k训练中对全注意力和滑动窗口注意力（SWA）使用θ=10,000，并在退火的32k部分仅对全注意力设置θ_Full=1,000,000，保持θ_SWA=10,000。

items.en: We continue to use Muon [jordan2024muon] during mid-training. We freeze the MoE router weights and disable the EP-group balance loss and fix the MTP loss weight to 0.1 for both mid-training stages. The learning rate is warmed up from 0 to 2×10−52\times 10^{-5} over the first 3% of iterations, kept constant in Mid-training Stage 1, and decayed to 7.3×10−67.3\times 10^{-6} in Mid-training Stage 2. For RoPE selective scaling, we set θFull=1,000,000\theta_{\mathrm{Full}}=1{,}000{,}000 at 32k (Mid-training Stage 1) and increase to θFull=5,000,000\theta_{\mathrm{Full}}=5{,}000{,}000 at 128k (Mid-training Stage 2), while keeping θSWA=10,000\theta_{\mathrm{SWA}}=10{,}000 throughout mid-training [xiong2024effective].
items.zh: 我们在中期训练中继续使用Muon[jordan2024muon]。我们冻结MoE路由器权重，禁用EP组平衡损失，并在两个中期训练阶段将MTP损失权重固定为0.1。学习率在前3%的迭代中从0预热到2×10⁻⁵，在中期训练阶段1保持恒定，在中期训练阶段2衰减到7.3×10⁻⁶。对于RoPE选择性缩放，我们在32k（中期训练阶段1）设置θ_Full=1,000,000，并在128k（中期训练阶段2）增加到θ_Full=5,000,000，同时在整个中期训练中保持θ_SWA=10,000[xiong2024effective]。

items.en: In this section, we introduce a unified post-training recipe for large-scale Reinforcement Learning (RL), which begins with a unified Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) model. This framework enables consistent self-improvement by combining verifiable reward signals with human preference feedback, while maintaining stability even during large-scale off-policy training for Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models. The process follows a two-phase approach similar to prior works [liu2025deepseek, zeng2025glm]. First, we construct Expert Models by enhancing the unified SFT baseline with domain-specific RL across Math, Code, STEM, Tool-use, Long Context Understanding, Human Preference, and Agentic Reasoning. These specialized experts are then distilled into a generalist model using Self-Distillation and Scalable RL, ensuring the final model remains competitive with specialized baselines across diverse tasks. By systematically alternating between targeted specialization and broad synthesis, we achieve robust generalization without compromising expert-level performance.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们介绍一种用于大规模强化学习（RL）的统一后训练方案，该方案从统一的监督微调（SFT）模型开始。该框架通过结合可验证的奖励信号和人类偏好反馈，实现一致的自改进，同时即使在混合专家（MoE）模型的大规模离策略训练中也能保持稳定性。该过程遵循类似于先前工作的两阶段方法[liu2025deepseek, zeng2025glm]。首先，我们通过跨数学、代码、STEM、工具使用、长上下文理解、人类偏好和智能体推理的领域特定RL，增强统一的SFT基线，构建专家模型。然后，使用自蒸馏和可扩展RL将这些专门化的专家蒸馏成一个通用模型，确保最终模型在多样化任务中与专门化基线保持竞争力。通过在目标专门化和广泛综合之间系统交替，我们实现了稳健的泛化，同时不牺牲专家级性能。

full.secZh: 5.1 专家模型构建与自蒸馏

items.en: We employ a two-stage SFT pipeline to build a robust foundation for subsequent RL. The first stage executes large-scale multi-domain SFT spanning Math, Code, STEM, Logic, General QA, Code Agent, Tool-use, Search Agent, and Long Context Understanding. Difficulty-aware filtering and strategic balancing are applied to foster broad agentic behaviors. The second stage explicitly maximizes reasoning density by injecting out-of-distribution (OOD) signals [ye2025limoreasoning, muennighoff2025s1], comprising ∼\sim30k expert-level chemistry trajectories and synthetic arithmetic tasks. This targeted exposure to distinct reasoning patterns unlocks latent capabilities within just three epochs, equipping the model with the sophisticated structural complexity necessary to initialize the subsequent domain-specific RL phase.
items.zh: 我们采用两阶段SFT流程，为后续RL构建稳健基础。第一阶段执行大规模多领域SFT，涵盖数学、代码、STEM、逻辑、通用问答、代码智能体、工具使用、搜索智能体和长上下文理解。应用难度感知过滤和策略平衡以培养广泛的智能体行为。第二阶段通过注入分布外（OOD）信号[ye2025limoreasoning, muennighoff2025s1]显式最大化推理密度，包括约30k条专家级化学轨迹和合成算术任务。这种对独特推理模式的目标暴露在仅仅三个周期内解锁了潜在能力，使模型具备必要的复杂结构复杂性，以初始化后续的领域特定RL阶段。

items.en: Following domain-specific RL, we consolidate the divergent expert capabilities into a unified student model, initialized from the mid-train checkpoint. In this phase, the expert models generate high-quality trajectories using a prompt distribution shared with the first-stage SFT corpus, offering a more stable and efficient alternative to direct RL integration. This approach employs rejection sampling to eliminate undesirable patterns such as language mixing or overthinking, centralizing expert knowledge into a single student model. By establishing this high-quality foundation, self-distillation significantly reduces the optimization burden on subsequent RL stages.
items.zh: 在领域特定RL之后，我们将不同的专家能力整合到一个统一的student模型中，该模型从中期训练检查点初始化。在此阶段，专家模型使用与第一阶段SFT语料库共享的提示分布生成高质量轨迹，为直接RL集成提供了更稳定和高效的替代方案。该方法采用拒绝采样来消除不良模式，如语言混合或过度思考，将专家知识集中到单个student模型中。通过建立这一高质量基础，自蒸馏显著减轻了后续RL阶段的优化负担。

items.en: The Muon optimizer [jordan2024muon] is employed with a 3%3\% warmup and a cosine decay from 1.0×10−51.0\times 10^{-5} to 5.0×10−65.0\times 10^{-6}. We freeze the MoE router weights and disable the EP-group balance loss similar to mid-training. The SFT training is executed with an MTP loss weight of 0.1, a global batch size of 32, and a global sequence length of 128​k128\text{k}. Regarding Rotary Position Embeddings (RoPE) [su2024roformer], we maintain θS​W​A=10,000\theta_{SWA}=10,000 and adjust θF​u​l​l=5,000,000\theta_{Full}=5,000,000 to accommodate the 128k context length [xiong2024effective].
items.zh: 采用Muon优化器[jordan2024muon]，预热3%，学习率从1.0×10⁻⁵余弦衰减到5.0×10⁻⁶。我们冻结MoE路由器权重并禁用EP组平衡损失，类似于中期训练。SFT训练使用MTP损失权重0.1，全局批量大小32，全局序列长度128k。关于旋转位置嵌入（RoPE）[su2024roformer]，我们保持θ_SWA=10,000，并调整θ_Full=5,000,000以适应128k上下文长度[xiong2024effective]。

items.en: In RL for LLMs, we optimize a policy πθ\pi_{\theta} to maximize terminal rewards over trajectories τ=(s0,a0,…,sT)\tau=(s_{0},a_{0},\dots,s_{T}), where ata_{t} denotes the token generated at state sts_{t}. For reasoning tasks, however, this process faces severe instability arising from high gradient variance, further amplified by extremely long horizons and model scale (Figure 5 (2)). This variance primarily from infrastructure divergence between high-throughput inference engines and training frameworks, as well as the off-policy misalignment inherent to iterative updates. In such settings, importance sampling is inherently unstable, as minor token-level probability shifts compound into noisy gradients that impede convergence.
items.zh: 在LLM的RL中，我们优化策略π_θ以最大化轨迹τ=(s₀,a₀,…,s_T)上的终端奖励，其中a_t表示在状态s_t生成的token。然而，对于推理任务，该过程面临由高梯度方差引起的严重不稳定性，这种方差因极长序列和模型规模而进一步放大（图5（2））。这种方差主要来自高吞吐推理引擎和训练框架之间的基础设施差异，以及迭代更新固有的离策略不对齐。在此类设置中，重要性采样本质上不稳定，因为微小的token级概率偏移会累积成噪声梯度，阻碍收敛。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Scalability comparison between MIS-PO and PPO on our internal model. (1) Efficiency: MIS-PO demonstrates superior sample efficiency, achieving higher reward plateaus with an accelerated convergence trend. (2) Stability: MIS-PO significantly stabilizes training dynamics by suppressing gradient noise and eliminating the large spikes in the policy gradient norm. (3) Exploration Persistence: MIS-PO exhibits slower entropy decay, enabling a better exploration–exploitation balance.
items.capZh: 图5：MIS-PO与PPO在我们内部模型上的可扩展性比较。（1）效率：MIS-PO展现出优越的样本效率，以加速的收敛趋势达到更高的奖励平台。（2）稳定性：MIS-PO通过抑制梯度噪声并消除策略梯度范数中的大尖峰，显著稳定了训练动态。（3）探索持久性：MIS-PO表现出更慢的熵衰减，实现了更好的探索-利用平衡。

items.en: To address these stability challenges, we propose MIS-PO, a method inspired by Metropolis Independence Sampling (MIS) [metropolis1953equation, hastings1970monte]. We treat the inference policy as a proposal distribution and the training policy as the target, restricting updates to samples that remain sufficiently close to the target distribution. Unlike importance sampling, which scales gradients by bounded ratios and often suffers from high variance, MIS-PO applies binary masking to filter off-distribution samples and treats retained trajectories as effectively on-policy, resulting in significantly reduced gradient variance and stable optimization.
items.zh: 为了解决这些稳定性挑战，我们提出MIS-PO，一种受Metropolis独立采样（MIS）启发的方法[metropolis1953equation, hastings1970monte]。我们将推理策略视为提议分布，训练策略视为目标分布，限制更新仅针对与目标分布足够接近的样本。与重要性采样（通过有界比率缩放梯度且常遭受高方差）不同，MIS-PO应用二元掩码过滤离分布样本，并将保留的轨迹视为有效在策略，从而显著降低梯度方差并实现稳定优化。

items.en: Formally, we define a binary indicator function 𝕀​(x)=𝟙​[ρmin≤x≤ρmax]\mathbb{I}(x)=\mathbb{1}[\rho_{\min}\leq x\leq\rho_{\max}] and apply it at two distinct granularities. At the token level, the function filters the probability ratio xt=πθold​(at|st)/πθvllm​(at|st)x_{t}=\pi_{\theta_{\text{old}}}(a_{t}|s_{t})/\pi_{\theta_{\text{vllm}}}(a_{t}|s_{t}) to suppress localized mismatches between the training and inference policies [yao2025offpolicy]. At the trajectory level, we apply the same indicator to the geometric mean ratio ρ¯​(τ)=(∏txt)1T\bar{\rho}(\tau)=(\prod_{t}x_{t})^{\frac{1}{T}}, effectively discarding entire trajectories that have drifted significantly from the target distribution. The reformulated actor loss replaces continuous importance weights with these dual-level discrete masks:
items.zh: 形式上，我们定义一个二元指示函数𝕀(x)=𝟙[ρ_min≤x≤ρ_max]，并在两个不同粒度上应用它。在token级，该函数过滤概率比x_t=π_θ_old(a_t|s_t)/π_θ_vllm(a_t|s_t)，以抑制训练和推理策略之间的局部不匹配[yao2025offpolicy]。在轨迹级，我们将相同的指示函数应用于几何平均比ρ̄(τ)=(∏_t x_t)^(1/T)，有效丢弃那些与目标分布显著偏离的整个轨迹。重新表述的actor损失用这些双级离散掩码替换连续重要性权重：

items.en: By treating valid samples as effectively on-policy, this objective substantially reduces gradient variance for long-horizon reasoning tasks under a trust-region constraint. Figure 5 presents an ablation study over approximately 5,000 training steps, where MIS-PO exhibits significantly lower noise in the actor gradient norm than PPO, indicating improved scalability. More ablations are shown in Appendix D.2.3.
items.zh: 通过将有效样本视为有效在策略，该目标在信任区域约束下显著降低了长程推理任务的梯度方差。图5展示了约5000训练步的消融研究，其中MIS-PO的actor梯度范数噪声显著低于PPO，表明可扩展性提升。更多消融见附录D.2.3。

items.en: To further stabilize training dynamics, we employ several techniques: Truncation-Aware Value Bootstrapping [pardo2022timelimitsreinforcementlearning] to correct the ambitious reward bias introduced by context-length truncation and Routing Confidence monitoring to predict instability specific to MoE architectures.
items.zh: 为了进一步稳定训练动态，我们采用了几种技术：截断感知值引导[pardo2022timelimitsreinforcementlearning]以纠正由上下文长度截断引入的乐观奖励偏差，以及路由置信度监控以预测MoE架构特有的不稳定性。

items.en: Assigning zero rewards to context-truncated trajectories conflates truncation with task failure. This ambiguity penalizes long-chain reasoning by failing to distinguish between incomplete and incorrect outcomes. To address this, we replace the zero reward with a bootstrapped value estimate of the final state, effectively treating truncation as a horizon interruption rather than a terminal failure. The modified reward for trajectory τi\tau_{i} is defined as:
items.zh: 将上下文截断轨迹分配零奖励会将截断与任务失败混为一谈。这种模糊性通过未能区分不完整和错误结果而惩罚了长链推理。为了解决这个问题，我们将零奖励替换为最终状态的自举值估计，有效将截断视为水平中断而非终端失败。轨迹τ_i的修改后奖励定义为：

items.en: Empirically, this truncation-aware value bootstrapping stabilizes training even at truncation rates as high as 20%, preventing the reward degradation typically triggered by incomplete trajectories [deepscaler2025, yu2025dapo]. Ablation studies confirm that this technique is particularly beneficial for competition-level benchmarks, where long-horizon reasoning makes truncation effects most prevalent.
items.zh: 经验上，这种截断感知值引导在截断率高达20%时仍能稳定训练，防止通常由不完整轨迹触发的奖励退化[deepscaler2025, yu2025dapo]。消融研究证实，该技术对竞赛级基准特别有益，因为长程推理使截断效应最为普遍。

items.en: Recent studies [zheng2025group, ma2025stabilizing] bridge RL stability with MoE routing consistency. Building on this, we propose the Routing Confidence (Σk\Sigma_{k}) as a proxy for stability, which is the average probability mass of activated experts. Low Σk\Sigma_{k} implies high routing uncertainty, which amplifies the training-inference mismatch. Through preliminary experiments, we identify a distinct stability phase transition: models with low routing confidence are brittle and require extreme stabilization (e.g., Router Replay [zheng2025group, ma2025stabilizing, deepseekai2024deepseekv32], strict on-policy updates [hu2025openreasonerzero]). In contrast, models with high routing confidence maintain robustness, enabling off-policy training without complex interventions.
items.zh: 近期研究 [zheng2025group, ma2025stabilizing] 将强化学习稳定性与MoE路由一致性联系起来。在此基础上，我们提出路由置信度（Σk\Sigma_{k}）作为稳定性的代理指标，即激活专家的平均概率质量。低 Σk\Sigma_{k} 意味着高路由不确定性，这会放大训练-推理不匹配。通过初步实验，我们识别出一个明显的稳定性相变：低路由置信度的模型脆弱，需要极端的稳定化措施（例如，Router Replay [zheng2025group, ma2025stabilizing, deepseekai2024deepseekv32]、严格的在策略更新 [hu2025openreasonerzero]）。相比之下，高路由置信度的模型保持鲁棒性，使得无需复杂干预的离策略训练成为可能。

items.en: To provide a holistic view of our method, we illustrate the RL with verifiable rewards (RLVR) training dynamics and downstream evaluation improvements of Step 3.5 Flash in Figure 6. The steady rise in training rewards suggests a stable and effective learning process. Furthermore, Step 3.5 Flash achieves consistent performance gains across diverse evaluation benchmarks. Specifically, we observe substantial improvements of +3.2% on IMO-AnswerBench [luong2025towards], +6.1% on CF-Div2-Stepfun-cpp (Appendix 8: our custom CodeForces222https://codeforces.com/ Div.2 Benchmark), +10.6% on ARC-AGI-1 [chollet2019measure], and +3.4% on HLEtext\text{HLE}_{\text{text}} [phan2025humanitysexam].
items.zh: 为了全面展示我们的方法，我们在图6中展示了Step 3.5 Flash的带可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）训练动态和下游评估改进。训练奖励的稳步上升表明学习过程稳定且有效。此外，Step 3.5 Flash在多个评估基准上取得了一致的性能提升。具体而言，我们在IMO-AnswerBench [luong2025towards]上观察到+3.2%的显著改进，在CF-Div2-Stepfun-cpp（附录8：我们自定义的CodeForces222https://codeforces.com/ Div.2基准）上改进+6.1%，在ARC-AGI-1 [chollet2019measure]上改进+10.6%，在HLEtext\text{HLE}_{\text{text}} [phan2025humanitysexam]上改进+3.4%。

items.capEn: Figure 6: RL training dynamics and cross-domain improvements of Step 3.5 Flash. RL drives steady reward growth (left) and delivers consistent accuracy boosts across multiple benchmarks (right).
items.capZh: 图6：Step 3.5 Flash的RL训练动态和跨领域改进。RL驱动奖励稳步增长（左），并在多个基准上带来一致的准确率提升（右）。

items.en: We decouple the RL framework into RL with verifiable rewards (RLVR [grporlvr]) and RL with non-verifiable rewards (e.g., RLHF [openairlhf] ), each supported by a distinct reward tailored to its supervision characteristics.
items.zh: 我们将RL框架解耦为带可验证奖励的RL（RLVR [grporlvr]）和带不可验证奖励的RL（例如，基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF） [openairlhf]），每种都有针对其监督特征的独特奖励支持。

items.en: For RLVR, each prompt is paired with a task-specific verifier that outputs a reward. The rule-based checkers are used for logic, instruction following, and code, while model-based verifiers are employed for STEM tasks. In ablation studies over 450 RL training steps on our internal model, using model-based verifiers for STEM tasks outperforms direct vanilla math-verify by an average of 2.0%; additional details are provided in Appendix D.2.2.
items.zh: 对于RLVR，每个提示都配有一个特定任务的验证器，输出奖励。基于规则的检查器用于逻辑、指令遵循和代码，而基于模型的验证器用于STEM任务。在我们内部模型上超过450步RL训练的消融研究中，使用基于模型的验证器处理STEM任务比直接使用普通数学验证平均提升2.0%；更多细节见附录D.2.2。

items.en: We address non-verifiable tasks using a pairwise generative reward model (GenRM [genrm]) that benchmarks responses against a fixed reference. GenRM is a reasoning model that outputs a confidence score indicating the likelihood of a response winning. This score is subsequently converted into a Bradley–Terry win rate [bradley1952rank] to serve as the reward signal. Length control is modeled within GenRM as a confidence score penalty and propagated to the win-rate reward, effectively suppressing excessive length growth during RL training. We further ensure robustness by assigning zero reward to responses with fabricated citations, overconfident claims, or language inconsistencies.
items.zh: 我们使用成对生成式奖励模型（GenRM [genrm]）处理不可验证任务，该模型将响应与固定参考进行基准比较。GenRM是一个推理模型，输出置信度分数，指示响应获胜的可能性。该分数随后转换为Bradley–Terry胜率 [bradley1952rank] 作为奖励信号。长度控制被建模为GenRM中的置信度分数惩罚，并传播到胜率奖励，从而有效抑制RL训练期间长度的过度增长。我们通过将零奖励分配给包含虚构引用、过度自信声明或语言不一致的响应，进一步确保鲁棒性。

items.en: Search tasks are evaluated using an LLM based on entity-matching scores. For report generation, a rubric-based LLM judge evaluates the research query, rubric specifications, and candidate reports, producing ternary judgments (satisfied, partially satisfied, unsatisfied) [hu2025stepdeepresearchtechnicalreport]. As the intermediate category often misaligns with expert preferences, we map the outputs to asymmetric binary rewards, yielding clearer learning signals and faster convergence toward expert-aligned behaviors.
items.zh: 搜索任务使用基于实体匹配分数的LLM进行评估。对于报告生成，基于评分标准的LLM评判器评估研究查询、评分标准规范和候选报告，产生三元判断（满足、部分满足、不满足）[hu2025stepdeepresearchtechnicalreport]。由于中间类别通常与专家偏好不一致，我们将输出映射为非对称二元奖励，从而产生更清晰的学习信号并更快收敛到专家对齐的行为。

items.en: We initialize the GenRM by fine-tuning our SFT model with RM-specific prompts. For RL training, we use curated pairwise preference data with a logsigmoid loss similar to the scalar reward model formulation. To improve the robustness of GenRM, we penalize responses exhibiting spurious reasoning (i.e., correct preference derived from flawed logic) by integrating MetaRM, an additional verifier that reduces the training reward when such patterns are detected. In ablation studies spanning 200 RL training steps on our internal model, MetaRM-augmented GenRM outperforms vanilla GenRM by 0.5% - 3% on every benchmark.
items.zh: 我们通过使用RM特定提示微调我们的SFT模型来初始化GenRM。对于RL训练，我们使用与标量奖励模型公式类似的logsigmoid损失，处理精心整理的成对偏好数据。为了提高GenRM的鲁棒性，我们通过集成MetaRM（一个额外的验证器，在检测到虚假推理模式时降低训练奖励）来惩罚表现出虚假推理（即从有缺陷逻辑中得出正确偏好）的响应。在我们内部模型上跨越200步RL训练的消融研究中，MetaRM增强的GenRM在每个基准上均优于普通GenRM 0.5%至3%。

items.en: For rollout, we set both the sampling temperature and top-pp to 1.0 with a maximum sequence length of 128k tokens. Per generation, we sample 256 unique prompts with 16 responses each for reasoning tasks, 512 unique prompts with 8 responses each for human preference tasks, and 128 unique prompts with 8 responses each for tool-use tasks. After rollout, completed samples are partitioned into mini-batches and used for training over a single epoch, with 4 mini-batches for the actor and 12 mini-batches for the critic. Optimization is performed using the Muon optimizer with a weight decay of 0.1. The actor is trained with a learning rate of 2×10−62\times 10^{-6} and 20 warmup steps, while the critic uses a learning rate of 5×10−65\times 10^{-6} with 50 warmup steps. Following ORZ [hu2025openreasonerzero], we set both γ\gamma and λ\lambda to 1. We further adopt an unbiased KL loss [liu2025deepseek] with a coefficient of 0.001 in the final stage. For Equation (2), the token-level and trajectory-level masking bounds are set to [0.5,2][0.5,2] and [0.996,1.001][0.996,1.001], respectively.
items.zh: 对于rollout，我们将采样温度和top-p均设为1.0，最大序列长度为128k个token。每次生成，我们为推理任务采样256个独特提示，每个提示16个响应；为人类偏好任务采样512个独特提示，每个提示8个响应；为工具使用任务采样128个独特提示，每个提示8个响应。Rollout完成后，完成的样本被划分为小批量，并在一个epoch内用于训练，其中actor使用4个小批量，critic使用12个小批量。优化使用Muon优化器，权重衰减为0.1。Actor的学习率为2×10−62\times 10^{-6}，预热步数为20；Critic的学习率为5×10−65\times 10^{-6}，预热步数为50。遵循ORZ [hu2025openreasonerzero]，我们将γ\gamma和λ\lambda均设为1。我们进一步采用无偏KL损失 [liu2025deepseek]，系数为0.001，在最后阶段使用。对于公式(2)，token级和轨迹级掩码边界分别设为[0.5,2][0.5,2]和[0.996,1.001][0.996,1.001]。

items.en: We construct a diverse and difficulty-balanced prompt pool by aggregating open-source data, synthetic generations, and user trajectories. A unified synthesis and curation pipeline is applied, combining strict global filtering with domain-specific refinement to maximize reasoning density. Data quality is ensured through a hybrid of rule-based heuristics and model-based fidelity checks. The resulting dataset contains 871k samples (7.23B tokens), with detailed statistics summarized in Table 3.
items.zh: 我们通过聚合开源数据、合成生成和用户轨迹，构建了一个多样且难度平衡的提示池。应用统一的合成和整理流程，结合严格的全局过滤和领域特定优化，以最大化推理密度。通过基于规则的启发式和基于模型的保真度检查的混合方法确保数据质量。最终数据集包含871k个样本（7.23B个token），详细统计信息见表3。

items.en: Our training corpus aggregates community prompts, expert responses, and synthetic data from diverse open-source, including Mathematics [li2024numinamath, albalak2025bigmath, mitra2024orcamath, aslawliet2024olympiads, aslawliet2024cnk12, openr12025math220k, deepmath2025deepmath103k, yu2025dapoopensourcellmreinforcement, hu2025openreasonerzero, guha2025openthoughts, muennighoff2025s1simpletesttimescaling, ji2025amthinkingv1advancingfrontierreasoning, limo2025lessismore], Coding [li2023tacotopicsalgorithmiccode, deepcoder2025, wang2025codecontestshighqualitytestcase], and Science and Open-ended QA [li2023camel, bercovich2025llamanemotronefficientreasoningmodels, fan2025megascience, zhao2024wildchat]. To maximize reasoning density, we employ a unified pipeline that couples strict global filtering with domain-specific refinement, enforcing quality via a hybrid of rule-based heuristics and model-based fidelity checks. Specifically, in mathematics, we ensure numerical stability through specialist-guided rejection sampling and synthetic large-number arithmetic. For programming, we prioritize offline executability by selecting rigorous algorithmic challenges while strictly purging RAG-related hallucinations. In particular, we mitigate the model’s tendency to falsely claim access to external search engines or pretend to retrieve online solutions. Furthermore, we restrict scientific data to unambiguous questions with unique, determinable solutions.
items.zh: 我们的训练语料聚合了来自多个开源领域的社区提示、专家响应和合成数据，包括数学 [li2024numinamath, albalak2025bigmath, mitra2024orcamath, aslawliet2024olympiads, aslawliet2024cnk12, openr12025math220k, deepmath2025deepmath103k, yu2025dapoopensourcellmreinforcement, hu2025openreasonerzero, guha2025openthoughts, muennighoff2025s1simpletesttimescaling, ji2025amthinkingv1advancingfrontierreasoning, limo2025lessismore]、编程 [li2023tacotopicsalgorithmiccode, deepcoder2025, wang2025codecontestshighqualitytestcase] 以及科学和开放域问答 [li2023camel, bercovich2025llamanemotronefficientreasoningmodels, fan2025megascience, zhao2024wildchat]。为了最大化推理密度，我们采用统一的流程，结合严格的全局过滤和领域特定优化，通过基于规则的启发式和基于模型的保真度检查的混合方法确保质量。具体而言，在数学中，我们通过专家指导的拒绝采样和合成大数算术确保数值稳定性。对于编程，我们优先选择严格的算法挑战，同时严格清除与RAG相关的幻觉，从而优先考虑离线可执行性。特别是，我们减轻了模型错误声称访问外部搜索引擎或假装检索在线解决方案的倾向。此外，我们将科学数据限制为具有唯一、可确定答案的明确问题。

items.en: To enable generalization across practical scenarios, we expand open-source checkers333https://github.com/allenai/open-instruct/tree/main/open_instruct/IFEvalG and augment samples with several real-world constraints. In parallel, we collect general prompts from open-source, synthetic, and user trajectories to form a diverse, difficulty-balanced pool. This process yields a high-fidelity dataset comprising millions of samples at the billion-token scale.
items.zh: 为了实现在实际场景中的泛化，我们扩展了开源检查器333https://github.com/allenai/open-instruct/tree/main/open_instruct/IFEvalG，并增加了几个真实世界约束的样本。同时，我们从开源、合成和用户轨迹中收集通用提示，形成一个多样且难度平衡的池。这个过程产生了一个包含数百万样本、数十亿token规模的高保真数据集。
