items.en: We propose an execution-driven data generation framework for learning reliable tool-use behaviors in intelligent agents, addressing key limitations of existing synthetic pipelines such as data inconsistency, lack of verifiability, and model hallucinations. Instead of relying on random exploration [liu2025webexplorer, li2025websailor] or model-based simulation [kimi_k2, li2025simulating], our approach decomposes tool-use behavior into atomic intents and models them using a finite state machine (FSM), explicitly separating abstract tool-call logic from parameterized execution constraints. Data is generated through a sample–execute–verify loop with rejection sampling, where all candidate trajectories are executed in real environments and validated by deterministic feedback, ensuring fidelity and eliminating hallucinated behaviors. By compositionally combining atomic intents, the framework supports scalable generation of complex, controllable tool-use scenarios. Using this paradigm, we construct over 100K high-quality trajectories totaling billions of tokens, providing precise supervision for tool-based planning, reasoning, and execution.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种执行驱动的数据生成框架，用于学习智能体中可靠的工具使用行为，解决了现有合成流程的关键局限性，如数据不一致、缺乏可验证性和模型幻觉。我们的方法不依赖随机探索 [liu2025webexplorer, li2025websailor] 或基于模型的模拟 [kimi_k2, li2025simulating]，而是将工具使用行为分解为原子意图，并使用有限状态机（FSM）进行建模，明确分离抽象工具调用逻辑与参数化执行约束。数据通过样本-执行-验证循环和拒绝采样生成，所有候选轨迹在真实环境中执行并由确定性反馈验证，确保保真度并消除幻觉行为。通过组合原子意图，该框架支持可扩展地生成复杂、可控的工具使用场景。使用这种范式，我们构建了超过10万条高质量轨迹，总计数十亿token，为基于工具的计划、推理和执行提供了精确监督。

items.en: Code agents can self-improve through a closed-loop intervention between verifiable environment construction and solution generation, where executable feedback continuously refines both capabilities. We treat environment construction as a first-class capability alongside bug fixing and feature implementation, synthesizing it under verifiable reward signals. To this end, we develop a specialized agentic pipeline evolved from the SWE-factory [guo2026swefactoryautomatedfactoryissue] framework, incorporating a cross-task memory pool that retrieves historical build successes as few-shot demonstrations and a loop-detection mechanism to prevent redundant exploration. This pipeline achieves a 40% environment-building success rate, forming a positive feedback loop for model self-evolution through dense supervision from construction trajectories, including shell commands and error recovery. To further improve signal quality, we normalize environment construction trajectories by abstracting and masking transient failures and redundant execution patterns that do not contribute to the final resolution. The bootstrapped environments function as dynamic testbeds, leveraging execution feedback and unit tests to generate high-quality synthetic data and reward signals for continuous alignment. Empirically, we observe a bidirectional transfer: construction expertise accelerates coding performance, while coding within these environments further improves construction accuracy, as shown in DockSmith [zhang2026docksmithscalingreliablecoding]. Leveraging this evolution pipeline, we curate 50k verified environments spanning over 15k GitHub repositories and more than 20 programming languages. This diverse collection captures a broad spectrum of real-world scenarios, providing a robust foundation for training generalist code agents. Furthermore, we incorporate several prominent open-source environments, including SWE-smith [yang2025swe], SWE-Gym [pan2024training], R2E-Gym [jain2025r2e], SWE-rebench [badertdinov2025swe], and SETA [seta].
items.zh: 代码智能体可以通过可验证环境构建和解决方案生成之间的闭环干预实现自我改进，其中可执行反馈不断优化两种能力。我们将环境构建视为与错误修复和功能实现同等重要的首要能力，并在可验证奖励信号下进行合成。为此，我们开发了一个专门的智能体式流程，该流程从SWE-factory [guo2026swefactoryautomatedfactoryissue] 框架演变而来，集成了跨任务记忆池（检索历史构建成功作为少样本示例）和循环检测机制（防止冗余探索）。该流程实现了40%的环境构建成功率，通过构建轨迹（包括shell命令和错误恢复）的密集监督，形成模型自我进化的正反馈循环。为了进一步提高信号质量，我们通过抽象和掩码处理不贡献于最终解决的瞬时故障和冗余执行模式，对环境构建轨迹进行归一化。自举环境作为动态测试平台，利用执行反馈和单元测试生成高质量合成数据和奖励信号，用于持续对齐。经验上，我们观察到双向迁移：构建专业知识加速了编码性能，而在这些环境中编码进一步提高了构建准确性，如DockSmith [zhang2026docksmithscalingreliablecoding] 所示。利用这一进化流程，我们整理了5万个经过验证的环境，涵盖超过1.5万个GitHub仓库和20多种编程语言。这个多样化的集合捕获了广泛的真实世界场景，为训练通用代码智能体提供了坚实基础。此外，我们整合了几个著名的开源环境，包括SWE-smith [yang2025swe]、SWE-Gym [pan2024training]、R2E-Gym [jain2025r2e]、SWE-rebench [badertdinov2025swe] 和SETA [seta]。

items.en: To facilitate advanced information-seeking, our pipeline integrates graph-based and multi-document synthesis to enforce multi-hop reasoning. By performing topological expansions on knowledge graphs (e.g., Wikidata5m [wang2021kepler]) and simulating cross-website browsing trajectories, we generate data that reflects real-world research complexity. Crucially, to guarantee the necessity of external retrieval, we validate generated queries against DeepSeek-R1 [Guo_2025], systematically excluding instances solvable by this strong reasoning model without tool interaction. The resulting trajectories are refined through a structured report generation pipeline [hu2025stepdeepresearchtechnicalreport] that enforces rigorous instruction compliance and structural integrity. Specifically, we enforce strict adherence to preset research plans, discarding any trajectories that deviate from the structure. Subsequently, valid outputs undergo iterative cleaning via model-based judgers and heuristic rules to resolve fine-grained issues such as informal writing, temporal hallucinations, and mixed-language artifacts. This end-to-end approach achieves industry-leading performance on the ResearchRubrics [sharma2025researchrubrics] benchmark.
items.zh: 为了促进高级信息搜索，我们的流程集成了基于图和多文档的合成，以强制进行多跳推理。通过对知识图谱（例如，Wikidata5m [wang2021kepler]）进行拓扑扩展并模拟跨网站浏览轨迹，我们生成反映真实研究复杂性的数据。关键的是，为了保证外部检索的必要性，我们针对DeepSeek-R1 [Guo_2025] 验证生成的查询，系统性地排除那些无需工具交互即可由该强推理模型解决的实例。生成的轨迹通过结构化报告生成流程 [hu2025stepdeepresearchtechnicalreport] 进行优化，该流程强制执行严格的指令遵循和结构完整性。具体而言，我们强制严格遵守预设的研究计划，丢弃任何偏离结构的轨迹。随后，有效输出通过基于模型的评判器和启发式规则进行迭代清理，以解决细粒度问题，如非正式写作、时间幻觉和混合语言伪影。这种端到端方法在ResearchRubrics [sharma2025researchrubrics] 基准上取得了行业领先的性能。

items.en: To effectively integrate reasoning and agentic capabilities into a single foundation model, it is crucial to determine the appropriate templates for the thinking process and tool usage. Regarding the reasoning template, we evaluate three management strategies. The approach of discarding reasoning history at every turn [Guo_2025], while incentivizing independent generation, leads to task failure in long-horizon tasks(e.g., coding sessions exceeding 100 turns). Conversely, retaining the full reasoning history incurs prohibitive context consumption, which rapidly saturates the model’s capacity and blocks subsequent tool invocations. To resolve this, we adopt a selective retention strategy: preserving reasoning traces exclusively for the tool-use trajectory triggered by the most recent user instruction. This design achieves an optimal trade-off between reasoning coherence and context efficiency, a practice aligned with recent frontier models [yang2025qwen3technicalreport, liu2025deepseek]. Regarding the tool-use template, we compared the prevalent JSON and XML formats. The rigid syntax of JSON, including escape sequences and delimiters, frequently induces parsing errors in small, under-trained models. In contrast, the XML format allows for flat string output with significantly lower grammatical overhead. Therefore, we select the XML format to ensure robustness in complex, real-world agentic coding scenarios.
items.zh: 为了有效地将推理和智能体能力整合到单个基础模型中，确定思考过程和工具使用的适当模板至关重要。关于推理模板，我们评估了三种管理策略。每次丢弃推理历史的方法 [Guo_2025] 虽然鼓励独立生成，但在长周期任务（例如，超过100轮的编码会话）中会导致任务失败。相反，保留完整推理历史会消耗过多的上下文，迅速饱和模型容量并阻塞后续工具调用。为了解决这个问题，我们采用选择性保留策略：仅保留最近用户指令触发的工具使用轨迹的推理痕迹。这种设计在推理连贯性和上下文效率之间实现了最优权衡，这一做法与最近的前沿模型 [yang2025qwen3technicalreport, liu2025deepseek] 一致。关于工具使用模板，我们比较了流行的JSON和XML格式。JSON的严格语法，包括转义序列和分隔符，经常在小型、训练不足的模型中引发解析错误。相比之下，XML格式允许平面字符串输出，语法开销显著降低。因此，我们选择XML格式以确保在复杂的真实世界智能体编码场景中的鲁棒性。

items.en: Our integrated architecture focuses on scalable session management and cross-framework generalization to facilitate high-throughput agentic coding. Central to this is a proprietary Session-Router that orchestrates container lifecycles via Kubernetes and ensures interaction consistency through Tmux. This architecture supports thousands of concurrent environments with seamless state persistence, eliminating the need for manual, scaffold-specific Docker configurations. To ensure high generalization across diverse agentic workflows, we trained the model to adapt to a wide spectrum of interaction frameworks, ranging from academic standards (e.g., OpenHands [wang2024openhands], SWE-agent [yang2024swe], and Terminus-2 [terminalbench2025]) to enterprise grade protocols (e.g., Kilocode [kilocode], Roocode [roocode], and ClaudeCode [claudecode]). By exposing the model to these varied interaction paradigms during training, we effectively prevent it from overfitting to specific pipeline patterns, ensuring it remains robust regardless of the underlying execution environment.
items.zh: 我们的集成架构专注于可扩展的会话管理和跨框架泛化，以促进高吞吐量的智能体编码。其核心是专有的Session-Router，它通过Kubernetes编排容器生命周期，并通过Tmux确保交互一致性。该架构支持数千个并发环境，具有无缝状态持久性，无需手动、特定于脚手架的Docker配置。为了确保跨不同智能体工作流的高泛化性，我们训练模型适应广泛的交互框架，从学术标准（例如，OpenHands [wang2024openhands]、SWE-agent [yang2024swe] 和Terminus-2 [terminalbench2025]）到企业级协议（例如，Kilocode [kilocode]、Roocode [roocode] 和ClaudeCode [claudecode]）。通过在训练期间让模型接触这些多样的交互范式，我们有效防止其过拟合到特定流程模式，确保其无论底层执行环境如何都保持鲁棒。

items.en: We evaluate Step 3.5 Flash on a series of benchmarks, encompassing various capabilities: (1) General language understanding and reasoning, including BBH [suzgun2022challengingbbh], MMLU [hendrycks2020mmlu], MMLU-Redux [gema2024donewithmmlu], MMLU-Pro [wang2024mmlupro], HellaSwag [zellers2019hellaswag], WinoGrande [sakaguchi2019winogrande], GPQA [rein2023gpqa], SuperGPQA [du2025supergpqa], and SimpleQA [openai2024simpleqa]. (2) Mathematics reasoning, including GSM8K [cobbe2021gsm8k] and MATH [hendrycks2021math]. (3) Coding, including HumanEval [chen2021evaluatinglargelanguagemodels], MBPP [austin2021programsynthesislargelanguage], HumanEval+, MBPP+ [liu2023evalplus] and MultiPL-E [cassano2022multipl]. (4) Chinese understanding, including C-Eval [huang2023ceval], CMMLU [li2023cmmlu], and C-SimpleQA [he2024chinesesimpleqa].
items.zh: 我们在多个基准上评估Step 3.5 Flash，涵盖各种能力：（1）通用语言理解和推理，包括BBH [suzgun2022challengingbbh]、MMLU [hendrycks2020mmlu]、MMLU-Redux [gema2024donewithmmlu]、MMLU-Pro [wang2024mmlupro]、HellaSwag [zellers2019hellaswag]、WinoGrande [sakaguchi2019winogrande]、GPQA [rein2023gpqa]、SuperGPQA [du2025supergpqa] 和SimpleQA [openai2024simpleqa]。（2）数学推理，包括GSM8K [cobbe2021gsm8k] 和MATH [hendrycks2021math]。（3）编程，包括HumanEval [chen2021evaluatinglargelanguagemodels]、MBPP [austin2021programsynthesislargelanguage]、HumanEval+、MBPP+ [liu2023evalplus] 和MultiPL-E [cassano2022multipl]。（4）中文理解，包括C-Eval [huang2023ceval]、CMMLU [li2023cmmlu] 和C-SimpleQA [he2024chinesesimpleqa]。

items.en: We evaluate Step 3.5 Flash on representative benchmarks, including the reasoning oritend HLE (text subset) [phan2025hle], MMLU-Pro [wang2024mmlupro], GPQA-Diamond [rein2023gpqa], AIME2025 [10.5555/3524938.3525416], HMMT [hmmt25], IMO-AnswerBench [luong2025towards]; the coding related LiveCodeBench-v6 (2024.08-2025.05) [jain2024livecodebench], CF-Div2-Stepfun444https://huggingface.co/datasets/stepfun-ai/CF-Div2-Stepfun, SWE-Bench Verified [swe_verified] and SWE-Bench Multilingual [yang2025swesmith]; the agent series τ2\tau^{2}-Bench [tau2bench2025], Terminal-Bench 2.0 [terminalbench2025], GAIA [mialon2023gaiabenchmarkgeneralai], BrowseComp [wei2025browsecomp], xbench-DeepSearch [chen2025xbench], BrowseComp-zh [zhou2025browsecompzhbenchmarkingwebbrowsing], and ResearchRubrics [sharma2025researchrubrics]; the general related ArenaHard v2 [arenahard2024], IFBench [pyatkin2025generalizing] and MultiChallenge [sirdeshmukh2025multichallengerealisticmultiturnconversation]; and the long-context related LongBench v2 [bai2024longbenchv2], MRCR [vodrahalli2024michelangelo] 555https://huggingface.co/datasets/openai/mrcr, FRAMES [krishna2025fact] and RepoQA [liu2024repoqaevaluatinglongcontext].
items.zh: 我们在代表性基准上评估Step 3.5 Flash，包括推理导向的HLE（文本子集） [phan2025hle]、MMLU-Pro [wang2024mmlupro]、GPQA-Diamond [rein2023gpqa]、AIME2025 [10.5555/3524938.3525416]、HMMT [hmmt25]、IMO-AnswerBench [luong2025towards]；编程相关的LiveCodeBench-v6（2024.08-2025.05） [jain2024livecodebench]、CF-Div2-Stepfun444https://huggingface.co/datasets/stepfun-ai/CF-Div2-Stepfun、SWE-Bench Verified [swe_verified] 和SWE-Bench Multilingual [yang2025swesmith]；智能体系列τ2\tau^{2}-Bench [tau2bench2025]、Terminal-Bench 2.0 [terminalbench2025]、GAIA [mialon2023gaiabenchmarkgeneralai]、BrowseComp [wei2025browsecomp]、xbench-DeepSearch [chen2025xbench]、BrowseComp-zh [zhou2025browsecompzhbenchmarkingwebbrowsing] 和ResearchRubrics [sharma2025researchrubrics]；通用相关的ArenaHard v2 [arenahard2024]、IFBench [pyatkin2025generalizing] 和MultiChallenge [sirdeshmukh2025multichallengerealisticmultiturnconversation]；以及长上下文相关的LongBench v2 [bai2024longbenchv2]、MRCR [vodrahalli2024michelangelo] 555https://huggingface.co/datasets/openai/mrcr、FRAMES [krishna2025fact] 和RepoQA [liu2024repoqaevaluatinglongcontext]。

items.en: We further investigate the test-time scaling properties of Step 3.5 Flash on reasoning, general, and long-context benchmarks by adopting the Parallel Coordinated Reasoning (PaCoRe) paradigm [hu2026pacorelearningscaletesttime]. Leveraging Step 3.5 Flash’s extreme inference efficiency, this approach decouples reasoning capacity from context limitations by launching parallel reasoning trajectories and synthesizing their insights into higher-fidelity solutions via multi round coordination. Specifically, we employ a multi-round PaCoRe trajectory configuration as K→=[4,4,4,4]\vec{K}=[4,4,4,4], yielding significant gains across benchmarks.
items.zh: 我们进一步研究了Step 3.5 Flash在推理、通用和长上下文基准上的测试时缩放特性，采用了并行协调推理（PaCoRe）范式 [hu2026pacorelearningscaletesttime]。利用Step 3.5 Flash极致的推理效率，该方法通过启动并行推理轨迹并通过多轮协调将其见解综合为更高保真度的解决方案，从而将推理能力与上下文限制解耦。具体而言，我们采用多轮PaCoRe轨迹配置 K→=[4,4,4,4]\vec{K}=[4,4,4,4]，在多个基准上取得了显著提升。

items.en: We maintain a maximum sequence length of 256k, using the default decoding configuration with decoding temperature and top-p of 1.0. And we apply YaRN [peng2023yarnefficientcontextwindow] with a scaling factor of 2.0 on top of the original 128k positional embeddings, restricting it to full-attention layers only. We report pass@1 accuracy for all approaches based on average performance of multiple independent generations per problem: 64 for AIME 2025, HMMT 2025 Feb., and HMMT 2025 Nov.; 8 for IMO-AnswerBench, LiveCodeBench, GPQA-Diamond, and MultiChallenge; 1 for HLE and 4 runs for all other benchmarks. More details are provided in Appendix E.2.
items.zh: 我们保持最大序列长度为256k，使用默认解码配置，解码温度和top-p均为1.0。我们在原始128k位置嵌入上应用YaRN [peng2023yarnefficientcontextwindow]，缩放因子为2.0，并仅限制在全注意力层。我们报告所有方法的pass@1准确率，基于每个问题多次独立生成的平均性能：AIME 2025、HMMT 2025 Feb.和HMMT 2025 Nov.为64次；IMO-AnswerBench、LiveCodeBench、GPQA-Diamond和MultiChallenge为8次；HLE为1次，其他所有基准测试为4次。更多细节见附录E.2。

items.en: Step 3.5 Flash achieves frontier-level intelligence but currently requires longer generation trajectories than Gemini 3.0 Pro to reach comparable quality. Next step we will prune and compress the thinking for better efficiency while maintaining the same competitive performance.
items.zh: Step 3.5 Flash实现了前沿级智能，但目前需要比Gemini 3.0 Pro更长的生成轨迹才能达到可比质量。下一步，我们将剪枝和压缩思考过程，以提高效率，同时保持相同的竞争性能。

items.en: We aim to unify generalist versatility with deep domain expertise. To achieve this efficiently, we are advancing variants of on-policy distillation, allowing the model to internalize expert behaviors with higher sample efficiency.
items.zh: 我们旨在将通用多功能性与深度领域专业知识统一起来。为了高效实现这一点，我们正在推进在线策略蒸馏的变体，使模型能够以更高的样本效率内化专家行为。

items.en: While Step 3.5 Flash demonstrates competitive performance on academic agentic benchmarks, the next frontier of agentic AI necessitates the application of RL to intricate, expert-level tasks found in professional work, advanced engineering, and scientific research. Solving these challenges is a prerequisite for deploying agents capable of genuine autonomy.
items.zh: 虽然Step 3.5 Flash在学术智能体基准测试中表现出竞争性能，但智能体式AI的下一个前沿需要将强化学习应用于专业工作、高级工程和科学研究中复杂的专家级任务。解决这些挑战是部署能够真正自主的智能体的先决条件。

items.en: Step 3.5 Flash is tailored for coding and work-centric tasks, but may experience reduced stability during distribution shifts. This typically occurs in highly specialized domains or long-horizon, multi-turn dialogues, where the model may exhibit repetitive reasoning, mixed-language outputs, or inconsistencies in time and identity awareness.
items.zh: Step 3.5 Flash专为编码和工作导向任务而设计，但在分布偏移时可能稳定性降低。这通常发生在高度专业化的领域或长程、多轮对话中，模型可能表现出重复推理、混合语言输出或时间和身份意识不一致。

items.en: Each attention head is assigned a lightweight, input-dependent scalar gate, allowing the model to dynamically modulate information flow across the hybrid layout with negligible computational overhead.
items.zh: 每个注意力头被分配一个轻量级的、输入相关的标量门控，使模型能够以可忽略的计算开销动态调节跨混合布局的信息流。

items.zh: 其中σ(·)是sigmoid函数，𝒘gate是一个可学习向量。

items.en: where exp⁡(−gi)​Zi\exp(-g_{i})Z_{i} acts as an input-dependent sink mass in the softmax normalizer. As shown in Section 2.3, this adaptive formulation consistently outperforms fixed (input-independent) sink tokens.

full.sec: A.2 Speed Benchmark of Attention Enhancements
full.secZh: A.2 注意力增强的速度基准

items.en: We conduct simulations with MTP-3 to evaluate the latency overheads of the two enhancements under an ideal workload. Table 7 presents the relative increment of theoretical FLOPs and latency. Increasing the number of query heads in SWA slightly raises the FLOPs but has less impact on latency. This is due to a query-to-k​vkv ratio of 12, which keeps SWA in the IO-bound region, even when considering MTP-3. For head-wise gating, neither FLOPs nor latency has noticeable difference because of its lightweight.
items.zh: 我们使用MTP-3进行模拟，以评估在理想工作负载下两种增强的延迟开销。表7显示了理论FLOPs和延迟的相对增量。增加SWA中的查询头数量会略微增加FLOPs，但对延迟影响较小。这是因为查询与kv的比率为12，即使考虑MTP-3，SWA仍处于IO受限区域。对于头级门控，由于其轻量级特性，FLOPs和延迟均无明显差异。

items.en: Recent literature [gao2025metadata, allenzhu2024physics, fan2025urlsmetadatadiversityposition] has shown both theoretically and empirically that pre-pending structured metadata to pre-training sequences can improve data efficiency and accelerate convergence: by exposing high-level attributes (e.g., modality, language, domain), metadata provides global cues that reduce uncertainty about the upcoming content and thus makes next-token prediction easier.
items.zh: 近期文献 [gao2025metadata, allenzhu2024physics, fan2025urlsmetadatadiversityposition] 从理论和实验上均表明，在预训练序列前添加结构化元数据可以提高数据效率并加速收敛：通过暴露高级属性（如模态、语言、领域），元数据提供了全局线索，减少了对即将到来内容的不确定性，从而使下一个词预测更容易。

items.en: Motivated by this paradigm, we associate each training example with a metadata string 𝐌\mathbf{M} in a human-readable format, including content type (e.g., Code, Book, Paper, Web), language (e.g., EN, ZH), domain, and source. We then prepend 𝐌\mathbf{M} to the original token sequence 𝐱\mathbf{x}, forming a single training sequence 𝐬=[𝐌;𝐱]\mathbf{s}=[\mathbf{M};\mathbf{x}]. During pre-training, the model is trained to maximize the likelihood of 𝐬\mathbf{s}:
items.zh: 受此范式启发，我们将每个训练样本与一个人类可读格式的元数据字符串𝐌关联，包括内容类型（如代码、书籍、论文、网页）、语言（如EN、ZH）、领域和来源。然后我们将𝐌预置到原始token序列𝐱之前，形成单个训练序列𝐬=[𝐌;𝐱]。在预训练期间，模型被训练以最大化𝐬的似然：

items.en: After an initial phase of approximately 3.8T tokens, we keep 𝐌\mathbf{M} in the context but mask out its positions from the loss while continuing to predict the payload tokens:
items.zh: 在初始阶段（约3.8T tokens）之后，我们将𝐌保留在上下文中，但从损失中屏蔽其位置，同时继续预测有效载荷token：

items.en: We hypothesize that by this stage the model has already learned to effectively use metadata as a conditioning signal. Masking the metadata loss therefore allocates optimization pressure entirely to the payload tokens, while still benefiting from the explicit conditioning on data characteristics.
items.zh: 我们假设，到这一阶段，模型已经学会了有效利用元数据作为条件信号。因此，屏蔽元数据损失将优化压力完全分配给有效载荷token，同时仍然受益于对数据特征的显式条件化。

items.en: We conduct controlled pre-training ablations to isolate the effects of (i) different hybrid attention layout and (ii) sink tokens versus head-wise gated attention.
items.zh: 我们进行受控的预训练消融实验，以隔离（i）不同混合注意力布局和（ii）sink token与头级门控注意力的影响。

items.en: Hybrid attention layout. We adopt a 30B-A3B MoE architecture to evaluate the downstream impact of different hybrid attention layout under a fixed token budget. The training follows a strict, multi-stage pipeline: a 30B-token warmup phase, followed by 1T tokens of main pre-training, a 300B-token cooldown phase, and an additional 100B-token long-context specialization stage—totaling approximately 1.4T tokens. Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is then performed on a 0.1× downsampled dataset. Full training details are provided in Table 9.
items.zh: 混合注意力布局。我们采用30B-A3B MoE架构，在固定token预算下评估不同混合注意力布局的下游影响。训练遵循严格的多阶段流程：30B token的预热阶段，随后是1T token的主预训练、300B token的冷却阶段，以及额外的100B token长上下文专门化阶段——总计约1.4T tokens。然后对0.1倍下采样数据集进行监督微调（SFT）。完整训练细节见表9。

items.en: Gate vs. sink (scaled setting). We pre-train a 100B-A10B MoE model for ∼\sim250B tokens to compare sink tokens and head-wise gating under a larger-scale regime.
items.zh: 门控 vs. 汇合（缩放设置）。我们预训练了一个100B-A10B的MoE模型，训练约250B个token，以在更大规模下比较汇合token和逐头门控。

items.en: Pre-training results of the architectural ablations are presented in Tables 2 and 10. We employ the evaluation protocols detailed in Section 6.1. Specifically, GPQA [rein2023gpqa] is evaluated using 5-shot prompting, while HumanEval [chen2021evaluating] and MBPP [austin2021program] utilize 3-shot prompting.
items.zh: 架构消融的预训练结果见表2和表10。我们采用第6.1节详述的评估协议。具体来说，GPQA [rein2023gpqa] 使用5-shot提示评估，而HumanEval [chen2021evaluating] 和MBPP [austin2021program] 使用3-shot提示。

full.sec: Appendix B Detail Analysis of Localized Activation Blow-up
full.secZh: 附录B 局部激活爆炸的详细分析

items.en: To investigate the root cause of the localized activation blow-up, we analyze the tokens that trigger the largest expert activations across all layers, and identify two distinct large activation patterns: (1) Specific lexical items, such as special tokens and punctuation, commonly elicit large but not dramatic activations, particularly in the shallower layers. This pattern is not recognized as a failure mode by us, as there is no rapid increment and it may serve as an internal mechanism for semantic modeling [sun2024massive, an2025systematic]. Another pattern is that (2) some high-frequency bi-grams trigger extremely large activations on the first token, which represents the failure mode we are investigating. The pattern is triggered by several factors: The frequency of a bi-gram’s occurrence is sufficiently high, and the MoE FFN is fine-grained enough, allowing an expert to specialize in that bi-gram without being regulated by the load balancing mechanism. This specialization serves as a shortcut: once the expert is activated, the output becomes deterministic, and other networks no longer influence the prediction. While finding shortcuts is a reasonable approach to minimizing loss, in a MoE model with a pre-norm architecture [radford2019language, xiong2020layer], there is a straightforward, pathological solution for achieving such deterministic predictions, as outlined next. The model’s final representation is the sum of the outputs from all layers, followed by a RMSNorm. This can be expressed as a combination of the outputs from the experts and the attention layers:
items.zh: 为了研究局部激活爆炸的根本原因，我们分析了在所有层中触发最大专家激活的token，并识别出两种不同的大激活模式：(1) 特定的词汇项，如特殊token和标点符号，通常会引起较大但不剧烈的激活，尤其是在较浅的层中。这种模式不被我们视为失败模式，因为没有快速增加，并且它可能作为语义建模的内部机制 [sun2024massive, an2025systematic]。另一种模式是 (2) 一些高频二元组在第一个token上触发极大的激活，这代表了我们正在研究的失败模式。该模式由几个因素触发：二元组出现的频率足够高，并且MoE FFN足够细粒度，使得专家可以专门处理该二元组而不受负载均衡机制的约束。这种专门化作为一种捷径：一旦专家被激活，输出就变得确定，其他网络不再影响预测。虽然寻找捷径是减少损失的合理方法，但在具有预归一化架构 [radford2019language, xiong2020layer] 的MoE模型中，存在一种直接的病态解决方案来实现这种确定性预测，如下所述。模型的最终表示是所有层输出的总和，随后进行RMSNorm。这可以表示为专家和注意力层输出的组合：

items.en: in outlier experts. It can be achieved only if SiLU​(𝑾gate​𝒙)\text{SiLU}(\boldsymbol{W}_{\text{gate}}\boldsymbol{x}) and 𝑾up​𝒙\boldsymbol{W}_{\text{up}}\boldsymbol{x} are highly aligned and concentrate on a very limited number of dimensions. Consequently, only a limited number of rows from 𝑾up\boldsymbol{W}_{\text{up}} are utilized due to the sparse input. This observation leads us to prefer activation clipping over weight clipping, as activation’s numerical property directly contribute to the blow-up and the sparsity, and activation clipping can promptly address these issues. Besides, activation clipping has negligible negative effects, as well-behaved activations rarely exceed the threshold.
items.zh: 在异常专家中。只有当SiLU(W_gate x)和W_up x高度对齐并集中在非常有限的维度上时，才能实现这一点。因此，由于输入稀疏，只有W_up的有限行被使用。这一观察使我们倾向于激活裁剪而非权重裁剪，因为激活的数值特性直接导致爆炸和稀疏性，并且激活裁剪可以迅速解决这些问题。此外，激活裁剪的负面影响可以忽略不计，因为行为良好的激活很少超过阈值。

items.en: When using the Muon optimizer, gated linear units, such as SwiGLU, are susceptible to logit explosion. This vulnerability arises from similar mechanisms that cause explosion in attention, as reported in [kimi_k2]. For an outlier expert specialized to some specific bi-gram, hidden states routed to it are expected to be closely aligned to its router embedding. We validate this by inputting the router embedding into a outlier expert and directly predicting outputs based on this expert’s output. The predicted distribution aligns with that of the real data and the entire network’s performance. Combined with the overly single training target (to predict the second token in the bi-gram), we argue that gradients w.r.t. the outlier expert’s parameters, 𝑾gate\boldsymbol{W}_{\text{gate}}, 𝑾up\boldsymbol{W}_{\text{up}} and 𝑾down\boldsymbol{W}_{\text{down}}, are not only abnormally low rank (denoted as rr), but also consistently point in a direction that emphasizes the magnitude as analyzed in the first factor, without rotation. Let the update matrices of a parameter matrix 𝑾∈ℝN×N\boldsymbol{W}\in\mathbb{R}^{N\times N} to be
items.zh: 当使用Muon优化器时，门控线性单元（如SwiGLU）容易发生logit爆炸。这种脆弱性源于与注意力中导致爆炸的类似机制，如 [kimi_k2] 所报告。对于专门处理某个特定二元组的异常专家，路由到该专家的隐藏状态预计与其路由器嵌入紧密对齐。我们通过将路由器嵌入输入到异常专家中，并直接基于该专家的输出预测输出来验证这一点。预测的分布与真实数据和整个网络的性能一致。结合过于单一的训练目标（预测二元组中的第二个token），我们认为关于异常专家参数W_gate、W_up和W_down的梯度不仅异常低秩（记为r），而且一致指向强调幅度的方向（如第一个因素所分析），而不旋转。设参数矩阵W∈ℝ^{N×N}的更新矩阵为

items.en: Accumulating updates over optimization steps will rapidly increase the singular value of the low-rank signals, resulting in an explosion of the weight parameter. In the GLU structure, ‖SiLU​(𝑾gate​𝒙)⋅𝑾up​𝒙‖\|\text{SiLU}(\boldsymbol{W}_{\text{gate}}\boldsymbol{x})\cdot\boldsymbol{W}_{\text{up}}\boldsymbol{x}\| squares the spectral norm in our strong alignment case, making the progress more sharp. Additionally, Muon completely eliminates the influence of gradient magnitudes. During the blow-up process, RMSNorm reduces the gradients of large inputs. When using the Adam optimizer, its ϵ\epsilon acts as a threshold to filter out small gradients during the learning rate adaptation, which can hinder the progress. In contrast, Muon consistently and effectively orthogonalizes the gradients, resulting in more aggressive updates.
items.zh: 在优化步骤中累积更新将迅速增加低秩信号的奇异值，导致权重参数爆炸。在GLU结构中，‖SiLU(W_gate x)·W_up x‖在我们强对齐的情况下平方了谱范数，使得进展更加剧烈。此外，Muon完全消除了梯度幅度的影响。在爆炸过程中，RMSNorm减少了较大输入的梯度。当使用Adam优化器时，其epsilon在学习率适应过程中充当阈值以过滤小梯度，这可能阻碍进展。相比之下，Muon一致且有效地正交化梯度，导致更激进的更新。

items.en: Beyond standard web-scale datasets (e.g., CommonCrawl), we develop StepCrawl, an in-house crawling and curation system designed to acquire high-quality and diverse tokens at scale. StepCrawl serves as a primary data source for both high-signal web pages and document-like content (notably PDFs), which frequently contain long-form, high-information-density material.
items.zh: 除了标准的网络规模数据集（如CommonCrawl），我们开发了StepCrawl，一个内部爬取和整理系统，旨在大规模获取高质量和多样化的token。StepCrawl作为高信号网页和文档类内容（尤其是PDF）的主要数据源，这些内容通常包含长形式、高信息密度的材料。

items.en: A key component of StepCrawl is a site and URL selection layer powered by a WebOrganizer-style model [weborganizer]. We adapt the capabilities introduced in WebOrganizer and further fine-tune a version tailored to our pipeline. During crawling, each fetched web page is analyzed by this model, forming a lightweight LM-in-the-loop feedback cycle that (i) filters SEO-driven and other low-utility pages, and (ii) guides crawl-budget allocation by balancing site categories (e.g., preventing disproportionate crawling of tool and e-commerce sites) to preserve corpus diversity and reduce topical skew. In practice, StepCrawl processes on the order of ∼\sim1B pages per day under this quality- and diversity-aware scheduling policy.
items.zh: StepCrawl的一个关键组件是由WebOrganizer风格模型 [weborganizer] 驱动的站点和URL选择层。我们调整了WebOrganizer中引入的能力，并进一步微调了一个适合我们流程的版本。在爬取过程中，每个获取的网页由该模型分析，形成一个轻量级的LM-in-the-loop反馈循环，该循环 (i) 过滤SEO驱动和其他低效用页面，以及 (ii) 通过平衡站点类别（例如，防止不成比例地爬取工具和电子商务站点）来指导爬取预算分配，以保持语料库多样性并减少主题偏差。在实践中，StepCrawl在这种质量和多样性感知的调度策略下每天处理约10亿页面。

items.en: All crawling activities strictly adhere to robots.txt and site-specific access policies. The collected content is subsequently passed through a multi-stage filtering process (quality scoring, deduplication, and sanitization), ensuring that only high-utility and policy-compliant data are retained for training.
items.zh: 所有爬取活动严格遵守robots.txt和特定站点的访问策略。收集的内容随后经过多阶段过滤流程（质量评分、去重和清理），确保只有高效用和符合策略的数据被保留用于训练。

items.en: Inspired by Nemotron-CC [su2025nemotroncctransformingcommoncrawl]-style quality bucketing, we divide the internal web data into quality tiers and sample preferentially from higher tiers. We label each document using an ensemble of six lightweight scorers/classifiers and ensemble the tier assignments across scorers. In the final recipe, we keep High/Medium-High/Medium and discard Medium-Low/Low, which substantially improves token efficiency in ablations. For book and paper corpora, we apply the same stratification but restrict retention to High/Medium-High tiers exclusively during the annealing stage to maximize diversity. In addition to the shared six-scorer ensemble, we integrate additional domain-specific filters targeting STEM and knowledge-dense content, and down-sample overrepresented domains to ensure balanced representation.
items.zh: 受 Nemotron-CC [su2025nemotroncctransformingcommoncrawl] 风格的质量分桶启发，我们将内部网络数据划分为质量层级，并优先从较高层级采样。我们使用六个轻量级评分器/分类器的集成对每个文档进行标注，并跨评分器集成层级分配。在最终方案中，我们保留高/中高/中层级，丢弃中低/低层级，这在大幅消融实验中提高了词元效率。对于书籍和论文语料库，我们应用相同的分层，但在退火阶段仅限制保留高/中高层级以最大化多样性。除了共享的六评分器集成外，我们还集成了针对 STEM 和知识密集型内容的额外领域特定过滤器，并对过度代表的领域进行下采样以确保平衡的代表性。

items.en: We leverage embedding-based corpus balancing as a principled way to further reduce redundancy and mitigate distribution skew. Specifically, we embed large-scale Chinese/English web data, run k-means clustering (100k+ clusters), and down-sample clusters with disproportionate mass. In ablations, this cluster-level rebalancing in the cooldown stage improves a broad set of benchmarks.
items.zh: 我们利用基于嵌入的语料库平衡作为一种原则性方法，以进一步减少冗余并缓解分布偏差。具体来说，我们对大规模中文/英文网络数据进行嵌入，运行 k-means 聚类（10 万+ 个聚类），并对比例过大的聚类进行下采样。在消融实验中，冷却阶段的这种聚类级再平衡改善了一系列广泛的基准测试。

items.en: We construct a dedicated knowledge subset using a lightweight two-stage pipeline built on the shared embedding representation described above. First, a curated inventory of high-value entities, concepts, and relations is used to retrieve knowledge-dense documents and passages from the full corpus in embedding space; these candidates are ranked by a knowledge-density model and simple coverage heuristics. Second, for a portion of the retrieved content, we apply targeted transformations such as controlled rephrasing and QA synthesis to improve learnability. The resulting samples are mixed back into the training mixture to increase effective knowledge signal density. We observe consistent gains from this pipeline in ablations, while a detailed causal analysis of its benefits is left for future work.
items.zh: 我们使用基于上述共享嵌入表示的轻量级两阶段流水线构建了一个专门的知识子集。首先，使用精心策划的高价值实体、概念和关系清单，从完整语料库的嵌入空间中检索知识密集型文档和段落；这些候选者通过知识密度模型和简单的覆盖启发式方法进行排序。其次，对于部分检索内容，我们应用有针对性的转换，如受控改写和问答合成，以提高可学习性。生成的样本被混合回训练混合物中，以增加有效知识信号密度。我们在消融实验中观察到该流水线带来了一致的收益，而对其益处的详细因果分析留待未来工作。

items.en: We refine our internal programming dataset using a modified version of the OpenCoder filtering rules [huang2025opencoderopencookbooktoptier], introducing a calibrated relaxation to balance data quality and diversity. In our pipeline, applying OpenCoder filters generates a set of “hits” for each document, where each hit represents a violation of a heuristic rule (signaling potential noise). We categorize the corpus by these hit counts: hit0 for clean documents (zero violations), hit1 for one violation, and so on.
items.zh: 我们使用 OpenCoder 过滤规则 [huang2025opencoderopencookbooktoptier] 的修改版本来优化我们的内部编程数据集，引入了校准的松弛以平衡数据质量和多样性。在我们的流水线中，应用 OpenCoder 过滤器会为每个文档生成一组“命中”，每个命中代表违反启发式规则（表示潜在噪声）。我们根据这些命中计数对语料库进行分类：hit0 表示干净文档（零违规），hit1 表示一次违规，依此类推。

items.en: Our internal ablations reveal a clear quality-diversity trade-off: strict filtering (e.g., hit0-only) over-prunes the corpus, while no filtering introduces excessive noise. We find that the hit0--6 configuration (accepting documents with up to 6 violations) yields the best overall benchmark performance, retaining a wider variety of high-signal code compared to the original strict constraints.
items.zh: 我们的内部消融实验揭示了清晰的质量-多样性权衡：严格过滤（例如，仅 hit0）会过度修剪语料库，而不进行过滤则会引入过多噪声。我们发现 hit0--6 配置（接受最多 6 次违规的文档）在整体基准性能上表现最佳，与原始严格约束相比，保留了更广泛的高信号代码。

items.en: To enhance software engineering capabilities, we construct a comprehensive dataset from GitHub repositories with over 10 stars, comprising PRs, issues, and commits. We apply strict filtering on repository popularity and content quality, and use LLMs to generate missing issue descriptions, resulting in a 5-million-sample foundation. From this, we derive four training subsets:
items.zh: 为了增强软件工程能力，我们从拥有超过 10 颗星的 GitHub 仓库构建了一个全面的数据集，包含 PR、问题和提交。我们对仓库流行度和内容质量应用严格过滤，并使用 LLM 生成缺失的问题描述，从而得到一个 500 万样本的基础数据集。由此，我们衍生出四个训练子集：

items.en: (1) Base PR/Issue/Commit Data: We crawl data via GHArchive and GitHub API, including full commit histories. We extract changes and validate a small portion of samples against git diff ground truth, then filter to 20+ mainstream languages (e.g., Python, Java, C++). We strictly deduplicate against SWE-Bench Verified [swe_verified] and SWE-Bench Multilingual [yang2025swesmith] to prevent leakage.
items.zh: (1) 基础 PR/问题/提交数据：我们通过 GHArchive 和 GitHub API 爬取数据，包括完整的提交历史。我们提取变更，并针对 git diff 真实值验证一小部分样本，然后过滤到 20 多种主流语言（如 Python、Java、C++）。我们严格去重，防止与 SWE-Bench Verified [swe_verified] 和 SWE-Bench Multilingual [yang2025swesmith] 泄露。

items.en: (2) Concatenated PR-Dialogue Data (90B tokens): We generate 90B tokens of code-editing training data by applying two Agentless-inspired templates [xia2024agentless]: (1) File localization: Given a problem description and repository structure, identify target file paths; (2) Code repair: Given a problem description and file content, generate precise modifications via SEARCH/REPLACE blocks.
items.zh: (2) 拼接的 PR-对话数据（900 亿词元）：我们通过应用两个受 Agentless 启发的模板 [xia2024agentless] 生成 900 亿词元的代码编辑训练数据：(1) 文件定位：给定问题描述和仓库结构，识别目标文件路径；(2) 代码修复：给定问题描述和文件内容，通过 SEARCH/REPLACE 块生成精确修改。

items.en: We integrate this 90B code-editing data into two training phases with phase-specific masking strategies. In the annealing stage of pre-training, only template scaffolding is masked; in mid-training, the data is converted to chat dialogs with user prompts masked. Internal ablations show consistent gains over SWE-Bench Verified and SWE-Bench Multilingual in the cooldown stage and mid-training.
items.zh: 我们将这 900 亿词元的代码编辑数据集成到两个训练阶段，并采用阶段特定的掩码策略。在预训练的退火阶段，仅掩码模板脚手架；在中期训练中，数据被转换为聊天对话，用户提示被掩码。内部消融实验显示，在冷却阶段和中期训练中，SWE-Bench Verified 和 SWE-Bench Multilingual 上均有一致的提升。

items.en: (3) Rewritten Reasoning-Oriented Data (12B tokens): From the Python subset of our base dataset, we derive bug-fix samples via LLM change-type annotation. We apply two concise rewriting strategies: (1) Reasoning reconstruction: an LLM reconstructs the PR author’s problem-solving process (problem analysis, root cause identification, solution design, and code implementation), injected into PR-Dialogue format. Hallucinated/inconsistent traces are filtered via rule-based and LLM verification. (2) Active Reading notebooks: PR/issue/commit data is converted into structured learning outlines (motivation, root causes, design decisions, insights), then synthesized into coherent technical notes. These rewritten datasets (∼\sim12B tokens) are incorporated during mid-training, yielding further gains on SWE-Bench Verified.
items.zh: (3) 重写的推理导向数据（120 亿词元）：从基础数据集的 Python 子集中，我们通过 LLM 变更类型注释推导出错误修复样本。我们应用两种简洁的重写策略：(1) 推理重构：LLM 重构 PR 作者的问题解决过程（问题分析、根本原因识别、解决方案设计和代码实现），注入到 PR-对话格式中。幻觉/不一致的轨迹通过基于规则和 LLM 的验证进行过滤。(2) 主动阅读笔记：PR/问题/提交数据被转换为结构化的学习大纲（动机、根本原因、设计决策、见解），然后合成为连贯的技术笔记。这些重写的数据集（约 120 亿词元）在中期训练期间被纳入，在 SWE-Bench Verified 上取得了进一步的提升。

items.en: (4) Environment-based Seed Data. We curate executable environments derived from raw PR, issue, and commit records using the environment building pipeline described in Appendix E.2.2. Candidate samples are rigorously filtered to ensure test-patch inclusion and validated via strict rule-based criteria to guarantee environmental reproducibility. Furthermore, selected issues undergo targeted rewriting to augment data quality and coverage. The resulting dataset comprises hundreds of thousands of seed samples, including problem descriptions, code changes, and test functions, and serves as the foundational bedrock for enhancing agentic coding capabilities, driving significant performance gains in downstream agent tasks.
items.zh: (4) 基于环境的种子数据。我们使用附录 E.2.2 中描述的环境构建流水线，从原始 PR、问题和提交记录中策划可执行环境。候选样本经过严格过滤以确保测试补丁的包含，并通过严格的基于规则的标准进行验证，以保证环境的可重现性。此外，选定的问题经过有针对性的重写以增强数据质量和覆盖范围。生成的数据集包含数十万个种子样本，包括问题描述、代码变更和测试函数，并作为增强智能体编码能力的基础基石，推动下游智能体任务的显著性能提升。

items.en: To enhance reasoning capabilities and elicit intelligence from knowledge, we curate a large-scale mathematics and STEM dataset. Beyond the standard Common Crawl data used in prior works [shao2024deepseekmathpushinglimitsmathematical, zhou2025megamathpushinglimitsopen], we leverage our in-house StepCrawl system to harvest a massive scale of additional mathematics-related data. Specifically, we implement a filtering pipeline inspired by MegaMath [zhou2025megamathpushinglimitsopen], utilizing an ensemble of internal classifiers alongside FineMath [allal2025smollm2smolgoesbig]. This allows us to retain hundreds of billions of mathematics-related tokens distinct from Common Crawl. We further collect a diverse 100M-sample educational dataset encompassing exercises, quizzes, and instructional content. This collection bridges the gap between academic theory and professional application, covering domains from K-12 mathematics/physics/chemistry and humanities to adult vocational exams (CPA, Legal). Early-stage experiments confirm that this problem-solving data is crucial for optimizing token efficiency during pre-training.
items.zh: 为了增强推理能力并从知识中激发智能，我们策划了一个大规模的数学和 STEM 数据集。除了先前工作中使用的标准 Common Crawl 数据 [shao2024deepseekmathpushinglimitsmathematical, zhou2025megamathpushinglimitsopen] 外，我们利用内部的 StepCrawl 系统收集了更大规模的额外数学相关数据。具体来说，我们实现了一个受 MegaMath [zhou2025megamathpushinglimitsopen] 启发的过滤流水线，利用内部分类器集成以及 FineMath [allal2025smollm2smolgoesbig]。这使我们能够保留数千亿个与 Common Crawl 不同的数学相关词元。我们进一步收集了一个多样化的 1 亿样本教育数据集，涵盖练习、测验和教学内容。该集合弥合了学术理论与专业应用之间的差距，覆盖从 K-12 数学/物理/化学和人文学科到成人职业考试（CPA、法律）的领域。早期实验证实，这些问题解决数据对于优化预训练期间的词元效率至关重要。

items.en: Our data construction and curation pipeline runs on a high-throughput in-house data infrastructure system designed for large-scale deduplication, mining, and model-inference filtering. We operate hybrid CPU/GPU clusters with distributed frameworks such as Spark and Ray to execute both large-volume processing (e.g., minhash-based deduplication) and model-driven curation workloads (e.g., embedding generation and classifier/LM inference), backed by a storage layer spanning object storage (OSS), HDFS, and JuiceFS for efficient reads/writes of raw corpora and intermediate artifacts.
items.zh: 我们的数据构建和策划流水线运行在高吞吐量的内部数据基础设施系统上，该系统专为大规模去重、挖掘和模型推理过滤而设计。我们运行混合 CPU/GPU 集群，使用 Spark 和 Ray 等分布式框架来执行大规模处理（例如，基于 minhash 的去重）和模型驱动的策划工作负载（例如，嵌入生成和分类器/LM 推理），并由覆盖对象存储（OSS）、HDFS 和 JuiceFS 的存储层支持，以实现原始语料库和中间工件的高效读写。

items.en: To rigorously assess data quality and the impact of curation strategies, we conduct an extensive ablation suite using the 30B-A3B MoE architecture trained with the Muon optimizer, consistent with the mainline settings (Table 9). Adhering to a strict token efficiency protocol, we set a fixed training budget for all experiments. Models are evaluated on the comprehensive benchmarks listed in Section 6.1, alongside a series of carefully designed held-out compression (perplexity) test sets. We observe that compression metrics often provide a more direct measure of knowledge capacity, offering signals complementary to mainstream benchmarks.
items.zh: 为了严格评估数据质量和策划策略的影响，我们使用 30B-A3B MoE 架构进行了广泛的消融实验套件，该架构使用 Muon 优化器进行训练，与主线设置一致（表 9）。遵循严格的词元效率协议，我们为所有实验设定了固定的训练预算。模型在 6.1 节中列出的综合基准上进行评估，以及一系列精心设计的保留压缩（困惑度）测试集。我们观察到压缩指标通常提供更直接的知识容量度量，提供与主流基准互补的信号。

items.en: Internal experiments on the 30B-A3B MoE model demonstrate its superior performance and stability compared to smaller proxies. While smaller models are computationally cheaper, they often fail to capture the nuances of complex reasoning and lack the capacity to memorize long-tail patterns, leading to an artificial bias towards data repetition. Empirically, the 30B-A3B size offers stronger stability and better fidelity to full-scale trends.
items.zh: 在 30B-A3B MoE 模型上的内部实验证明了其与较小代理相比的优越性能和稳定性。虽然较小的模型计算成本更低，但它们通常无法捕捉复杂推理的细微差别，并且缺乏记忆长尾模式的能力，导致对数据重复的人为偏见。经验上，30B-A3B 规模提供了更强的稳定性和对全规模趋势更好的保真度。

items.en: This section describes the post-training process that refines the base model into a high-performance agentic system, covering SFT with rigorous data processing and quality control, followed by large-scale RL to further improve reasoning, tool use, and generalization.
items.zh: 本节描述了将基础模型精炼为高性能智能体系统的后训练过程，涵盖了具有严格数据处理和质量控制的 SFT，随后是大规模 RL 以进一步提高推理、工具使用和泛化能力。

items.en: Across all domains, we apply a unified data processing pipeline that emphasizes answer verifiability, reasoning quality, and execution realism. To ensure overall data integrity, the aggregated dataset undergoes a strict two-stage filtration process:
items.zh: 在所有领域，我们应用统一的数据处理流水线，强调答案可验证性、推理质量和执行真实性。为确保整体数据完整性，聚合数据集经过严格的两阶段过滤过程：

items.en: Rule-based Filtering: We eliminate low-quality data exhibiting degenerate patterns, such as infinite repetition, harmful content, and personally identifiable information.
items.zh: 基于规则的过滤：我们消除表现出退化模式（如无限重复、有害内容和个人身份信息）的低质量数据。

items.en: Model-based Filtering: We utilize specialized models to detect and filter out linguistically inconsistent data. By identifying and removing samples with unnatural language mixing, we significantly refine the dataset’s linguistic purity and overall quality.
items.zh: 基于模型的过滤：我们利用专门的模型检测并过滤语言不一致的数据。通过识别和移除具有不自然语言混合的样本，我们显著提高了数据集的语言纯度和整体质量。

items.en: Decontamination: We conduct comprehensive benchmark decontamination to prevent test set leakage. This involves both exact matching (with digit masking to catch numerical modifications) and NN-gram matching.
items.zh: 去污染：我们进行全面的基准去污染以防止测试集泄露。这包括精确匹配（使用数字掩码来捕获数值修改）和 NN-gram 匹配。

items.en: This process yields a final refined dataset of 871k samples, totaling 7.23B tokens.The detailed distribution of the SFT data is presented in Table 3.
items.zh: 该过程最终得到包含 871k 样本的精炼数据集，总计 7.23B 个 token。SFT 数据的详细分布见表 3。

items.en: This section details the large-scale RL post-training, covering data curation, asynchronous search-agent training, and ablations on dense and MoE models.
items.zh: 本节详细介绍大规模 RL 后训练，涵盖数据整理、异步搜索智能体训练以及密集模型和 MoE 模型的消融实验。

items.en: We curate the RL training dataset by aggregating problems from open-source collections and competition archives spanning competitive coding, STEM, and synthetic data for general RLVR training. To prevent data contamination, we strictly exclude problems from competitions held during 2024–2026. The dataset is further augmented with: (i) synthetic arithmetic problems involving 11–13 digit integers; (ii) a generator–validator pipeline that synthesizes additional test cases for coding tasks; and (iii) synthetic environments for general reasoning tasks, such as puzzle and instruction following.
items.zh: 我们通过聚合来自开源集合和竞赛档案的问题来整理 RL 训练数据集，涵盖竞争性编程、STEM 以及用于通用 RLVR 训练的合成数据。为防止数据污染，我们严格排除 2024–2026 年期间竞赛中的问题。数据集进一步扩充了：(i) 涉及 11–13 位整数的合成算术问题；(ii) 一个生成器-验证器流水线，为编程任务合成额外的测试用例；(iii) 用于通用推理任务（如谜题和指令遵循）的合成环境。

items.en: We apply a two-stage filtering process. First, deterministic rule-based pruning removes prompts containing images, external links, or open-ended requirements without a unique final answer. Second, an accuracy-based filter excludes trivial or degenerate problems. During training, each batch is constructed by sampling from different domains according to predefined sampling probabilities.
items.zh: 我们应用两阶段过滤流程。首先，基于确定性规则的剪枝移除包含图像、外部链接或无唯一最终答案的开放式要求的提示。其次，基于准确率的过滤器排除琐碎或退化问题。训练期间，每个批次根据预定义的采样概率从不同领域采样构建。

items.en: For STEM tasks, we employ gpt-oss-120b [openai2025gptoss120bgptoss20bmodel] as the verifier model, using the following structured prompt (originally in Chinese) to rigorously assess final-answer correctness. For coding tasks, we utilize sandboxes to validate code execution against test cases with soft reward.
items.zh: 对于 STEM 任务，我们使用 gpt-oss-120b [openai2025gptoss120bgptoss20bmodel] 作为验证模型，采用以下结构化提示（原文为中文）严格评估最终答案的正确性。对于编程任务，我们利用沙箱通过软奖励验证代码执行与测试用例的一致性。

items.capEn: (a) Comparison on the dense model. While GSPO also effectively reduces the variance of the actor gradient norm, its efficiency is inferior to that of MIS-PO. Under the same iteration budget, MIS-PO achieves higher rewards and all acceptance ratio.
items.capZh: (a) 密集模型上的比较。虽然 GSPO 也能有效降低演员梯度范数的方差，但其效率不如 MIS-PO。在相同的迭代预算下，MIS-PO 实现了更高的奖励和接受率。

items.capEn: (b) Comparison on the MoE model. (1) Efficiency: MIS-PO demonstrates superior sample efficiency, achieving higher rewards with accelerated convergence, whereas GSPO plateaus around iteration 200. (2) Stability: GSPO exhibits an increasing training-inference discrepancy during training, quantified by the density ratio πθold/πθvllm\pi_{\theta_{\text{old}}}/\pi_{\theta_{\text{vllm}}} (where πθvllm\pi_{\theta_{\text{vllm}}} is the rollout policy in the inference backend and πθold\pi_{\theta_{\text{old}}} is the pre-update policy snapshot in the training backend). Conversely, MIS-PO consistently maintains this discrepancy within a stable range.
items.capZh: (b) MoE 模型上的比较。(1) 效率：MIS-PO 展现出更优的样本效率，以更快的收敛速度获得更高奖励，而 GSPO 在迭代 200 左右趋于平稳。(2) 稳定性：GSPO 在训练过程中表现出训练-推理差异增大，通过密度比 πθold/πθvllm（其中 πθvllm 是推理后端中的 rollout 策略，πθold 是训练后端中更新前的策略快照）量化。相反，MIS-PO 始终将该差异维持在稳定范围内。

items.en: To rigorously validate the effectiveness of our method, we benchmark MIS-PO against GSPO [zheng2025group] on both Dense and MoE architectures. We select GSPO as the primary baseline because it represents a competitive strategy for reducing the gradient variance inherent in importance sampling. In our implementation, we extend the original GSPO estimator to the actor-critic setting by integrating its Generalized Importance Sampling mechanism into the actor loss. Specifically, we replace the standard token-level importance sampling ratio with the geometric mean of trajectory-level ratios. The resulting actor loss is formulated as follows (γ=λ=1\gamma=\lambda=1):
items.zh: 为严格验证我们方法的有效性，我们在密集和 MoE 架构上将 MIS-PO 与 GSPO [zheng2025group] 进行基准测试。我们选择 GSPO 作为主要基线，因为它代表了降低重要性采样固有梯度方差的竞争策略。在我们的实现中，我们通过将 GSPO 的广义重要性采样机制集成到演员损失中，将原始 GSPO 估计器扩展到演员-评论家设置。具体来说，我们用轨迹级比率的几何平均值替换标准的 token 级重要性采样比率。得到的演员损失公式如下（γ=λ=1）：

items.en: To ensure a fair comparison, we apply the same token- and sample-level masking strategies used in MIS-PO to exclude data with significant training–inference mismatches. Regarding the clip ratio ϵ\epsilon, we conduct a grid search over {1,2,3,4}×10−4\{1,2,3,4\}\times 10^{-4}. We adopt ϵ=10−4\epsilon=10^{-4} for all experiments primarily because it achieves the best benchmark performance after 200 RL training steps. Additionally, we observe that this setting yields a clip fraction of approximately 15%, consistent with the original GSPO [zheng2025group].
items.zh: 为确保公平比较，我们应用与 MIS-PO 相同的 token 级和样本级掩码策略，以排除训练-推理不匹配显著的数据。关于裁剪比率 ϵ，我们在 {1,2,3,4}×10^{-4} 上进行网格搜索。我们在所有实验中采用 ϵ=10^{-4}，主要是因为它在 200 步 RL 训练后取得了最佳基准性能。此外，我们观察到该设置产生的裁剪比例约为 15%，与原始 GSPO [zheng2025group] 一致。

items.en: To further validate the scalability of our method, we conduct an extended training run of MIS-PO on the MoE model using a challenging dataset. As illustrated in Figure 8, the model maintains a continuous upward trend in rewards, stable actor gradient norms, and well-controlled entropy levels. These results empirically confirm that MIS-PO is reliability for large-scale MoE off-policy RL training.
items.zh: 为进一步验证我们方法的可扩展性，我们在 MoE 模型上使用具有挑战性的数据集进行了 MIS-PO 的扩展训练。如图 8 所示，模型保持奖励持续上升趋势、稳定的演员梯度范数以及良好控制的熵水平。这些结果实证确认了 MIS-PO 在大规模 MoE 离策略 RL 训练中的可靠性。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Extended training dynamics of MIS-PO on the MoE model. The metrics include Reward (left), Actor Gradient Norm (middle), and Entropy (right). Notably, the middle panel displays the raw gradient norm without smoothing or downsampling to highlight the stability of the optimization.
items.capZh: 图 8：MIS-PO 在 MoE 模型上的扩展训练动态。指标包括奖励（左）、演员梯度范数（中）和熵（右）。值得注意的是，中间面板显示的是未经平滑或降采样的原始梯度范数，以突出优化的稳定性。

items.en: Regarding the training architecture, the early client–server one-step off-policy framework is severely bottlenecked by long-tail latency: approximately 5% of samples accounted for roughly 80% of the generation cost. However, our observations indicate that the policy exhibits strong robustness to staleness, maintaining stable performance even with a latency of approximately 20 steps. Consequently, we adopt the FullyAsync paradigm, decoupling generation and updates into a completely asynchronous process. Furthermore, to minimize inference overhead during multi-turn interactions, we implement sticky scheduling, where the same session is consistently dispatched to the same node to maximize KV-cache reuse. Overall, this configuration achieves an approximate 10×10\times efficiency gain while maintaining training stability.
items.zh: 关于训练架构，早期的客户端-服务器单步离策略框架受到长尾延迟的严重瓶颈：约 5% 的样本占据了约 80% 的生成成本。然而，我们的观察表明，策略对陈旧性表现出很强的鲁棒性，即使在约 20 步的延迟下也能保持稳定性能。因此，我们采用 FullyAsync 范式，将生成和更新解耦为完全异步的过程。此外，为最小化多轮交互中的推理开销，我们实现了粘性调度，其中同一会话始终被调度到同一节点以最大化 KV 缓存重用。总体而言，该配置在保持训练稳定性的同时实现了约 10 倍的效率提升。

items.en: Throughout the training process, the FullyAsync paradigm demonstrates robust stability, evidenced by a sustained increase in rewards and a Truncated Importance Sampling (TIS) truncation rate maintained within a controllable range, thereby indicating limited policy drift induced by asynchrony. Notably, we observe that distinct from the limited scalability of “RL from zero” regarding training budgets, injecting task-relevant knowledge and tool-use priors during the mid-training phase elicited significantly higher performance gains and a more stable emergence of capabilities during the RL.
items.zh: 在整个训练过程中，FullyAsync 范式展现出稳健的稳定性，表现为奖励持续增加且截断重要性采样（TIS）截断率维持在可控范围内，从而表明异步性导致的策略漂移有限。值得注意的是，我们观察到与“从零开始 RL”在训练预算方面的有限可扩展性不同，在中期训练阶段注入任务相关知识和工具使用先验，在 RL 期间引发了显著更高的性能增益和更稳定的能力涌现。

items.en: Discussion. To rigorously evaluate agentic competence isolated from parametric memorization, we focus on the tool-usage gain, defined as:
items.zh: 讨论。为严格评估与参数记忆无关的智能体能力，我们关注工具使用增益，定义为：

items.en: This metric decouples the model’s inherent knowledge from its ability to dynamically leverage external tools. As detailed in Table 11, Step 3.5 Flash demonstrates the most robust capability to leverage external information, achieving the highest average gain (52.052.0) and leading significantly on complex benchmarks such as GAIA and xbench-DeepSearch.
items.zh: 该指标将模型的内在知识与其动态利用外部工具的能力解耦。如表 11 所示，Step 3.5 Flash 展现出最稳健的利用外部信息的能力，实现了最高平均增益（52.0），并在 GAIA 和 xbench-DeepSearch 等复杂基准上显著领先。

items.en: This distinction is critical because high absolute scores on benchmarks like BrowseComp can sometimes stem from strong internalized knowledge rather than effective search strategies. A smaller Δtool\Delta_{\text{tool}} in a high-performing model may ambiguously indicate either high efficiency (the model already “knows” the answer) or a failure to effectively utilize tools to improve results. Conversely, a large Δtool\Delta_{\text{tool}} explicitly signals the model’s proficiency in bridging knowledge gaps through retrieval. Therefore, we argue that future optimization should not merely chase higher absolute scores (“benchmark grinding”), but should aim to maximize this Δtool\Delta_{\text{tool}} in long-context, evidence-critical scenarios. This ensures the agent is truly mastering the process of information retrieval and reasoning, rather than overfitting to static knowledge or benchmark artifacts.
items.zh: 这种区分至关重要，因为像 BrowseComp 这样的基准上的高绝对分数有时可能源于强大的内化知识，而非有效的搜索策略。高性能模型中较小的 Δtool 可能模糊地表明高效率（模型已经“知道”答案）或未能有效利用工具改进结果。相反，较大的 Δtool 明确表明模型通过检索弥合知识差距的能力。因此，我们认为未来的优化不应仅仅追求更高的绝对分数（“基准打磨”），而应旨在最大化长上下文、证据关键场景中的 Δtool。这确保智能体真正掌握信息检索和推理的过程，而非过拟合静态知识或基准伪影。

full.sec: D.3 Tool-integrated Reasoning and Parallel Reasoning
full.secZh: D.3 工具集成推理与并行推理

items.en: In this section, we introduce two primary methodologies for test-time scaling in Step 3.5 Flash: tool-integrated reasoning and parallel reasoning.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们介绍 Step 3.5 Flash 中测试时扩展的两种主要方法：工具集成推理和并行推理。

items.en: For complex reasoning tasks, we integrate the model with a Python interpreter to facilitate tool-assisted reasoning. In this framework, the model operates within a sandbox to iteratively think and execute code for computational, simulation, and visualization purposes. In our experiments, we evaluate on AIME 2025, HMMT 2025, IMO-AnswerBench, GPQA, HLEtext{}_{\text{text}}, and ARC-AGI-1 with a 100-turn limit. As shown in Table 12, tool-integrated reasoning significantly enhances performance across challenging mathematics, STEM, and puzzle benchmarks, highlighting the advanced agentic reasoning capabilities of Step 3.5 Flash.
items.zh: 对于复杂推理任务，我们将模型与 Python 解释器集成以促进工具辅助推理。在此框架中，模型在沙箱内运行，迭代思考并执行代码以进行计算、模拟和可视化。在我们的实验中，我们在 AIME 2025、HMMT 2025、IMO-AnswerBench、GPQA、HLEtext 和 ARC-AGI-1 上进行了评估，限制为 100 轮。如表 12 所示，工具集成推理显著提升了在具有挑战性的数学、STEM 和谜题基准上的性能，突显了 Step 3.5 Flash 的高级智能体推理能力。

items.en: We present a preliminary exploration of extending PaCoRe to a multi-turn interactive environment. By design, PaCoRe preserves the standard LLM message interface. This compatibility allows for seamless integration into existing agentic frameworks that utilize multi-turn tool interaction. To adapt PaCoRe to this setting, we implement a state-aware input serialization protocol as shown in Table 14.
items.zh: 我们初步探索了将 PaCoRe 扩展到多轮交互环境。通过设计，PaCoRe 保留了标准 LLM 消息接口。这种兼容性允许无缝集成到利用多轮工具交互的现有智能体框架中。为将 PaCoRe 适应于此设置，我们实现了如表 14 所示的状态感知输入序列化协议。

items.en: We evaluate this approach on the GPQA and HLEtext{}_{\text{text}} benchmarks using Step 3.5 Flash equipped with a Python interpreter. As shown in Table 13, extending parallel reasoning to these agentic loops yields significant performance improvements over the standard reasoning baseline. These findings demonstrate that PaCoRe effectively generalizes to environments requiring interactive feedback, highlighting a promising avenue for agentic test-time scaling.
items.zh: 我们在 GPQA 和 HLEtext 基准上使用配备 Python 解释器的 Step 3.5 Flash 评估了该方法。如表 13 所示，将并行推理扩展到这些智能体循环中，相比标准推理基线带来了显著的性能提升。这些发现表明 PaCoRe 有效泛化到需要交互反馈的环境，突显了智能体测试时扩展的一个有前景的方向。

items.en: This section provides the implementation details for our evaluation suite. We outline the specific prompt templates, few-shot configurations, and the judge models employed across different benchmarks. For complex metrics, such as those used in long-context or reasoning tasks, we also detail the underlying calculation logic and scoring criteria to ensure reproducibility. In the templates provided below, {question} denotes the placeholder for the textual problem description, while other placeholders (e.g., {test}, {context}) represent task-specific information.

full.sec: E.2 Evaluation Details of Post-Trained Models
full.secZh: E.2 后训练模型评估细节

items.en: In this section, we detail the evaluation protocols used to assess the post-trained models across a diverse set of agentic tasks. Our evaluations span both code-centric and general-purpose agent settings, covering software engineering, terminal interaction, deep search, research workflows, and real-world tool use. We report standardized metrics under carefully controlled environments and inference budgets to ensure fair, stable comparisons across benchmarks.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们详细介绍了用于评估后训练模型在多种智能体任务上的评估协议。我们的评估涵盖以代码为中心和通用智能体设置，包括软件工程、终端交互、深度搜索、研究工作流程和现实世界工具使用。我们在严格控制的环境和推理预算下报告标准化指标，以确保跨基准的公平、稳定比较。

items.en: Recent studies and advanced benchmarks emphasize the critical need to evaluate models on fresh, competition-level problem [zheng2025livecodebench, anonymous2026autocode]. We evaluate the competitive programming capabilities of our model using a custom CodeForces Div. 2 Benchmark 888https://huggingface.co/datasets/stepfun-ai/CF-Div2-Stepfun. The benchmark comprises 53 problems sourced from official CodeForces Div.2 contests held between September 2024 and February 2025. We develop an offline evaluation framework that utilizes a local grading mechanism as an alternative to real-time online submissions. We try to construct test cases similar to the original test cases. Specifically, we first generate enough small-scale test cases for evaluation correctness coverage, then add randomized data for large-scale testing. Finally, we performed adversarial construction of edge cases by analyzing common error patterns and "hacked" submissions from actual users. Some edge cases are also auto-generated by the stress testing technique, which keeps generating countless test cases until one can distinguish failed submissions from correct submissions. To validate the reliability of this benchmark, we run both correct and representative failed submissions selected from the original contests. Our evaluator correctly identifies 100% of the accepted submissions as "Passed", while 92.45% of the failed submissions are accurately flagged.
items.zh: 最近的研究和高级基准强调，需要在新的、竞赛级别的问题上评估模型 [zheng2025livecodebench, anonymous2026autocode]。我们使用自定义的 CodeForces Div. 2 基准 888https://huggingface.co/datasets/stepfun-ai/CF-Div2-Stepfun 来评估模型的竞赛编程能力。该基准包含 53 个问题，来自 2024 年 9 月至 2025 年 2 月期间官方 CodeForces Div.2 竞赛。我们开发了一个离线评估框架，利用本地评分机制替代实时在线提交。我们尝试构建与原始测试用例相似的测试用例。具体来说，我们首先生成足够多的小规模测试用例以覆盖评估正确性，然后添加随机数据进行大规模测试。最后，通过分析常见错误模式和实际用户的“被 hack”提交，我们对抗性地构建了边缘情况。一些边缘情况也通过压力测试技术自动生成，该技术不断生成无数测试用例，直到能够区分失败提交和正确提交。为了验证该基准的可靠性，我们运行了从原始竞赛中选择的正确和代表性失败提交。我们的评估器正确地将 100% 的接受提交标记为“通过”，而 92.45% 的失败提交被准确标记。

items.en: We sample 8 responses for each problem and report the average accuracy. The user prompt utilized for this process is:
items.zh: 我们对每个问题采样 8 个响应，并报告平均准确率。用于此过程的用户提示如下：

items.en: To maintain consistency with competitive programming norms and avoid the inconsistent overhead associated with JIT "warm-up" periods, we use the standard Python interpreter with a double time limit rather than PyPy999https://pypy.org/. We apply this same double time limit to all Java submissions.
items.zh: 为了保持与竞赛编程规范的一致性，并避免与 JIT“预热”期相关的不一致开销，我们使用标准 Python 解释器并设置双倍时间限制，而不是 PyPy999https://pypy.org/。我们对所有 Java 提交应用相同的双倍时间限制。

items.en: While the Table 15 reports raw accuracy, we recognize that problem difficulty varies significantly. Therefore, rating scores provide more robust metrics. Although frameworks like CodeELO [quan2025codeelobenchmarkingcompetitionlevelcode] can calculate competitive ratings, current top-tier models perform so effectively in Division 2 contests that their ratings may result in statistical outliers. Furthermore, we adopt a simplified rating calculation that disregards submission time penalties by assuming all solutions are submitted at the onset of the contest. While this approach deviates from empirical competitive scenarios and may result in ratings that are not directly comparable to human participants, it provides a standardized benchmark for consistent cross-model comparison.
items.zh: 虽然表 15 报告了原始准确率，但我们认识到问题难度差异很大。因此，评分分数提供了更稳健的指标。尽管像 CodeELO [quan2025codeelobenchmarkingcompetitionlevelcode] 这样的框架可以计算竞赛评分，但当前顶级模型在 Division 2 竞赛中表现非常出色，以至于它们的评分可能成为统计异常值。此外，我们采用简化的评分计算，忽略提交时间惩罚，假设所有解决方案都在竞赛开始时提交。虽然这种方法偏离了经验性的竞赛场景，并且可能导致评分与人类参与者无法直接比较，但它为一致的跨模型比较提供了标准化基准。
