items.en: SWE-Bench Verified [swe_verified] is a high-quality subset of the original SWE-bench dataset, consisting of 500 software engineering tasks rigorously validated by human expert developers to ensure reliable and accurate evaluation. SWE-Bench Multilingual extends the original benchmark to a diverse set of 300 real-world software engineering tasks across 9 programming languages.
items.zh: SWE-Bench Verified [swe_verified] 是原始 SWE-bench 数据集的高质量子集，包含 500 个软件工程任务，经过人类专家开发者的严格验证，以确保可靠和准确的评估。SWE-Bench Multilingual 将原始基准扩展到涵盖 9 种编程语言的 300 个真实世界软件工程任务。

items.en: We test the software engineering agent ability of Step 3.5 Flash on SWE-Bench Verified and SWE-Bench Multilingual using our internal agent infrastructure, which is built upon the described session-router architecture. For each evaluation instance, we provision a containerized session orchestrated via Kubernetes. We then perform environment initialization specific to SWE-Bench, which includes removing future commits to prevent data leakage, as well as configuring network proxies and critical system settings. Regarding the agent scaffold, we adopted the OpenHands [wang2024openhands] CodeAct Agent framework, which is widely used in the research community. We enabled a default suite of four tools: execute_bash, str_replace_editor, finish, and think. The max interactive turns is set to 350.
items.zh: 我们使用基于所述会话路由器架构构建的内部智能体基础设施，在 SWE-Bench Verified 和 SWE-Bench Multilingual 上测试了 Step 3.5 Flash 的软件工程智能体能力。对于每个评估实例，我们通过 Kubernetes 编排一个容器化会话。然后执行 SWE-Bench 特定的环境初始化，包括移除未来提交以防止数据泄露，以及配置网络代理和关键系统设置。关于智能体框架，我们采用了研究社区广泛使用的 OpenHands [wang2024openhands] CodeAct Agent 框架。我们启用了默认的四工具套件：execute_bash、str_replace_editor、finish 和 think。最大交互轮数设置为 350。

items.en: Given the resource-intensive nature of compiled languages, we allocate 12GB of memory for the multilingual setting, whereas the verified instances are restricted to a 4GB limit. In evaluations, the tool execution timeout is set to 1200s, and the model inference parameters are: temperature=1, top-p=0.95. Following the above settings, Step 3.5 Flash reach 74.4% on SWE-Bench Verified, and 67.4% on SWE-Bench Multilingual benchmark with an average score of 4 repeat of runnings. We also cross-evaluate Step 3.5 Flash on other popular agent scaffolds: SWE-Agent [yang2024swe] with the original agent pipeline settings achieving 74.2% accuracy on SWE-Bench Verified, and standard Claude Code 101010https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code environment scoring 72.0% with an extended time limit of 4 hours for each instance and no time limit for single tool execution.
items.zh: 考虑到编译语言对资源的密集需求，我们为多语言设置分配了 12GB 内存，而验证实例限制为 4GB。在评估中，工具执行超时设置为 1200 秒，模型推理参数为：temperature=1，top-p=0.95。按照上述设置，Step 3.5 Flash 在 SWE-Bench Verified 上达到 74.4%，在 SWE-Bench Multilingual 基准上达到 67.4%，平均得分为 4 次运行的平均值。我们还在其他流行的智能体框架上交叉评估了 Step 3.5 Flash：SWE-Agent [yang2024swe] 使用原始智能体管道设置在 SWE-Bench Verified 上达到 74.2% 的准确率，以及标准 Claude Code 101010https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code 环境，每个实例的扩展时间限制为 4 小时，单次工具执行无时间限制，得分为 72.0%。

items.en: We test the Terminal-Bench benchmark [terminalbench2025] within remote task-independent containers. We limit the container memory to 16GB. We have deployed an internal Artifactory repository and update the default package sources for all Docker containers. During session creation and dependency installation of the testing phases, the system will retry multiple times if an error occurs. To streamline the system-agent interaction, we modify the Terminus 2 framework so that it automatically interrupts timed-out commands and prevents subsequent commands in the same round from executing, returning a timeout warning to the agent. Accordingly, we modify the command duration control part of the original system prompt:
items.zh: 我们在远程任务无关容器中测试了 Terminal-Bench 基准 [terminalbench2025]。我们将容器内存限制为 16GB。我们部署了内部 Artifactory 仓库，并更新了所有 Docker 容器的默认包源。在测试阶段的会话创建和依赖安装期间，如果发生错误，系统将重试多次。为了简化系统与智能体的交互，我们修改了 Terminus 2 框架，使其自动中断超时命令，并阻止同一轮中的后续命令执行，向智能体返回超时警告。相应地，我们修改了原始系统提示中的命令持续时间控制部分：

items.en: During inference, we cap the model’s single-turn output at 64k and the maximum context window at 256k for all interactions. The thinking process will be preserved in the multi-round history. If the model output exceeds the 256k context window limit, we execute a pruning context management: Keep the problem statement and the last 50% of history before retrying. We use the inference parameters of top-p=0.95 and temperature=1. The interaction protocol is primarily conducted using XML-formatted structured responses. The agent is limited to 200 interaction rounds and will proceed directly to the testing phase once this limit is reached. The total time limit for interaction and testing is 6 hours.
items.zh: 在推理过程中，我们将模型的单轮输出上限设为 64k，所有交互的最大上下文窗口设为 256k。思考过程将保留在多轮历史中。如果模型输出超过 256k 上下文窗口限制，我们执行修剪上下文管理：保留问题陈述和最后 50% 的历史记录，然后重试。我们使用推理参数 top-p=0.95 和 temperature=1。交互协议主要使用 XML 格式的结构化响应进行。智能体限制为 200 个交互轮次，达到此限制后直接进入测试阶段。交互和测试的总时间限制为 6 小时。

items.en: To ensure consistency, we verify and refine each task’s checker against its problem statement 111111https://huggingface.co/datasets/zai-org/terminal-bench-2-verified, which improved overall accuracy by approximately 1.5%. Each task is executed across 8 trials. Notably, 88.6% of successful trajectories are completed within 30 interactions. The final pass@8 stands at 67/89, with an avg@8 of 50.98%. Our agent achieves a 100% success rate across all 8 trials in 23 out of 89 tasks. In the successful trajectories, 9.41% of the runs triggered history pruning to manage context limits.
items.zh: 为确保一致性，我们根据问题陈述验证并完善每个任务的检查器 111111https://huggingface.co/datasets/zai-org/terminal-bench-2-verified，这使整体准确率提高了约 1.5%。每个任务执行 8 次试验。值得注意的是，88.6% 的成功轨迹在 30 次交互内完成。最终 pass@8 为 67/89，avg@8 为 50.98%。我们的智能体在 89 个任务中的 23 个任务上实现了所有 8 次试验的 100% 成功率。在成功轨迹中，9.41% 的运行触发了历史修剪以管理上下文限制。

items.en: The ablation study shows that Limit 16k causes the largest performance drop because the model’s long reasoning for complex tasks often exhausts the token limit before it can output the terminal commands. The further decline to 45.22% when disabling context management under the 16k limit. Meanwhile, Rounds 100 has minimal impact as most tasks finish early. The Timeout 2h decrease reflects that certain tasks involving model training, heavy compilation, or complex environment configuration require more time to complete.
items.zh: 消融研究表明，Limit 16k 导致最大的性能下降，因为模型对复杂任务的长时间推理通常在输出终端命令之前耗尽令牌限制。在 16k 限制下禁用上下文管理时，性能进一步下降至 45.22%。同时，Rounds 100 影响最小，因为大多数任务提前完成。Timeout 2h 的下降反映了某些涉及模型训练、大量编译或复杂环境配置的任务需要更多时间完成。

items.en: We evaluate our agent’s deep search capabilities on multiple benchmarks (e.g, BrowseComp [wei2025browsecomp], BrowseComp-ZH [zhou2025browsecompzhbenchmarkingwebbrowsing], GAIA [mialon2023gaiabenchmarkgeneralai], xbench-DeepSearch [chen2025xbench]). The results reported in Table 5 are based on the avg@3 metric; GPT-5.2 xHigh uses avg@1. The agent is equipped with a core toolset including:
items.zh: 我们在多个基准上评估了智能体的深度搜索能力（例如，BrowseComp [wei2025browsecomp]、BrowseComp-ZH [zhou2025browsecompzhbenchmarkingwebbrowsing]、GAIA [mialon2023gaiabenchmarkgeneralai]、xbench-DeepSearch [chen2025xbench]）。表 5 中报告的结果基于 avg@3 指标；GPT-5.2 xHigh 使用 avg@1。智能体配备了一套核心工具，包括：

items.en: search: Executes multiple search queries in parallel.
items.zh: search：并行执行多个搜索查询。

items.en: visit: Analyzes the content of the webpage to answer specific questions based on LLM.
items.zh: visit：分析网页内容以基于 LLM 回答特定问题。

items.en: google_scholar: Search for academic articles and technical literature.
items.zh: google_scholar：搜索学术文章和技术文献。

items.en: python_interpreter: Runs Python code for calculations and data analysis.
items.zh: python_interpreter：运行 Python 代码进行计算和数据分析。

items.en: file: Downloads and saves files from direct URLs.
items.zh: file：从直接 URL 下载并保存文件。

items.en: During inference, we employ a 256k-token context window with no limit on the maximum generation length. Inference is conducted with top-p = 0.95, temperature = 1.0, and presence penalty = 1.1, allowing for an execution budget of up to 400 steps.
items.zh: 在推理过程中，我们采用 256k 令牌的上下文窗口，对最大生成长度没有限制。推理使用 top-p = 0.95、temperature = 1.0 和 presence penalty = 1.1，允许最多 400 步的执行预算。

items.en: The detailed system prompts for the agent and the LLM judge are consistent with the configurations provided in the GitHub repository associated with [hu2025stepdeepresearchtechnicalreport].
items.zh: 智能体和 LLM 判断器的详细系统提示与 [hu2025stepdeepresearchtechnicalreport] 关联的 GitHub 仓库中提供的配置一致。

items.en: The BrowseComp (w. Ctx Manage) result of 69.0 reported in Table 5 corresponds to the discard-all methodology evaluated on the full BrowseComp dataset. This approach, same as DeepSeek V3.2 [deepseekai2024deepseekv32], is triggered when the context length exceeds predefined thresholds, at which point the agent discards its entire context and reinitializes the operational loop. Under a maximum iteration constraint of 1000 steps, this strategy employs a context length threshold of 72k tokens for BrowseComp and 41k tokens for BrowseComp-ZH.
items.zh: 表 5 中报告的 BrowseComp（带上下文管理）结果 69.0 对应于在完整 BrowseComp 数据集上评估的 discard-all 方法。该方法与 DeepSeek V3.2 [deepseekai2024deepseekv32] 相同，当上下文长度超过预定义阈值时触发，此时智能体丢弃其整个上下文并重新初始化操作循环。在最大迭代约束为 1000 步的条件下，该策略对 BrowseComp 使用 72k 令牌的上下文长度阈值，对 BrowseComp-ZH 使用 41k 令牌的阈值。

items.en: We also evaluate various context management strategies on a subset of 200 instances from BrowseComp, including Summary, Keep-first&lastKK, Discard-all, and Multi-agent orchestration. As shown in Table 17, our model demonstrates robust adaptability across these diverse paradigms. Among single-agent strategies, Discard-all yields a competitive 66.0%66.0\% accuracy. We posit that Discard-all functions as a test-time pass@kk strategy, forcing the model to re-reason from scratch until a self-verified path is found. The performance follows a clear hierarchy: Multi-agent ranks highest by leveraging a master agent to decompose tasks and dispatch specialized agents for parallel reasoning, followed by Discard-all, Keep-first&lastKK and Summary —closely aligns with the increase in real steps. This alignment reflects a direct trade-off between inference cost (number of steps) and accuracy, suggesting that intensive context management effectively converts increased computation into superior performance.
items.zh: 我们还在 BrowseComp 的 200 个实例子集上评估了各种上下文管理策略，包括 Summary、Keep-first&lastKK、Discard-all 和多智能体编排。如表 17 所示，我们的模型在这些不同范式中表现出强大的适应性。在单智能体策略中，Discard-all 达到了具有竞争力的 66.0% 准确率。我们认为 Discard-all 作为一种测试时 pass@kk 策略，迫使模型从头开始重新推理，直到找到自我验证的路径。性能呈现清晰的层次：多智能体通过利用主智能体分解任务并分派专门智能体进行并行推理而排名最高，其次是 Discard-all、Keep-first&lastKK 和 Summary——这与实际步数的增加紧密相关。这种对齐反映了推理成本（步数）与准确率之间的直接权衡，表明密集的上下文管理有效地将增加的计算转化为更优的性能。

items.en: To evaluate deep research capabilities, we utilize the ResearchRubrics [sharma2025researchrubrics] benchmark. This dataset comprises 101 domain-diverse research tasks, each accompanied by 20–43 expert-written, fine-grained scoring criteria that assess factual accuracy, reasoning soundness, and clarity. We benchmark performance against two representative system families: commercial agent systems and ReAct agents.
items.zh: 为了评估深度研究能力，我们使用了 ResearchRubrics [sharma2025researchrubrics] 基准。该数据集包含 101 个领域多样的研究任务，每个任务附带 20-43 个专家编写的细粒度评分标准，评估事实准确性、推理合理性和清晰度。我们针对两个代表性系统系列进行性能基准测试：商业智能体系统和 ReAct 智能体。

items.en: For commercial agents, we collect reports via their official web interfaces (captured Dec 2–15, 2025) under default configurations. As shown in Table 18, the leading commercial system (Gemini DeepResearch) achieves an aggregated score of 63.69.
items.zh: 对于商业智能体，我们通过其官方 Web 界面（捕获于 2025 年 12 月 2-15 日）在默认配置下收集报告。如表 18 所示，领先的商业系统（Gemini DeepResearch）获得了 63.69 的聚合分数。

items.en: For ReAct agents, detailed performance comparisons are presented in Table 5. Our model achieves a score of 65.3, surpassing the complex, proprietary commercial baselines. Notably, when evaluating Gemini 3.0 Pro within our standardized ReAct framework, we observe a score of 50.1. We attribute this performance gap to insufficient search depth when addressing open-ended research questions; the model tends to rely on internal parametric knowledge rather than perform extensive external retrieval. Consequently, the generated reports lack comprehensiveness, failing to adequately cover the user’s implicit criteria.
items.zh: 对于 ReAct 智能体，详细的性能比较见表 5。我们的模型得分为 65.3，超过了复杂的专有商业基线。值得注意的是，当在我们的标准化 ReAct 框架内评估 Gemini 3.0 Pro 时，我们观察到得分为 50.1。我们将这一性能差距归因于在回答开放式研究问题时搜索深度不足；该模型倾向于依赖内部参数知识，而不是进行广泛的外部检索。因此，生成的报告缺乏全面性，未能充分覆盖用户的隐含标准。

items.en: We standardize the execution environment for ReAct agents with a maximum of 30 reasoning turns and a per-turn output limit of 16k tokens. For inference parameters, other API-based models use their default settings, and our model is configured with a temperature of 11 and top-p=0.950.95. All outputs are subsequently appraised by an LLM judge using a ternary grading for each criterion. To support the end-to-end research workflow, our ReAct framework provides access to the following suite of tools:
items.zh: 我们标准化了 ReAct 智能体的执行环境，最大推理轮数为 30 轮，每轮输出限制为 16k 令牌。对于推理参数，其他基于 API 的模型使用其默认设置，我们的模型配置为 temperature=1 和 top-p=0.95。所有输出随后由 LLM 判断器使用每个标准的三元评分进行评估。为支持端到端的研究工作流，我们的 ReAct 框架提供以下工具套件：

items.en: batch_web_surfer: For concurrent web searching and multi-page browsing.
items.zh: batch_web_surfer：用于并发网页搜索和多页面浏览。

items.en: file: For robust file operations, including reading, writing, and iterative editing.
items.zh: file：用于稳健的文件操作，包括读取、写入和迭代编辑。

items.en: file_parser: For converting files into Markdown format.
items.zh: file_parser：用于将文件转换为 Markdown 格式。

items.en: shell: For interactive command execution and environment interaction.
items.zh: shell：用于交互式命令执行和环境交互。

items.en: todo: For dynamic task state management and tracking.
items.zh: todo：用于动态任务状态管理和跟踪。

items.en: tmux: For simulating a multiplexed terminal environment with persistent sessions and scrollback history.
items.zh: tmux：用于模拟具有持久会话和回滚历史的多路复用终端环境。

items.en: τ2\tau^{2}-Bench[tau2bench2025] is an agentic benchmark that evaluates general tool-use capability in three customer service domains: airline, retail, telecom. We evaluate Step 3.5 Flash using the official settings in the original codebase. Specifically, we use the default LLM agent framework and set the temperature to 1.0, top-p to 0.95, max sequence length to 256K. The user model is set to GPT-4.1 with 0.0 temperature to ensure a stable interaction during evaluation. For the airline domain, since it has incorrect ground truth answers, we use the fixed version from Claude Opus 4.5 to ensure evaluation reliability 121212https://github.com/sierra-research/tau2-bench/pulls/chrisgorgo. For the retail and telecom domains, we also follow Claude Opus 4.5 to include a general prompt addendum to the user prompt to avoid failure modes from the user ending the interaction incorrectly 131313https://github.com/anthropics/model-cards/tree/main/claude-opus-4-5-20251101/tau2. We report an average score of 8 runs to ensure stable evaluation results.
items.zh: τ²-Bench[tau2bench2025] 是一个智能体式基准测试，评估三个客服领域（航空、零售、电信）的通用工具使用能力。我们使用原始代码库中的官方设置评估 Step 3.5 Flash。具体来说，我们使用默认的 LLM 智能体框架，并将温度设为 1.0，top-p 设为 0.95，最大序列长度设为 256K。用户模型设为 GPT-4.1，温度为 0.0，以确保评估过程中交互稳定。对于航空领域，由于其存在不正确的真实答案，我们使用 Claude Opus 4.5 的修正版以确保评估可靠性¹²¹²¹²https://github.com/sierra-research/tau2-bench/pulls/chrisgorgo。对于零售和电信领域，我们也遵循 Claude Opus 4.5，在用户提示中添加通用提示附录，以避免用户错误结束交互导致的失败模式¹³¹³¹³https://github.com/anthropics/model-cards/tree/main/claude-opus-4-5-20251101/tau2。我们报告 8 次运行的平均得分，以确保评估结果稳定。

items.en: We use the official evaluation metric of Arena-Hard-v2.0 [arenahard2024] and use GPT-4.1 [openai2024gpt4technicalreport] as the judge model.
items.zh: 我们使用 Arena-Hard-v2.0 的官方评估指标[arenahard2024]，并使用 GPT-4.1[openai2024gpt4technicalreport] 作为评判模型。

items.en: We use the official evaluation metric of MultiChallenge [sirdeshmukh2025multichallengerealisticmultiturnconversation] with o3-mini [o3-mini] as the judge model. This follows findings from the GPT-5[gpt5] release that GPT-4o [openai2024gpt4technicalreport] frequently mis-scores complex responses, leading to underestimated results.
items.zh: 我们使用 MultiChallenge 的官方评估指标[sirdeshmukh2025multichallengerealisticmultiturnconversation]，以 o3-mini[o3-mini] 作为评判模型。这遵循了 GPT-5[gpt5] 发布中的发现，即 GPT-4o[openai2024gpt4technicalreport] 经常错误评分复杂响应，导致结果被低估。

items.en: We use the official evaluation method of IFBench [pyatkin2025generalizing].
items.zh: 我们使用 IFBench 的官方评估方法[pyatkin2025generalizing]。

items.en: We use the official evaluation method of LongBench v2 [bai2024longbenchv2].
items.zh: 我们使用 LongBench v2 的官方评估方法[bai2024longbenchv2]。

items.en: For MRCR-8needle [vodrahalli2024michelangelo] benchmark, we report the Area Under Curve (AUC) metric, following the protocol established by ContextArena 141414https://contextarena.ai/. Specifically, we use the AUC@128k metric, which provides a single holistic score summarizing performance across context lengths up to 131,072 tokens.
items.zh: 对于 MRCR-8needle[vodrahalli2024michelangelo] 基准测试，我们报告曲线下面积（AUC）指标，遵循 ContextArena¹⁴¹⁴¹⁴https://contextarena.ai/ 建立的协议。具体来说，我们使用 AUC@128k 指标，该指标提供一个单一的总体得分，总结在上下文长度高达 131,072 个 token 上的性能。

items.en: The AUC is calculated by plotting the average retrieval accuracy for each context bin (ranging from 8k to 128k) against the bin’s maximum context length. We apply the trapezoidal rule on a linear scale to measure the area under the resulting curve, which is then normalized by the total context width (128k minus the initial bin size) to yield a percentage score between 0% and 100%. This metric effectively penalizes performance degradation as difficulty increases with longer context sequences.
items.zh: AUC 通过绘制每个上下文区间（范围从 8k 到 128k）的平均检索准确率与区间最大上下文长度的关系图来计算。我们在线性尺度上应用梯形法则测量所得曲线下的面积，然后通过总上下文宽度（128k 减去初始区间大小）进行归一化，得到 0% 到 100% 之间的百分比得分。该指标有效惩罚了随着上下文序列变长、难度增加而导致的性能下降。

items.en: We use the official evaluation metric of FRAMES[krishna2025fact]. Since our focus is on long-context capabilities, we specifically report results for the Oracle Prompt subset. In this setting, the model is provided with the question alongside all ground-truth Wikipedia articles used during human annotation. This configuration serves as an upper bound for model performance, simulating a perfect retrieval system that delivers all relevant context to the model.
items.zh: 我们使用 FRAMES[krishna2025fact] 的官方评估指标。由于我们关注的是长上下文能力，我们特别报告 Oracle Prompt 子集的结果。在此设置中，模型被提供问题以及人工标注中使用的所有真实维基百科文章。该配置作为模型性能的上限，模拟了一个完美的检索系统，向模型提供所有相关上下文。

items.en: We use the official evaluation method of REPOQA [liu2024repoqaevaluatinglongcontext].
items.zh: 我们使用 REPOQA 的官方评估方法[liu2024repoqaevaluatinglongcontext]。

full.sec: E.3 Internal Evaluation - Benchmarks and Methodology
full.secZh: E.3 内部评估：基准与方法论

items.en: To reliably assess Step 3.5 Flash ’s ability to perform practical data-analysis tasks in the Claude Code environment, we develop an internal Data Analysis Benchmark for evaluating end-to-end analytical problem solving under realistic business constraints. The benchmark is constructed by systematically distilling senior practitioners’ tacit expertise into a rubric-grounded evaluation suite. This approach captures the ambiguity and contextual nuance of real-world analytics while ensuring consistent evaluation through standardized rubrics and verifiable ground-truth artifacts.
items.zh: 为了可靠评估 Step 3.5 Flash 在 Claude Code 环境中执行实际数据分析任务的能力，我们开发了一个内部数据分析基准测试，用于评估在现实业务约束下的端到端分析问题解决能力。该基准测试通过系统地将资深从业者的隐性专业知识提炼为基于评分标准的评估套件来构建。这种方法捕捉了现实世界分析中的模糊性和上下文细微差别，同时通过标准化评分标准和可验证的真实结果工件确保一致的评估。

items.en: The benchmark is constructed using an expert-driven, rubric-based protocol to ensure domain authenticity and scoring reliability. Ten senior data analytics leaders from major Chinese internet companies, each with over 15 years of experience, contributed real-world business cases through structured interviews that elicited core analytical patterns and decision logic. This process yields representative tasks paired with expert-endorsed solution strategies.
items.zh: 该基准测试采用专家驱动的、基于评分标准的协议构建，以确保领域真实性和评分可靠性。来自中国主要互联网公司的十位资深数据分析领导者，每位拥有超过 15 年的经验，通过结构化访谈贡献了真实世界的业务案例，引出了核心分析模式和决策逻辑。这一过程产生了代表性任务以及专家认可的策略解决方案。

items.en: Interview materials are normalized into machine-consumable tasks, each comprising a problem statement, a CSV dataset, a reference analysis, and a weighted checklist-style scoring rubric. The resulting benchmark contains 50 items spanning diverse analytical intents, with an average of 26.9 rubric items per task. Quality is ensured through iterative expert review, aligning task definitions, data, reference solutions, and evaluation criteria to improve validity and reproducibility.
items.zh: 访谈材料被标准化为机器可消费的任务，每个任务包含一个问题陈述、一个 CSV 数据集、一个参考分析以及一个加权检查表式评分标准。生成的基准测试包含 50 个项目，涵盖多种分析意图，每个任务平均有 26.9 个评分标准项。通过迭代的专家评审确保质量，对齐任务定义、数据、参考解决方案和评估标准，以提高有效性和可重复性。

items.en: We further implement a unified end-to-end evaluation framework covering task execution, automated scoring, and report synthesis. The framework supports code-based, research-oriented, and text-based analyses within a single pipeline, enabling scalable and reproducible evaluation across heterogeneous environments with low integration overhead.
items.zh: 我们进一步实现了一个统一的端到端评估框架，涵盖任务执行、自动评分和报告合成。该框架在单个流水线中支持基于代码的、研究导向的和基于文本的分析，能够在异构环境中实现可扩展和可重复的评估，且集成开销低。

items.en: Each task is evaluated by a model-based evaluator that scores generated outputs against expert-defined rubrics, with results averaged over 3 identical runs to reduce stochastic variance and ensure reliable, comparable cross-model evaluation.
items.zh: 每个任务由基于模型的评估器根据专家定义的评分标准对生成的输出进行评分，结果在 3 次相同运行中取平均值，以减少随机方差，确保可靠且可比较的跨模型评估。

items.en: To rigorously evaluate Step 3.5 Flash in real-world advisory scenarios, we curate a benchmark of 500 diverse queries sourced from authentic social platforms such as Reddit, Stack Exchange, and various community forums. These queries represent authentic user intent across everyday life, academic learning, entertainment, and professional workplace contexts.
items.zh: 为了严格评估Step 3.5 Flash在真实世界咨询场景中的表现，我们整理了一个包含500个多样化查询的基准测试，这些查询来自Reddit、Stack Exchange和各种社区论坛等真实社交平台。这些查询代表了用户在日常生活、学术学习、娱乐和专业工作环境中的真实意图。

items.en: Here, we implement an "Anchor-Based" scoring framework to evaluate candidate models. In this process, we first utilize leading models, including GPT-5.2, Claude Opus 4.5, and DeepSeek V3.2 to generate independent responses for each query. These high-level outputs are then synthesized and refined by human experts to create a Reference Response as Ground Truth. This reference serves as a high-quality "Anchor" with a standardized performance value of 88/100.
items.zh: 在此，我们实施了一种“基于锚点”的评分框架来评估候选模型。在此过程中，我们首先利用领先模型，包括GPT-5.2、Claude Opus 4.5和DeepSeek V3.2，为每个查询生成独立回答。然后，这些高质量的输出由人类专家综合并精炼，形成作为真实答案的参考回答。该参考回答作为一个高质量“锚点”，具有标准化的性能值88/100。

items.en: We then measure the performance of the models across four critical dimensions, applying a rigorous scoring rubric, including Usefulness, Logic, Instruction Following, and Tone. Usefulness assesses whether the model delivers a ready-to-use solution that meaningfully resolves the task with expert-level depth, actionable steps, and feasible recommendations. Logic evaluates factual accuracy and structural soundness, checking for hallucinations, incorrect citations, invalid conclusions, or causal and temporal inconsistencies, as well as overall coherence and argument flow. Instruction Following measures adherence to both explicit constraints (e.g., formatting, length, and stated requirements) and implicit contextual expectations embedded in the user query. Tone assesses communicative quality, including appropriateness of language and register, clarity in unpacking complex reasoning, and calibrated expression that avoids overconfidence while clearly signaling uncertainty when appropriate.
items.zh: 然后，我们通过严格的评分标准，在四个关键维度上衡量模型的性能，包括有用性、逻辑性、指令遵循和语气。有用性评估模型是否提供了可直接使用的解决方案，以专家级的深度、可操作的步骤和可行的建议有意义地解决任务。逻辑性评估事实准确性和结构合理性，检查是否存在幻觉、错误引用、无效结论或因果及时间不一致性，以及整体连贯性和论证流程。指令遵循衡量对显式约束（如格式、长度和明确要求）以及用户查询中隐含的上下文期望的遵守程度。语气评估沟通质量，包括语言和语域的适当性、复杂推理的清晰度，以及避免过度自信并在适当时明确表示不确定性的校准表达。

items.en: We employ a Hybrid LLM-as-a-Judge system. Recognizing that different frontier models have distinct evaluative strengths, we assign specific scoring responsibilities as follows: Logic, Instruction Following, and Usefulness: These three dimensions are evaluated by GPT-5.2, leveraging its industry-leading capabilities in factual verification, constraint checking, and objective problem-solving. Tone: This dimension is evaluated by Claude Opus 4.5, utilizing its superior nuance in linguistic style, emotional calibration, and "human-like" resonance. Judge reliability is validated through an alignment study with human experts, yielding a high Pearson correlation between AI- and human-assigned scores. Final scores are computed using equal weighting across the four dimensions (25% each), ensuring a balanced assessment that jointly reflects technical correctness and communicative quality.
items.zh: 我们采用了一种混合的LLM作为评判系统。认识到不同的前沿模型具有不同的评估优势，我们分配了具体的评分职责如下：逻辑性、指令遵循和有用性：这三个维度由GPT-5.2评估，利用其在事实核查、约束检查和客观问题解决方面的行业领先能力。语气：该维度由Claude Opus 4.5评估，利用其在语言风格、情感校准和“类人”共鸣方面的卓越细微差别。评判可靠性通过与人类专家的对齐研究进行验证，AI和人类评分之间产生了高皮尔逊相关性。最终分数通过四个维度等权重（各25%）计算，确保平衡评估，同时反映技术正确性和沟通质量。

items.en: To validate Step 3.5 Flash’s efficacy in real-world agentic scenarios, we evaluate on AndroidDaily Hard [yan2025step], a challenging benchmark designed for Chinese mobile application environments. This benchmark comprises compositional tasks spanning e-commerce transactions, multimedia interactions, and daily mobile operations, offering a naturalistic testbed for assessing GUI agent capabilities in complex, multi-step workflows representative of production deployments.
items.zh: 为了验证Step 3.5 Flash在真实世界智能体场景中的有效性，我们在AndroidDaily Hard [yan2025step]上进行了评估，这是一个针对中文移动应用环境设计的具有挑战性的基准测试。该基准测试包含跨电子商务交易、多媒体交互和日常移动操作的组合任务，为评估GUI智能体在复杂、多步骤工作流中的能力提供了一个自然测试平台，这些工作流代表了生产部署。

items.en: We empirically investigate two architectural instantiations: (1) Step-GUI [yan2025step], a lightweight on-device agent (Edge Only) that executes tasks autonomously using local computational resources, and (2) Step 3.5 Flash + Step-GUI, an edge-cloud collaborative framework wherein Step 3.5 Flash functions as a cloud-based reasoning orchestrator that synthesizes high-level task plans, decomposes them into executable primitives via the GUI-MCP protocol, and delegates low-level control to the on-device Step-GUI agent. This hierarchical architecture exploits the complementary strengths of cloud-scale reasoning and edge efficiency: Step 3.5 Flash’s 11B active parameters enable sophisticated multi-step planning and contextual understanding, while Step-GUI ensures low-latency action execution and privacy-preserving local control.
items.zh: 我们实证研究了两种架构实例化：(1) Step-GUI [yan2025step]，一个轻量级设备端智能体（仅边缘），使用本地计算资源自主执行任务；(2) Step 3.5 Flash + Step-GUI，一个边缘-云协作框架，其中Step 3.5 Flash作为基于云的推理编排器，综合高级任务计划，通过GUI-MCP协议将其分解为可执行原语，并将低级控制委托给设备端Step-GUI智能体。这种分层架构利用了云规模推理和边缘效率的互补优势：Step 3.5 Flash的11B活跃参数实现了复杂的多步规划和上下文理解，而Step-GUI确保了低延迟动作执行和隐私保护的本地控制。

items.en: The edge-cloud collaborative paradigm achieves a success rate of 57.0% on AndroidDaily Hard, substantially outperforming the edge-only baseline (40.0%). This result suggests that combining strong cloud-side reasoning with efficient edge execution is an effective strategy for navigating deployment constraints in multi-round agent interactions.
items.zh: 边缘-云协作范式在AndroidDaily Hard上实现了57.0%的成功率，显著优于仅边缘基线（40.0%）。这一结果表明，将强大的云端推理与高效的边缘执行相结合，是在多轮智能体交互中应对部署约束的有效策略。

items.en: Critically, this collaborative pattern extends beyond mobile ecosystems to heterogeneous platforms including desktop computers and automotive infotainment systems. By decoupling cognitive orchestration (cloud) from embodied execution (edge), the framework establishes a scalable paradigm for deploying sophisticated agents in resource-constrained industrial environments—directly aligned with Step 3.5 Flash’s design objective of redefining the efficiency frontier for production-grade agentic systems. The results underscore that effective real-world agents require not only advanced reasoning capabilities but also architectures that harmonize computational distribution across infrastructure tiers.
items.zh: 关键的是，这种协作模式超越了移动生态系统，扩展到包括台式计算机和汽车信息娱乐系统在内的异构平台。通过将认知编排（云）与具身执行（边缘）解耦，该框架建立了一个可扩展的范式，用于在资源受限的工业环境中部署复杂智能体——这与Step 3.5 Flash重新定义生产级智能体系统效率前沿的设计目标直接一致。结果强调，有效的现实世界智能体不仅需要高级推理能力，还需要能够协调跨基础设施层计算分布的架构。
